_**User (2026-02-23 12:42:13Z)**_

Implement the following plan:

# Sales Pipeline v2 — Phase 1a Implementation Plan

## Context

The Sales Playbook v2.0 defines a proven sales process (cold DM → signed deal) that currently lives as a static document. The existing pipeline page at `/crm/pipeline` has generic stages (new → contacted → qualified → etc.) that don't match how the team actually works. We're building a **new page** at `/crm/sales-pipeline` that implements the playbook-driven pipeline — without touching the existing pipeline page.

---

## Step 1: Database Migrations (via Supabase MCP)

### Migration 1: Add v2 columns to `crm_opportunities`

All nullable with defaults — existing data unaffected:
- `bucket` (text: A/B/C), `temperature_score` (int, default 50)
- `dm_account` (text: closer/sdr/other, default 'sdr')
- `bump_number` (int, default 0), `last_bump_date` (timestamptz)
- `warm_sub_state` (text: interested/silent)
- `tg_handle`, `calendly_sent_via` (dm/tg/not_yet), `calendly_sent_date`, `calendly_booked_date`
- `gc_opened` (text, default 'na'), `orbit_reason`, `closed_lost_reason`, `dedup_key`
- `next_meeting_at`, `next_meeting_type`
- `bucket_changed_at`, `discovery_call_at`, `proposal_sent_at`
- Indexes on: bucket, dm_account, dedup_key (unique where not null), next_meeting_at

### Migration 2: Create `crm_activities` table

- id, opportunity_id (FK), type (call/message/meeting/proposal/note/bump), title, description, outcome, next_step, next_step_date, owner_id, created_at
- RLS: authenticated users full CRUD (matches existing crm_ table pattern)

---

## Step 2: New Service — `lib/salesPipelineService.ts`

**Types:**
- `SalesPipelineStage`: cold_dm | warm | tg_intro | booked | discovery_done | proposal_sent | proposal_call | v2_contract | v2_closed_won | orbit | v2_closed_lost | nurture
- `Bucket`, `DmAccount`, `WarmSubState`, `OrbitReason` etc. type aliases
- `SalesPipelineOpportunity` — extends CRMOpportunity with all v2 fields
- `CRMActivity` interface

**Methods:**
- `getAll()` — fetch opportunities filtered to v2 stages, join affiliate + client
- `create(data)` — dedup check (name+tg_handle), insert, record stage history
- `update(id, updates)` — auto-set discovery_call_at/proposal_sent_at/closed_at on stage transitions, record stage history
- `delete(id)`
- `recordBump(id)` — increment bump_number, set last_bump_date
- `getActivities(opportunityId)` / `createActivity(data)`
- `getBAMFAMViolations()` — past discovery_done with no/overdue next_meeting
- `getAvailableStages(dmAccount)` — valid stages for Path A vs Path B
- `getMetrics()` — pipeline counts, values, bucket distribution

Reuses `CRMService.recordStageHistory()` from `lib/crmService.ts`.

---

## Step 3: Extend `OpportunityStage` in `lib/crmService.ts`

Additive only — append new v2 stages to the union type. Update the existing pipeline page's `stageLabels`/`stageColors` records to include entries for new stages (they'll never render but satisfies TypeScript), or change to `Partial<Record<...>>`.

---

## Step 4: New Page — `app/crm/sales-pipeline/`

### `layout.tsx` — standard ProtectedRoute + Sidebar pattern

### `page.tsx` — Full Phase 1a

**Header:** Metrics bar — total pipeline count, Bucket A/B/C counts, active value, BAMFAM violations

**Tabs:**
1. **Pipeline** — Kanban + Table views
2. **Orbit** — Orbit opportunities grouped by reason

**Path Filter:** "All" | "Path A (Closer)" | "Path B (SDR)" — controls which columns show

**Kanban Columns:**
Cold DM → Warm → TG* (Path B only) → Booked → Discovery Done → Proposal Sent → Proposal Call → Contract → Closed Won
- DndKit drag-and-drop (same pattern as existing pipeline)
- Drag to orbit → prompt for orbit_reason select
- Drag to closed lost → prompt for closed_lost_reason

**Table View:**
- All columns sortable, inline editing for key fields
- Shows bucket, dm_account, bump progress, temperature, BAMFAM status

**Opportunity Card:**
- Name, bucket badge (A=green, B=amber, C=gray)
- DM account indicator (Closer/SDR)
- Bump progress "Bump 2/4" with dots (cold_dm stage only)
- Warm sub-state badge (warm stage only)
- Temperature score bar
- BAMFAM warning (past discovery_done, no next_meeting)
- Deal value, last contacted, linked contacts

**Create/Edit Dialog:**
- Name, DM Account, Bucket, Temperature Score (slider)
- Source, TG Handle, Owner, Referrer, Affiliate
- Deal Value + Currency, Notes

**Activity Slide-Over (click opportunity):**
- Opportunity details (editable)
- BAMFAM indicator at top
- Activity timeline (newest first)
- "Add Activity" form: type, title, description, outcome, next_step, next_step_date
- "Record Bump" quick button (cold_dm stage)

**Orbit Tab:**
- Grouped by orbit_reason (5 groups)
- Shows: name, bucket, time in orbit, last touch
- "Resurrect" action → move back to pipeline

---

## Step 5: Sidebar Update — `components/Sidebar.tsx`

Add "Sales" link in CRM section (between Pipeline and Network):
- Route: `/crm/sales-pipeline`
- Icon: `Target` from lucide-react
- No path collision with existing `/crm/pipeline`

---

## Files Summary

| File | Action |
|---|---|
| `lib/crmService.ts` | Extend OpportunityStage type (additive) |
| `lib/salesPipelineService.ts` | **NEW** — v2 types + service |
| `app/crm/sales-pipeline/layout.tsx` | **NEW** |
| `app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx` | **NEW** — full pipeline page |
| `components/Sidebar.tsx` | Add "Sales" nav link |
| `app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx` | Minor: handle new stages in type records |

---

## NOT in Phase 1a (Deferred)

- Calendly webhook (1b), Sequence engine (Phase 2), Auto-bump cron (Phase 2)
- Sales Dashboard page (Phase 2), Template linking (1b), AI integration (Phase 3)
- Bumps are manual in Phase 1a (click "Record Bump" button)

---

## Verification

1. `/crm/pipeline` still works unchanged
2. `/crm/sales-pipeline` loads with Kanban columns
3. Create opportunity with dm_account, bucket, tg_handle — dedup works
4. Drag between stages, stage history recorded
5. Path filter hides TG column for Path A
6. Activity panel: add activities, BAMFAM warning shows
7. Orbit tab groups by reason, resurrect works
8. Table view with inline editing
9. `npm run build` passes

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive report:

## Codebase Exploration Summary

I've successfully explored the KOL Campaign Manager codebase. Here's the complete analysis:

---

## 1. CRM SERVICE (`/lib/crmService.ts`) - FULL FILE CONTENT

**Key Types:**
- **OpportunityStage**: Union of 13 stages across 3 categories:
  - Lead stages: `new`, `contacted`, `qualified`, `unqualified`, `nurture`, `dead`
  - Deal stages: `deal_qualified`, `proposal`, `negotiation`, `contract`, `closed_won`, `closed_lost`
  - Account stages: `account_active`, `account_at_risk`, `account_churned`

- **CRMOpportunity Interface** (lines 45-73):
  - Core fields: `id`, `name`, `stage`, `account_type`, `deal_value`, `currency`
  - Telegram integration: `gc` (group chat ID), `last_contacted_at`, `last_message_at`, `last_reply_at`, `last_team_message_at`
  - Relations: `affiliate`, `contacts`, `client`, `owner_id`, `source`, `referrer`, `scope`, `notes`, `position`
  - Timestamps: `created_at`, `updated_at`, `qualified_at`, `closed_at`

- **CRMStageHistory Interface** (lines 124-133):
  - Tracks stage transitions: `from_stage`, `to_stage`, `changed_by`, `changed_at`, `notes`

**Key Service Methods:**

*Opportunities:*
- `getAllOpportunities()` - Fetches with affiliate + client joins, ordered by position
- `getOpportunitiesByStage(stages)` - Filter by stage array
- `getOpportunityById(id)`
- `createOpportunity(data)` - Auto-records stage history
- `updateOpportunity(id, updates)` - Sets `qualified_at` and `closed_at` automatically
- `deleteOpportunity(id)`
- `updateOpportunityPositions(positions)` - Batch position updates

*Stage History (lines 657-693):*
- `recordStageHistory(objectType, objectId, fromStage, toStage, notes)` - Non-throwing, logs user ID
- `getStageHistory(objectType, objectId)` - Chronological descending order

*Utility Methods:*
- `getOpportunityStages()` - Returns stages organized by category (lead/deal/account)
- `getOpportunitySources()` - Returns source options
- `getAccountTypes()` - Returns account type options
- `getOpportunityMetrics()` - Returns totalLeads, totalDeals, totalValue, wonValue, conversionRate

*Telegram Integration (lines 836-912):*
- `sendTelegramMessage(opportunityId, message)` - Sends message and updates `last_reply_at`
- `getStaleOpportunities(daysThreshold)` - Opportunities without recent activity

---

## 2. SIDEBAR NAVIGATION (`/components/Sidebar.tsx`) - FULL STRUCTURE

**Layout Pattern:**
- Header with logo, user avatar dropdown, changelog modal
- Collapsible sidebar (toggle stored in localStorage)
- Organized navigation into sections with dividers:

**Navigation Structure:**
1. **Holo GPT** - Top-level AI chat
2. **People Section**
   - Team → `/team`
   - Clients → `/clients`
3. **KOLs Section**
   - KOLs → `/kols`
   - Lists → `/lists`
   - Campaigns → `/campaigns`
4. **CRM Section** (lines 274-344)
   - Pipeline → `/crm/pipeline` (TrendingUp icon)
   - Network → `/crm/network` (Handshake icon)
   - Contacts → `/crm/contacts` (UserPlus icon)
   - TG Chats → `/crm/telegram` (MessageSquare icon, super_admin only)
5. **Workspace Section** (andy@holohive.io only)
   - Daily Stand-Up → `/daily-standup`
   - Tasks → `/tasks`
6. **Documents Section**
   - Delivery Logs → `/delivery-logs`
   - Forms → `/forms` (admin/super_admin)
   - Links → `/links`
   - Templates → `/templates`
   - SOPs → `/sops` (admin/super_admin)
7. **Admin Section**
   - Field Options → `/admin/field-options`
   - Changelog → `/admin/changelog` (super_admin)
   - Archive → `/archive`

**Key Patterns:**
- Button styling: Active routes use `backgroundColor: '#3e8692'` (teal)
- Icons from lucide-react
- Conditional rendering based on `userProfile?.role`
- Collapsed state: sidebar width transitions between `w-16` and `w-64`

---

## 3. PIPELINE PAGE (`/app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx`) - ARCHITECTURAL OVERVIEW

**State Management Structure:**
```
- View Modes: kanban | table (per tab)
- Tabs: outreach | leads | deals | accounts
- DnD: activeId, activeOpportunity
- Edit: editingCell, editingValue
- Forms: isNewOpportunityOpen, opportunityForm, opportunityType
- Contacts: isContactLinkOpen, selectedContactId, opportunityContacts
- History: isHistoryOpen, stageHistory
- Bulk Edit: selectedOpportunities, bulkEdit
- Filtering: filterSource, filterAccountType, filterAffiliate
- Sorting: sortBy (position|created_desc|created_asc|name_asc|name_desc|value_desc|value_asc)
- UI: collapsedStages (Set<OpportunityStage>), addingToStage
```

**Core Features:**

*Kanban View (lines 1944-1964):*
- DndContext with drag/drop handlers
- DroppableColumn components per stage
- Filtered opportunities grouped by stage
- DragOverlay for visual feedback

*Table View (lines 1323-1939):*
- Stage-based tables with collapsible headers
- Inline editing for name, deal_value, owner, source, affiliate, client, scope
- Row-level drag reordering within and across stages
- Add new row functionality with Enter/Escape handlers
- Checkbox selection for bulk operations

*Filtering & Sorting (lines 831-885):*
- Search term (case-insensitive name match)
- Source filter
- Account type filter
- Affiliate filter
- Sort options: position, created, name, deal value
- Active filter state badge

*Stage Transitions (lines 422-498):*
- qualified → qualified (show convert to deal dialog)
- closed_won → account_active (show convert to account dialog)
- Next stage quick action in context menu

*Inline Features:*
- Contact linking with role and primary flag
- Stage history viewer (modal with chronological view)
- Mark as contacted (updates last_contacted_at)
- Bulk delete with confirmation
- Scroll position preservation during state updates

**Tab-Based Filtering:**
- **Outreach**: stage=`new` AND source=`cold_outreach`
- **Leads**: stage IN [new, contacted, qualified, unqualified, nurture, dead] BUT NOT (new + cold_outreach)
- **Deals**: stage IN [deal_qualified, proposal, negotiation, contract, closed_won, closed_lost]
- **Accounts**: stage IN [account_active, account_at_risk, account_churned]

**Color System (lines 300-316):**
```typescript
stageColors: Record<OpportunityStage, { 
  bg: string;      // Light background
  text: string;    // Text color
  border: string;  // Border color
  solid: string;   // Solid badge color
}>
```

**DnD Integration (dnd-kit):**
- Sensors: PointerSensor (8px activation), KeyboardSensor
- Modifiers: restrictToVerticalAxis for table view
- Strategy: verticalListSortingStrategy
- Measurements: closestCenter collision detection

---

## 4. PIPELINE LAYOUT (`/app/crm/pipeline/layout.tsx`)

**Pattern:**
```tsx
export default function PipelineLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <ProtectedRoute>
      <Sidebar>{children}</Sidebar>
    </ProtectedRoute>
  );
}
```

**Route Structure:** `/app/crm/[feature]/layout.tsx` wraps pages with:
- ProtectedRoute authentication guard
- Sidebar wrapper with navigation

---

## 5. APP/CRM ROUTE STRUCTURE

```
/app/crm/
├── pipeline/
│   ├── layout.tsx (ProtectedRoute + Sidebar)
│   └── page.tsx (128KB - Comprehensive pipeline UI)
├── network/
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   └── page.tsx
├── contacts/
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   └── page.tsx
└── telegram/
    ├── layout.tsx
    └── page.tsx
```

All routes use identical layout pattern for consistent auth + nav.

---

## 6. KEY DEPENDENCIES

**DnD Kit (Drag & Drop):**
- `@dnd-kit/core` - ^6.3.1
- `@dnd-kit/sortable` - ^10.0.0
- `@dnd-kit/modifiers` - ^9.0.0
- `@dnd-kit/utilities` - ^3.2.2

**UI Components (Radix UI):**
- Dialog, Select, Popover, Tabs, Dropdown, HoverCard, ScrollArea, Checkbox
- All exposed via `/components/ui/` components

**Icons:**
- `lucide-react` - ^0.446.0 (Building2, Users, MessageSquare, TrendingUp, etc.)

**Database:**
- `@supabase/supabase-js` - ^2.50.5
- `@supabase/ssr` - ^0.7.0

**Forms:**
- `react-hook-form` - ^7.53.0

**Data Utilities:**
- `date-fns` - ^3.6.0
- `nanoid` - ^5.1.6

---

## 7. SERVICE PATTERN

Services are static classes with Supabase integration:
```typescript
export class CRMService {
  static async getAllOpportunities(): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase.from('crm_opportunities').select(...);
    if (error) throw error;
    return data || [];
  }
}
```

**Pattern for Related Data:**
- Uses Supabase `.select()` with foreign key joins (e.g., `affiliate:crm_affiliates(*)`)
- Returns typed interfaces with optional joined relationships
- Error handling: throws on errors (except non-critical logs)

---

## 8. CLIENT SERVICE PATTERN

Example pattern from `/lib/clientService.ts`:
- Role-based access control in queries
- Interface extensions (e.g., `ClientWithAccess` adds computed fields)
- Aggregation: count joins for relationships
- Static factory methods
- Try-catch with console logging

---

This gives you everything you need to build on the existing CRM infrastructure! The patterns are consistent, dnd-kit is fully integrated, and the service layer is well-established.

   185→export interface CreateContactData {
   186→  name: string;
   187→  email?: string;
   188→  telegram_id?: string;
   189→  x_id?: string;
   190→  role?: string;
   191→  category?: string;
   192→  owner_id?: string;
   193→  notes?: string;
   194→}
   195→
   196→// ============================================
   197→// CRM Service Class
   198→// ============================================
   199→
   200→export class CRMService {
   201→  // ----------------------------------------
   202→  // AFFILIATES
   203→  // ----------------------------------------
   204→
   205→  static async getAllAffiliates(): Promise<CRMAffiliate[]> {
   206→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   207→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   208→      .select('*')
   209→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   210→
   211→    if (error) throw error;
   212→    return data || [];
   213→  }
   214→
   215→  static async getAffiliateById(id: string): Promise<CRMAffiliate | null> {
   216→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   217→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   218→      .select('*')
   219→      .eq('id', id)
   220→      .single();
   221→
   222→    if (error) throw error;
   223→    return data;
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  static async createAffiliate(affiliateData: CreateAffiliateData): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   227→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   228→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   229→      .insert([affiliateData])
   230→      .select()
   231→      .single();
   232→
   233→    if (error) throw error;
   234→
   235→    // Record stage history
   236→    await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', data.id, null, affiliateData.status || 'new');
   237→
   238→    return data;
   239→  }
   240→
   241→  static async updateAffiliate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateAffiliateData>): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   242→    // Get current state for stage history
   243→    const current = await this.getAffiliateById(id);
   244→
   245→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   246→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   247→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   248→      .eq('id', id)
   249→      .select()
   250→      .single();
   251→
   252→    if (error) throw error;
   253→
   254→    // Record stage change if status changed
   255→    if (updates.status && current && current.status !== updates.status) {
   256→      await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', id, current.status, updates.status);
   257→    }
   258→
   259→    return data;
   260→  }
   261→
   262→  static async deleteAffiliate(id: string): Promise<void> {
   263→    const { error } = await supabase
   264→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   265→      .delete()
   266→      .eq('id', id);
   267→
   268→    if (error) throw error;
   269→  }
   270→
   271→  // ----------------------------------------
   272→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   273→  // ----------------------------------------
   274→
   275→  static async getAllOpportunities(): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   276→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   277→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   278→      .select(`
   279→        *,
   280→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   281→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   282→      `)
   283→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   284→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   285→
   286→    if (error) {
   287→      console.error('Error fetching opportunities:', error);
   288→      throw error;
   289→    }
   290→    return data || [];
   291→  }
   292→
   293→  static async getOpportunitiesByStage(stages: OpportunityStage[]): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   294→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   295→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   296→      .select(`
   297→        *,
   298→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   299→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   300→      `)
   301→      .in('stage', stages)
   302→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   303→
   304→    if (error) throw error;
   305→    return data || [];
   306→  }
   307→
   308→  static async getOpportunityById(id: string): Promise<CRMOpportunity | null> {
   309→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   310→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   311→      .select(`
   312→        *,
   313→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   314→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   315→      `)
   316→      .eq('id', id)
   317→      .single();
   318→
   319→    if (error) throw error;
   320→    return data;
   321→  }
   322→
   323→  static async createOpportunity(opportunityData: CreateOpportunityData): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   324→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   325→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   326→      .insert([opportunityData])
   327→      .select()
   328→      .single();
   329→
   330→    if (error) throw error;
   331→
   332→    // Record stage history
   333→    await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', data.id, null, opportunityData.stage || 'new');
   334→
   335→    return data;
   336→  }
   337→
   338→  static async updateOpportunity(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateOpportunityData>): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   339→    // Get current state for stage history
   340→    const current = await this.getOpportunityById(id);
   341→
   342→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   343→
   344→    // Set qualified_at when moving to deal stages
   345→    if (updates.stage && ['proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   346→      if (current && !current.qualified_at && ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'].includes(current.stage)) {
   347→        updateData.qualified_at = new Date().toISOString();
   348→      }
   349→    }
   350→
   351→    // Set closed_at when closing
   352→    if (updates.stage && ['closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   353→      if (current && !current.closed_at) {
   354→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   355→      }
   356→    }
   357→
   358→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   359→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   360→      .update(updateData)
   361→      .eq('id', id)
   362→      .select()
   363→      .single();
   364→
   365→    if (error) throw error;
   366→
   367→    // Record stage change if stage changed
   368→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   369→      await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   370→    }
   371→
   372→    return data;
   373→  }
   374→
   375→  static async deleteOpportunity(id: string): Promise<void> {
   376→    const { error } = await supabase
   377→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   378→      .delete()
   379→      .eq('id', id);
   380→
   381→    if (error) throw error;
   382→  }
   383→
   384→  static async updateOpportunityPositions(positions: { id: string; position: number }[]): Promise<void> {
   385→    // Update each opportunity's position
   386→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position }) =>
   387→      supabase
   388→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   389→        .update({ position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   390→        .eq('id', id)
   391→    );
   392→
   393→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   394→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   395→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   396→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   397→      throw errors[0].error;
   398→    }
   399→  }
   400→

   538→  static async linkContactToOpportunity(contactId: string, opportunityId: string, role?: string, isPrimary?: boolean): Promise<CRMContactLink> {
   539→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   540→      .from('crm_contact_links')
   541→      .insert([{
   542→        contact_id: contactId,
   543→        linked_type: 'opportunity',
   544→        opportunity_id: opportunityId,
   545→        role,
   546→        is_primary: isPrimary || false
   547→      }])
   548→      .select()
   549→      .single();
   550→
   551→    if (error) throw error;
   552→    return data;
   553→  }

   652→
   653→  // ----------------------------------------
   654→  // STAGE HISTORY
   655→  // ----------------------------------------
   656→
   657→  static async recordStageHistory(
   658→    objectType: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   659→    objectId: string,
   660→    fromStage: string | null,
   661→    toStage: string,
   662→    notes?: string
   663→  ): Promise<void> {
   664→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   665→
   666→    const { error } = await supabase
   667→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   668→      .insert([{
   669→        object_type: objectType,
   670→        object_id: objectId,
   671→        from_stage: fromStage,
   672→        to_stage: toStage,
   673→        changed_by: user?.id || null,
   674→        notes
   675→      }]);
   676→
   677→    if (error) {
   678→      console.error('Error recording stage history:', error);
   679→      // Don't throw - stage history is non-critical
   680→    }
   681→  }
   682→
   683→  static async getStageHistory(objectType: string, objectId: string): Promise<CRMStageHistory[]> {
   684→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   685→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   686→      .select('*')
   687→      .eq('object_type', objectType)
   688→      .eq('object_id', objectId)
   689→      .order('changed_at', { ascending: false });
   690→
   691→    if (error) throw error;
   692→    return data || [];
   693→  }
   694→
   695→  // ----------------------------------------
   696→  // UTILITY METHODS
   697→  // ----------------------------------------
   698→
   699→  static async updateLastContacted(
   700→    type: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   701→    id: string
   702→  ): Promise<void> {
   703→    const tableName = type === 'opportunity' ? 'crm_opportunities' :
   704→                      type === 'partner' ? 'crm_partners' : 'crm_affiliates';
   705→
   706→    const { error } = await supabase
   707→      .from(tableName)
   708→      .update({
   709→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   710→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   711→      })
   712→      .eq('id', id);
   713→
   714→    if (error) throw error;
   715→  }
   716→

   718→  // STATIC OPTIONS
   719→  // ----------------------------------------
   720→
   721→  static getOpportunityStages() {
   722→    return {
   723→      lead: [
   724→        { value: 'new', label: 'New' },
   725→        { value: 'contacted', label: 'Contacted' },
   726→        { value: 'qualified', label: 'Qualified' },
   727→        { value: 'unqualified', label: 'Unqualified' },
   728→        { value: 'nurture', label: 'Nurture' },
   729→        { value: 'dead', label: 'Dead' }
   730→      ],
   731→      deal: [
   732→        { value: 'deal_qualified', label: 'Qualified' },
   733→        { value: 'proposal', label: 'Proposal' },
   734→        { value: 'negotiation', label: 'Negotiation' },
   735→        { value: 'contract', label: 'Contract' },
   736→        { value: 'closed_won', label: 'Closed Won' },
   737→        { value: 'closed_lost', label: 'Closed Lost' }
   738→      ],
   739→      account: [
   740→        { value: 'account_active', label: 'Active' },
   741→        { value: 'account_at_risk', label: 'At Risk' },
   742→        { value: 'account_churned', label: 'Churned' }
   743→      ]
   744→    };
   745→  }
   746→

   750→      { value: 'channel', label: 'Channel' },
   751→      { value: 'campaign', label: 'Campaign' },
   752→      { value: 'lite', label: 'Lite' },
   753→      { value: 'ad_hoc', label: 'Ad Hoc' }
   754→    ];
   755→  }
   756→
   757→  static getOpportunitySources() {

   761→      { value: 'event', label: 'Event' },
   762→      { value: 'cold_outreach', label: 'Cold Outreach' }
   763→    ];
   764→  }
   765→
   766→  static getPartnerCategories() {
   767→    return [
   768→      { value: 'service_provider', label: 'Service Provider' },

   787→    ];
   788→  }
   789→
   790→  // ----------------------------------------
   791→  // ANALYTICS HELPERS
   792→  // ----------------------------------------
   793→
   794→  static async getOpportunityMetrics(): Promise<{
   795→    totalLeads: number;
   796→    totalDeals: number;
   797→    totalValue: number;
   798→    wonValue: number;
   799→    conversionRate: number;
   800→  }> {
   801→    const leadStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture', 'dead'];
   802→    const dealStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['deal_qualified', 'proposal', 'negotiation', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'];
   803→
   804→    const { data: opportunities, error } = await supabase
   805→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   806→      .select('stage, deal_value');
   807→
   808→    if (error) throw error;
   809→
   810→    const leads = opportunities?.filter(o => leadStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   811→    const deals = opportunities?.filter(o => dealStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   812→    const closedWon = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won') || [];
   813→    const closed = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won' || o.stage === 'closed_lost') || [];
   814→
   815→    const totalValue = deals.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   816→    const wonValue = closedWon.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   817→    const conversionRate = closed.length > 0 ? (closedWon.length / closed.length) * 100 : 0;
   818→
   819→    return {
   820→      totalLeads: leads.length,
   821→      totalDeals: deals.length,
   822→      totalValue,
   823→      wonValue,
   824→      conversionRate
   825→    };
   826→  }
   827→
   828→  // ----------------------------------------
   829→  // TELEGRAM INTEGRATION
   830→  // ----------------------------------------
   831→
   832→  /**
   833→   * Send a message to an opportunity's Telegram group chat
   834→   * and update the last_reply_at timestamp
   835→   */
   836→  static async sendTelegramMessage(
   837→    opportunityId: string,
   838→    message: string
   839→  ): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
   840→    // Get the opportunity to find the gc (chat ID)
   841→    const opportunity = await this.getOpportunityById(opportunityId);
   842→    if (!opportunity) {
   843→      return { success: false, error: 'Opportunity not found' };
   844→    }
   845→
   846→    if (!opportunity.gc) {
   847→      return { success: false, error: 'No Telegram group chat ID configured for this opportunity' };
   848→    }
   849→
   850→    // Send message via Telegram API
   851→    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
   852→    if (!botToken) {
   853→      return { success: false, error: 'Telegram bot not configured' };
   854→    }
   855→
   856→    try {
   857→      const response = await fetch(
   858→        `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
   859→        {
   860→          method: 'POST',
   861→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   862→          body: JSON.stringify({
   863→            chat_id: opportunity.gc,
   864→            text: message,
   865→            parse_mode: 'HTML'
   866→          })
   867→        }
   868→      );
   869→
   870→      if (!response.ok) {
   871→        const error = await response.json();
   872→        console.error('[CRM] Telegram send error:', error);
   873→        return { success: false, error: error.description || 'Failed to send message' };
   874→      }
   875→
   876→      // Update last_reply_at
   877→      await supabase
   878→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   879→        .update({
   880→          last_reply_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   881→          updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   882→        })
   883→        .eq('id', opportunityId);
   884→
   885→      return { success: true };
   886→    } catch (error) {
   887→      console.error('[CRM] Error sending Telegram message:', error);
   888→      return { success: false, error: 'Failed to send message' };
   889→    }
   890→  }
   891→
   892→  /**
   893→   * Get opportunities that haven't been contacted recently
   894→   */
   895→  static async getStaleOpportunities(daysThreshold: number = 7): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   896→    const thresholdDate = new Date();
   897→    thresholdDate.setDate(thresholdDate.getDate() - daysThreshold);
   898→
   899→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   900→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   901→      .select(`
   902→        *,
   903→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*)
   904→      `)
   905→      .not('gc', 'is', null)
   906→      .or(`last_message_at.is.null,last_message_at.lt.${thresholdDate.toISOString()}`)
   907→      .not('stage', 'in', '(closed_won,closed_lost,dead,account_churned)')
   908→      .order('last_message_at', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: true });
   909→
   910→    if (error) throw error;
   911→    return data || [];
   912→  }
   913→}
   914→
```
</details></tool-use>

    17→interface SidebarProps {

    19→}
    20→
    21→export default function Sidebar({ children }: SidebarProps) {
    22→  const pathname = usePathname();
    23→  const router = useRouter();
    24→  const { userProfile, signOut } = useAuth();
    25→  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = React.useState(() => {
    26→    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    27→      const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed');
    28→      return stored === 'true';
    29→    }
    30→    return false;
    31→  });
    32→  const [isChangelogOpen, setIsChangelogOpen] = useState(false);
    33→  const [changelogPage, setChangelogPage] = useState(0);
    34→  const changelogsPerPage = 3;
    35→
    36→  // Get changelog data from context (fetched once at app level)
    37→  const { changelogs, latestVersion } = useChangelog();
    38→
    39→  // Format date for changelog display
    40→  const formatChangelogDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    41→    if (!dateString) return '';
    42→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'
    46→    });
    47→  };
    48→
    49→  // Render changelog content
    50→  const renderChangelogContent = (content: string) => {
    51→    return content.split('\n').map((line, index) => {
    52→      if (line.trim().startsWith('- ') || line.trim().startsWith('* ')) {
    53→        return (
    54→          <li key={index} className="ml-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
    55→            {line.trim().substring(2)}
    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }
    59→      if (line.trim().startsWith('### ')) {
    60→        return (
    61→          <h4 key={index} className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-3 mb-1 text-sm">
    62→            {line.trim().substring(4)}
    63→          </h4>
    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {
    67→        return (
    68→          <h3 key={index} className="font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4 mb-2 text-sm">
    69→            {line.trim().substring(3)}
    70→          </h3>
    71→        );
    72→      }
    73→      if (line.trim() === '') {
    74→        return <div key={index} className="h-2" />;
    75→      }
    76→      return (
    77→        <p key={index} className="text-gray-700 text-sm">
    78→          {line}
    79→        </p>
    80→      );
    81→    });
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const handleSidebarToggle = () => {

    97→        .join('')
    98→        .slice(0, 2);

   412→                </Link>
   413→                {/* Forms tab - Admin only */}
   414→                {(userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') && (
   415→                  <Link href="/forms" legacyBehavior>
   416→                    <Button
   417→                      asChild
   418→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/forms') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   419→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   420→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/forms') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   421→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Forms' : undefined}
   422→                    >
   423→                      <span>
   424→                        <ClipboardList className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   425→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Forms'}
   426→                      </span>
   427→                    </Button>
   428→                  </Link>
   429→                )}
   430→                {/* Links tab */}
   431→                <Link href="/links" legacyBehavior>
   432→                  <Button
   433→                    asChild
   434→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/links') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   435→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   436→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/links') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   437→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Links' : undefined}
   438→                  >
   439→                    <span>
   440→                      <Link2 className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   441→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Links'}
   442→                    </span>
   443→                  </Button>
   444→                </Link>
   445→                {/* Templates tab */}
   446→                <Link href="/templates" legacyBehavior>
   447→                  <Button
   448→                    asChild
   449→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/templates') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   450→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   451→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/templates') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   452→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Templates' : undefined}
   453→                  >
   454→                    <span>
   455→                      <MessageSquare className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   456→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Templates'}
   457→                    </span>
   458→                  </Button>
   459→                </Link>
   460→                {/* SOPs tab - Admin only */}
   461→                {(userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') && (
   462→                  <Link href="/sops" legacyBehavior>
   463→                    <Button
   464→                      asChild
   465→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/sops') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   466→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   467→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/sops') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   468→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'SOPs' : undefined}
   469→                    >
   470→                      <span>
   471→                        <BookOpen className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   472→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'SOPs'}
   473→                      </span>
   474→                    </Button>
   475→                  </Link>
   476→                )}
   477→              </div>
   478→
   479→              {/* Admin Section */}
   480→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   481→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   482→                  <Settings className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   483→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   484→                </div>
   485→              )}
   486→              <div className="space-y-2">
   487→                {/* Field Options tab */}
   488→                <Link href="/admin/field-options" legacyBehavior>
   489→                  <Button
   490→                    asChild
   491→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/admin/field-options') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   492→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   493→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/field-options') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   494→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Field Options' : undefined}
   495→                  >
   496→                    <span>
   497→                      <Sliders className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   498→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Field Options'}
   499→                    </span>
   500→                  </Button>
   501→                </Link>
   502→                {/* Changelog tab - Super Admin only */}
   503→                {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin' && (
   504→                  <Link href="/admin/changelog" legacyBehavior>
   505→                    <Button
   506→                      asChild
   507→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   508→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   509→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   510→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}
   511→                    >
   512→                      <span>
   513→                        <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   514→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}
   515→                      </span>
   516→                    </Button>
   517→                  </Link>
   518→                )}
   519→                {/* Archive tab */}
   520→                <Link href="/archive" legacyBehavior>
   521→                  <Button
   522→                    asChild
   523→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   524→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   525→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   526→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Archive' : undefined}
   527→                  >
   528→                    <span>
   529→                      <Archive className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   530→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   531→                    </span>
   532→                  </Button>
   533→                </Link>
   534→              </div>
   535→
   536→            </nav>
   537→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   538→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   539→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   540→                <Button
   541→                  variant="ghost"
   542→                  size="sm"
   543→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   544→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   545→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   546→                >
   547→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   548→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   549→                  ) : (
   550→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   551→                  )}
   552→                </Button>
   553→              </div>
   554→            </div>
   555→          </div>
   556→        </aside>
   557→        {/* Main Content */}
   558→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   559→      </div>
   560→
   561→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   562→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   563→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   564→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   565→      }}>
   566→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   567→          <DialogHeader>
   568→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   569→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   570→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   571→            </div>
   572→            <DialogDescription>
   573→              Version history and updates
   574→            </DialogDescription>
   575→          </DialogHeader>
   576→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   577→            <div className="space-y-6">
   578→              {changelogs
   579→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   580→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   581→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   582→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   583→                    <Badge
   584→                      variant="secondary"
   585→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   586→                    >
   587→                      v{changelog.version}
   588→                    </Badge>
   589→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   590→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   591→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   592→                      </span>
   593→                    )}
   594→                  </div>
   595→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   596→                    {changelog.title}
   597→                  </h3>
   598→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   599→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   600→                  </div>
   601→                </div>
   602→              ))}
   603→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   604→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   605→                  No changelogs available yet.
   606→                </p>
   607→              )}
   608→            </div>
   609→          </ScrollArea>
   610→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   611→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   612→              <Button
   613→                variant="outline"
   614→                size="sm"
   615→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   616→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   617→              >
   618→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   619→                Previous
   620→              </Button>
   621→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   622→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   623→              </span>
   624→              <Button
   625→                variant="outline"
   626→                size="sm"
   627→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   628→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   629→              >
   630→                Next
   631→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   632→              </Button>
   633→            </div>
   634→          )}
   635→        </DialogContent>
   636→      </Dialog>
   637→    </div>
   638→  );
   639→}
```
</details></tool-use>
