```text
    30→import {
    31→  DndContext,
    32→  DragOverlay,
    33→  closestCenter,
    34→  KeyboardSensor,
    35→  PointerSensor,
    36→  useSensor,
    37→  useSensors,
    38→  DragStartEvent,
    39→  DragEndEvent,
    40→  useDroppable,
    41→  MeasuringStrategy,
    42→} from '@dnd-kit/core';
    43→import { restrictToVerticalAxis } from '@dnd-kit/modifiers';
    44→import {
    45→  useSortable,
    46→  SortableContext,
    47→  verticalListSortingStrategy,
    48→  arrayMove,
    49→} from '@dnd-kit/sortable';
    50→import { CSS } from '@dnd-kit/utilities';
    51→import {
    52→  CRMService,
    53→  CRMOpportunity,
    54→  CRMAffiliate,
    55→  CRMContact,
    56→  CRMContactLink,
    57→  CRMStageHistory,
    58→  CreateOpportunityData,
    59→  CreateContactData,
    60→  OpportunityStage
    61→} from '@/lib/crmService';
    62→import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
    63→import { ClientService, ClientWithAccess } from '@/lib/clientService';
    64→
    65→export default function PipelinePage() {
    66→  const { user } = useAuth();
    67→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    68→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
    69→  const [opportunities, setOpportunities] = useState<CRMOpportunity[]>([]);
    70→  const [affiliates, setAffiliates] = useState<CRMAffiliate[]>([]);
    71→  const [contacts, setContacts] = useState<CRMContact[]>([]);
    72→  const [users, setUsers] = useState<{ id: string; name: string | null; email: string }[]>([]);
    73→  const [clients, setClients] = useState<ClientWithAccess[]>([]);
    74→  const [allContactLinks, setAllContactLinks] = useState<CRMContactLink[]>([]);
    75→  const [isNewOpportunityOpen, setIsNewOpportunityOpen] = useState(false);
    76→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
    77→  const [editingOpportunity, setEditingOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
    78→  const [opportunityForm, setOpportunityForm] = useState<CreateOpportunityData>({
    79→    name: '',
    80→    stage: 'new',
    81→    source: undefined,
    82→  });
    83→  const [opportunityType, setOpportunityType] = useState<'lead' | 'deal'>('lead');
    84→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'outreach' | 'leads' | 'deals' | 'accounts'>('leads');
    85→  const [outreachViewMode, setOutreachViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
    86→  const [leadsViewMode, setLeadsViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
    87→  const [dealsViewMode, setDealsViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
    88→  const [accountsViewMode, setAccountsViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
    89→
    90→  // Inline editing state
    91→  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState<{ id: string; field: string } | null>(null);
    92→  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState<string>('');
    93→
    94→  // Affiliate combobox state
    95→  const [affiliatePopoverOpen, setAffiliatePopoverOpen] = useState<string | null>(null);
    96→
    97→  // Contact linking state
    98→  const [isContactLinkOpen, setIsContactLinkOpen] = useState(false);
    99→  const [linkingOpportunity, setLinkingOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   100→  const [opportunityContacts, setOpportunityContacts] = useState<CRMContactLink[]>([]);
   101→  const [selectedContactId, setSelectedContactId] = useState<string>('');
   102→  const [contactRole, setContactRole] = useState<string>('');
   103→  const [isPrimaryContact, setIsPrimaryContact] = useState(false);
   104→
   105→  // New contact creation state (within manage contacts dialog)
   106→  const [contactMode, setContactMode] = useState<'link' | 'create'>('link');
   107→  const [newContactForm, setNewContactForm] = useState<CreateContactData>({ name: '' });
   108→
   109→  // Stage history state
   110→  const [isHistoryOpen, setIsHistoryOpen] = useState(false);
   111→  const [historyOpportunity, setHistoryOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   112→  const [stageHistory, setStageHistory] = useState<CRMStageHistory[]>([]);
   113→
   114→  // Delete confirmation dialog state
   115→  const [isDeleteDialogOpen, setIsDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   116→  const [opportunityToDelete, setOpportunityToDelete] = useState<{ id: string; name: string } | null>(null);
   117→  const [isBulkDeleteDialogOpen, setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   118→
   119→  // Convert to deal dialog state
   120→  const [isConvertDialogOpen, setIsConvertDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   121→  const [opportunityToConvert, setOpportunityToConvert] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   122→
   123→  // Convert to account dialog state
   124→  const [isConvertToAccountDialogOpen, setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   125→  const [dealToConvertToAccount, setDealToConvertToAccount] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   126→
   127→  // Analytics state
   128→  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState<{
   129→    totalLeads: number;
   130→    totalDeals: number;
   131→    totalValue: number;
   132→    wonValue: number;
   133→    conversionRate: number;
   134→  } | null>(null);
   135→
   136→  // Filter state
   137→  const [filterSource, setFilterSource] = useState<string>('all');
   138→  const [filterAccountType, setFilterAccountType] = useState<string>('all');
   139→  const [filterAffiliate, setFilterAffiliate] = useState<string>('all');
   140→
   141→  // Sort state
   142→  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<string>('position');
   143→
   144→  // Drag and drop state
   145→  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   146→  const [activeOpportunity, setActiveOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   147→
   148→  // Collapsed stages state (dead is collapsed by default)
   149→  const [collapsedStages, setCollapsedStages] = useState<Set<OpportunityStage>>(new Set(['dead']));
   150→
   151→  // Adding new row state
   152→  const [addingToStage, setAddingToStage] = useState<OpportunityStage | null>(null);
   153→  const [newRowName, setNewRowName] = useState('');
   154→  const savedScrollPositionRef = useRef<number>(0);
   155→
   156→  // Bulk edit state
   157→  const [selectedOpportunities, setSelectedOpportunities] = useState<string[]>([]);
   158→  const [bulkEdit, setBulkEdit] = useState<Partial<CRMOpportunity>>({});
   159→
   160→  // Helper to get scroll container
   161→  const getScrollContainer = () => {
   162→    return document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   163→  };
   164→
   165→  // Helper to restore scroll position
   166→  const restoreScrollPosition = () => {
   167→    const scrollContainer = getScrollContainer();
   168→    if (scrollContainer) {
   169→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   170→        scrollContainer.scrollTop = savedScrollPositionRef.current;
   171→      });
   172→    }
   173→  };
   174→
   175→  const handleAddNewRow = (stage: OpportunityStage) => {
   176→    // Capture scroll position before any state changes
   177→    const scrollContainer = getScrollContainer();
   178→    savedScrollPositionRef.current = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   179→
   180→    // Expand the stage if collapsed
   181→    if (collapsedStages.has(stage)) {
   182→      setCollapsedStages(prev => {
   183→        const newSet = new Set(prev);
   184→        newSet.delete(stage);
   185→        return newSet;
   186→      });
   187→    }
   188→    setAddingToStage(stage);
   189→    setNewRowName('');
   190→
   191→    // Restore scroll position after React renders
   192→    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   193→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   194→        if (scrollContainer) scrollContainer.scrollTop = savedScrollPositionRef.current;
   195→      });
   196→    });
   197→  };
   198→
   199→  const handleSaveNewRow = async () => {
   200→    if (!addingToStage || !newRowName.trim()) {
   201→      setAddingToStage(null);
   202→      setNewRowName('');
   203→      restoreScrollPosition();
   204→      return;
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    const stageSaving = addingToStage;
   208→    const nameSaving = newRowName.trim();
   209→
   210→    // Clear input states first
   211→    setAddingToStage(null);
   212→    setNewRowName('');
   213→    restoreScrollPosition();
   214→
   215→    try {
   216→      const newOpp = await CRMService.createOpportunity({
   217→        name: nameSaving,
   218→        stage: stageSaving,
   219→        owner_id: user?.id,
   220→        // For outreach tab, set source to cold_outreach
   221→        source: activeTab === 'outreach' ? 'cold_outreach' : undefined
   222→      });
   223→
   224→      // Optimistic update - add to state directly
   225→      if (newOpp) {
   226→        setOpportunities(prev => [newOpp, ...prev]);
   227→        restoreScrollPosition();
   228→      }
   229→    } catch (error) {
   230→      console.error('Error creating opportunity:', error);
   231→    }
   232→  };
   233→
   234→  const handleNewRowKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   235→    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   236→      e.preventDefault();
   237→      handleSaveNewRow();
   238→    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   239→      setAddingToStage(null);
   240→      setNewRowName('');
   241→      restoreScrollPosition();
   242→    }
   243→  };
   244→
   245→  const toggleStageCollapse = (stage: OpportunityStage) => {
   246→    setCollapsedStages(prev => {
   247→      const newSet = new Set(prev);
   248→      if (newSet.has(stage)) {
   249→        newSet.delete(stage);
   250→      } else {
   251→        newSet.add(stage);
   252→      }
   253→      return newSet;
   254→    });
   255→  };
   256→
   257→  // Drag and drop sensors
   258→  const sensors = useSensors(
   259→    useSensor(PointerSensor, {
   260→      activationConstraint: {
   261→        distance: 8,
   262→      },
   263→    }),
   264→    useSensor(KeyboardSensor)
   265→  );
   266→
   267→  const outreachStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new'];  // Outreach shows only 'new' stage with source 'cold_outreach'
   268→  const leadStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture', 'dead'];
   269→  const dealStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['deal_qualified', 'proposal', 'negotiation', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'];
   270→  const accountStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['account_active', 'account_churned'];
   271→  const sourceOptions = ['referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'];
   272→  const accountTypeOptions = ['general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc'];
   273→  const scopeOptions = [
   274→    { value: 'fundraising', label: 'Fundraising' },
   275→    { value: 'advisory', label: 'Advisory' },
   276→    { value: 'kol_activation', label: 'KOL Activation' },
   277→    { value: 'gtm', label: 'GTM' },
   278→    { value: 'bd_partnerships', label: 'BD/Partnerships' },
   279→    { value: 'apac', label: 'APAC' },
   280→  ];
   281→
   282→  const stageLabels: Record<OpportunityStage, string> = {
   283→    new: 'New',
   284→    contacted: 'Contacted',
   285→    qualified: 'Qualified',
   286→    unqualified: 'Unqualified',
   287→    nurture: 'Nurture',
   288→    dead: 'Dead',
   289→    deal_qualified: 'Qualified',
   290→    proposal: 'Proposal',
   291→    negotiation: 'Negotiation',
   292→    contract: 'Contract',
   293→    closed_won: 'Won',
   294→    closed_lost: 'Lost',
   295→    account_active: 'Active',
   296→    account_at_risk: 'At Risk',
   297→    account_churned: 'Inactive'
   298→  };
   299→
   300→  const stageColors: Record<OpportunityStage, { bg: string; text: string; border: string; solid: string }> = {
   301→    new: { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200', solid: 'bg-blue-500' },
   302→    contacted: { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200', solid: 'bg-indigo-500' },
   303→    qualified: { bg: 'bg-green-50', text: 'text-green-700', border: 'border-green-200', solid: 'bg-green-500' },
   304→    unqualified: { bg: 'bg-gray-50', text: 'text-gray-700', border: 'border-gray-200', solid: 'bg-gray-400' },
   305→    nurture: { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200', solid: 'bg-amber-500' },
   306→    dead: { bg: 'bg-stone-100', text: 'text-stone-600', border: 'border-stone-300', solid: 'bg-stone-500' },
   307→    deal_qualified: { bg: 'bg-green-50', text: 'text-green-700', border: 'border-green-200', solid: 'bg-green-500' },
   308→    proposal: { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200', solid: 'bg-purple-500' },
   309→    negotiation: { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200', solid: 'bg-orange-500' },
   310→    contract: { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200', solid: 'bg-cyan-500' },
   311→    closed_won: { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200', solid: 'bg-emerald-500' },
   312→    closed_lost: { bg: 'bg-red-50', text: 'text-red-700', border: 'border-red-200', solid: 'bg-red-500' },
   313→    account_active: { bg: 'bg-teal-50', text: 'text-teal-700', border: 'border-teal-200', solid: 'bg-teal-500' },
   314→    account_at_risk: { bg: 'bg-yellow-50', text: 'text-yellow-700', border: 'border-yellow-200', solid: 'bg-yellow-500' },
   315→    account_churned: { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-700', border: 'border-slate-200', solid: 'bg-slate-500' }
   316→  };
   317→
   318→  useEffect(() => {
   319→    fetchData();
   320→  }, []);
   321→
   322→  const fetchData = async () => {
   323→    setLoading(true);
   324→    try {
   325→      const [opps, affs, conts, metricsData, contactLinks, allUsers, allClients] = await Promise.all([
   326→        CRMService.getAllOpportunities(),
   327→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
   328→        CRMService.getAllContacts(),
   329→        CRMService.getOpportunityMetrics(),
   330→        CRMService.getAllContactLinks(),
   331→        UserService.getAllUsers(),
   332→        ClientService.getAllClients()
   333→      ]);
   334→      setOpportunities(opps);
   335→      setAffiliates(affs);
   336→      setContacts(conts);
   337→      setMetrics(metricsData);
   338→      setAllContactLinks(contactLinks);
   339→      setUsers(allUsers);
   340→      setClients(allClients);
   341→    } catch (error) {
   342→      console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
   343→    } finally {
   344→      setLoading(false);
   345→    }
   346→  };
   347→
   348→  const handleCreateOpportunity = async () => {
   349→    if (!opportunityForm.name.trim()) return;
   350→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   351→    try {
   352→      if (editingOpportunity) {
   353→        await CRMService.updateOpportunity(editingOpportunity.id, opportunityForm);
   354→      } else {
   355→        await CRMService.createOpportunity({
   356→          ...opportunityForm,
   357→          owner_id: user?.id
   358→        });
   359→      }
   360→      setIsNewOpportunityOpen(false);
   361→      setEditingOpportunity(null);
   362→      setOpportunityForm({ name: '', stage: 'new' });
   363→      fetchData();
   364→    } catch (error) {
   365→      console.error('Error saving opportunity:', error);
   366→    } finally {
   367→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   368→    }
   369→  };
   370→
   371→  const handleEditOpportunity = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   372→    setEditingOpportunity(opp);
   373→    const isDeal = dealStages.includes(opp.stage) || accountStages.includes(opp.stage);
   374→    setOpportunityType(isDeal ? 'deal' : 'lead');
   375→    setOpportunityForm({
   376→      name: opp.name,
   377→      stage: opp.stage,
   378→      account_type: opp.account_type || undefined,
   379→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   380→      currency: opp.currency,
   381→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   382→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   383→      gc: opp.gc || undefined,
   384→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   385→      client_id: opp.client_id || undefined,
   386→      scope: opp.scope || undefined,
   387→      notes: opp.notes || undefined
   388→    });
   389→    setIsNewOpportunityOpen(true);
   390→  };
   391→
   392→  const handleDeleteOpportunity = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   393→    setOpportunityToDelete({ id: opp.id, name: opp.name });
   394→    setIsDeleteDialogOpen(true);
   395→  };
   396→
   397→  const confirmDeleteOpportunity = async () => {
   398→    if (!opportunityToDelete) return;
   399→    try {
   400→      await CRMService.deleteOpportunity(opportunityToDelete.id);
   401→      setIsDeleteDialogOpen(false);
   402→      setOpportunityToDelete(null);
   403→      fetchData();
   404→    } catch (error) {
   405→      console.error('Error deleting opportunity:', error);
   406→    }
   407→  };
   408→
   409→  const confirmBulkDelete = async () => {
   410→    if (selectedOpportunities.length === 0) return;
   411→    try {
   412→      await Promise.all(selectedOpportunities.map(id => CRMService.deleteOpportunity(id)));
   413→      setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen(false);
   414→      setSelectedOpportunities([]);
   415→      setBulkEdit({});
   416→      fetchData();
   417→    } catch (error) {
   418→      console.error('Error bulk deleting opportunities:', error);
   419→    }
   420→  };
   421→
   422→  const handleMoveStage = async (opp: CRMOpportunity, newStage: OpportunityStage) => {
   423→    // If moving to qualified, show convert to deal dialog
   424→    if (newStage === 'qualified' && opp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   425→      // First move to qualified
   426→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   427→      // Then ask if they want to convert to deal
   428→      setOpportunityToConvert({ ...opp, stage: 'qualified' });
   429→      setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   430→      return;
   431→    }
   432→
   433→    // If moving to closed_won (deal won), show convert to account dialog
   434→    if (newStage === 'closed_won' && opp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(opp.stage)) {
   435→      // First move to closed_won
   436→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   437→      // Then ask if they want to convert to account
   438→      setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...opp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   439→      setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   440→      return;
   441→    }
   442→
   443→    await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   444→  };
   445→
   446→  const performStageMove = async (opp: CRMOpportunity, newStage: OpportunityStage) => {
   447→    const oldStage = opp.stage;
   448→
   449→    // Preserve scroll position
   450→    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   451→    const scrollTop = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   452→
   453→    // Optimistic update - update UI immediately
   454→    setOpportunities(prev =>
   455→      prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, stage: newStage } : o)
   456→    );
   457→
   458→    // Restore scroll position after React re-render
   459→    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   460→      if (scrollContainer) {
   461→        scrollContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
   462→      }
   463→    });
   464→
   465→    try {
   466→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(opp.id, { stage: newStage });
   467→    } catch (error) {
   468→      console.error('Error moving stage:', error);
   469→      // Revert on error
   470→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   471→        prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, stage: oldStage } : o)
   472→      );
   473→    }
   474→  };
   475→
   476→  const handleConvertToDeal = async () => {
   477→    if (!opportunityToConvert) return;
   478→    await performStageMove(opportunityToConvert, 'deal_qualified');
   479→    setIsConvertDialogOpen(false);
   480→    setOpportunityToConvert(null);
   481→  };
   482→
   483→  const handleKeepAsLead = () => {
   484→    setIsConvertDialogOpen(false);
   485→    setOpportunityToConvert(null);
   486→  };
   487→
   488→  const handleConvertToAccount = async () => {
   489→    if (!dealToConvertToAccount) return;
   490→    await performStageMove(dealToConvertToAccount, 'account_active');
   491→    setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(false);
   492→    setDealToConvertToAccount(null);
   493→  };
   494→
   495→  const handleKeepAsDeal = () => {
   496→    setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(false);
   497→    setDealToConvertToAccount(null);
   498→  };
   499→
   500→  const handleInlineUpdate = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: any) => {
   501→    // Preserve scroll position
   502→    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   503→    const scrollTop = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   504→
   505→    try {
   506→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   507→        prev.map(o => {
   508→          if (o.id !== oppId) return o;
   509→
   510→          const updates: Partial<CRMOpportunity> = { [field]: value || null };
   511→
   512→          // Handle related object updates for display
   513→          if (field === 'client_id') {
   514→            const selectedClient = clients.find(c => c.id === value);
   515→            updates.client = selectedClient ? { id: selectedClient.id, name: selectedClient.name } : null;
   516→          } else if (field === 'affiliate_id') {
   517→            const selectedAffiliate = affiliates.find(a => a.id === value);
   518→            updates.affiliate = selectedAffiliate || null;
   519→          }
   520→
   521→          return { ...o, ...updates };
   522→        })
   523→      );
   524→
   525→      // Restore scroll position after React re-render
   526→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   527→        if (scrollContainer) {
   528→          scrollContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
   529→        }
   530→      });
   531→
   532→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(oppId, { [field]: value || null });
   533→    } catch (error) {
   534→      console.error('Error updating field:', error);
   535→    }
   536→    setEditingCell(null);
   537→    setEditingValue('');
   538→  };
   539→
   540→  // Bulk update handler
   541→  const handleBulkUpdate = async () => {
   542→    if (selectedOpportunities.length === 0 || Object.keys(bulkEdit).length === 0) return;
   543→
   544→    // Filter out undefined values
   545→    const updates: Record<string, any> = {};
   546→    Object.entries(bulkEdit).forEach(([key, value]) => {
   547→      if (value !== undefined) {
   548→        updates[key] = value;
   549→      }
   550→    });
   551→
   552→    if (Object.keys(updates).length === 0) return;
   553→
   554→    try {
   555→      // Optimistic update
   556→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   557→        prev.map(o => selectedOpportunities.includes(o.id) ? { ...o, ...updates } : o)
   558→      );
   559→
   560→      // Update in database
   561→      await Promise.all(
   562→        selectedOpportunities.map(id => CRMService.updateOpportunity(id, updates))
   563→      );
   564→
   565→      // Clear selection and bulk edit
   566→      setSelectedOpportunities([]);
   567→      setBulkEdit({});
   568→    } catch (error) {
   569→      console.error('Error bulk updating:', error);
   570→    }
   571→  };
   572→
   573→  const startEditing = (id: string, field: string, currentValue: string | number | null | undefined) => {
   574→    setEditingCell({ id, field });
   575→    setEditingValue(currentValue?.toString() || '');
   576→  };
   577→
   578→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent, oppId: string, field: string) => {
   579→    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   580→      e.preventDefault();
   581→      const value = field === 'deal_value' ? (parseFloat(editingValue) || null) : editingValue;
   582→      handleInlineUpdate(oppId, field, value);
   583→    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   584→      setEditingCell(null);
   585→      setEditingValue('');
   586→    }
   587→  };
   588→
   589→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   590→    const { active } = event;
   591→    setActiveId(active.id as string);
   592→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === active.id);
   593→    setActiveOpportunity(opp || null);
   594→  };
   595→
   596→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   597→    const { active, over } = event;
   598→    setActiveId(null);
   599→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   600→
   601→    if (!over) return;
   602→
   603→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   604→    const newStage = over.id as OpportunityStage;
   605→
   606→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   607→    if (!opp || opp.stage === newStage) return;
   608→
   609→    // Check if the move is valid (leads can only move to lead stages, deals to deal stages)
   610→    const isLeadStage = leadStages.includes(newStage);
   611→    const isDealStage = dealStages.includes(newStage);
   612→    const oppIsLead = leadStages.includes(opp.stage);
   613→    const oppIsDeal = dealStages.includes(opp.stage);
   614→
   615→    // Allow moving within same category, or from qualified to deal_qualified (converting lead to deal)
   616→    if (oppIsLead && !isLeadStage && !(opp.stage === 'qualified' && newStage === 'deal_qualified')) {
   617→      return;
   618→    }
   619→    if (oppIsDeal && !isDealStage) {
   620→      return;
   621→    }
   622→
   623→    // If moving to qualified, show convert to deal dialog after the move
   624→    if (newStage === 'qualified' && opp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   625→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   626→      setOpportunityToConvert({ ...opp, stage: 'qualified' });
   627→      setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   628→      return;
   629→    }
   630→
   631→    await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   632→  };
   633→
   634→  // Handler for table row reordering (supports cross-stage dragging)
   635→  const handleTableRowDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   636→    const { active, over } = event;
   637→    setActiveId(null);
   638→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   639→
   640→    if (!over) return;
   641→
   642→    const draggedOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === active.id);
   643→    if (!draggedOpp) return;
   644→
   645→    const overId = over.id as string;
   646→
   647→    // Check if dropped on a stage droppable (stage name)
   648→    const isStageDroppable = currentStages.includes(overId as OpportunityStage);
   649→
   650→    // Check if dropped on another opportunity
   651→    const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   652→
   653→    if (isStageDroppable) {
   654→      // Dropped on a stage area - move to that stage
   655→      const newStage = overId as OpportunityStage;
   656→      if (draggedOpp.stage !== newStage) {
   657→        // If moving to qualified, show convert dialog
   658→        if (newStage === 'qualified' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   659→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   660→          setOpportunityToConvert({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'qualified' });
   661→          setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   662→          return;
   663→        }
   664→
   665→        // If moving to closed_won, show convert to account dialog
   666→        if (newStage === 'closed_won' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(draggedOpp.stage)) {
   667→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   668→          setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   669→          setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   670→          return;
   671→        }
   672→
   673→        await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   674→      }
   675→    } else if (targetOpp) {
   676→      // Dropped on another opportunity
   677→      const sourceStage = draggedOpp.stage;
   678→      const targetStage = targetOpp.stage;
   679→
   680→      if (sourceStage === targetStage) {
   681→        // Same stage - reorder within stage
   682→        const stageOpps = currentOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === sourceStage);
   683→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === active.id);
   684→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === over.id);
   685→
   686→        if (oldIndex === -1 || newIndex === -1 || oldIndex === newIndex) return;
   687→
   688→        const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   689→        const positionUpdates = reordered.map((opp, index) => ({
   690→          id: opp.id,
   691→          position: index
   692→        }));
   693→
   694→        setOpportunities(prev => {
   695→          const otherOpps = prev.filter(o => o.stage !== sourceStage);
   696→          const updatedOpps = reordered.map((opp, index) => ({
   697→            ...opp,
   698→            position: index
   699→          }));
   700→          return [...updatedOpps, ...otherOpps];
   701→        });
   702→
   703→        try {
   704→          await CRMService.updateOpportunityPositions(positionUpdates);
   705→        } catch (error) {
   706→          console.error('Error updating positions:', error);
   707→          const freshData = await CRMService.getAllOpportunities();
   708→          setOpportunities(freshData);
   709→        }
   710→      } else {
   711→        // Different stage - move to target stage at target position
   712→        // If moving to qualified, show convert dialog
   713→        if (targetStage === 'qualified' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   714→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   715→          setOpportunityToConvert({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'qualified' });
   716→          setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   717→          return;
   718→        }
   719→
   720→        // If moving to closed_won, show convert to account dialog
   721→        if (targetStage === 'closed_won' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(draggedOpp.stage)) {
   722→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   723→          setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   724→          setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   725→          return;
   726→        }
   727→
   728→        await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   729→      }
   730→    }
   731→  };
   732→
   733→  const handleOpenContactLink = async (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   734→    setLinkingOpportunity(opp);
   735→    setSelectedContactId('');
   736→    setContactRole('');
   737→    setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   738→    try {
   739→      const links = await CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(opp.id);
   740→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   741→    } catch (error) {
   742→      console.error('Error fetching contacts:', error);
   743→      setOpportunityContacts([]);
   744→    }
   745→    setIsContactLinkOpen(true);
   746→  };
   747→
   748→  const handleLinkContact = async () => {
   749→    if (!linkingOpportunity || !selectedContactId) return;
   750→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   751→    try {
   752→      await CRMService.linkContactToOpportunity(
   753→        selectedContactId,
   754→        linkingOpportunity.id,
   755→        contactRole || undefined,
   756→        isPrimaryContact
   757→      );
   758→      const links = await CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id);
   759→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   760→      setSelectedContactId('');
   761→      setContactRole('');
   762→      setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   763→    } catch (error) {
   764→      console.error('Error linking contact:', error);
   765→    } finally {
   766→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   767→    }
   768→  };
   769→
   770→  const handleUnlinkContact = async (linkId: string) => {
   771→    if (!linkingOpportunity) return;
   772→    try {
   773→      await CRMService.unlinkContact(linkId);
   774→      const links = await CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id);
   775→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   776→    } catch (error) {
   777→      console.error('Error unlinking contact:', error);
   778→    }
   779→  };
   780→
   781→  const handleCreateAndLinkContact = async () => {
   782→    if (!linkingOpportunity || !newContactForm.name.trim()) return;
   783→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   784→    try {
   785→      // Create the new contact
   786→      const newContact = await CRMService.createContact({
   787→        ...newContactForm,
   788→        owner_id: user?.id
   789→      });
   790→
   791→      // Link the new contact to the opportunity
   792→      await CRMService.linkContactToOpportunity(
   793→        newContact.id,
   794→        linkingOpportunity.id,
   795→        contactRole || undefined,
   796→        isPrimaryContact
   797→      );
   798→
   799→      // Refresh contacts list
   800→      const [allConts, links] = await Promise.all([
   801→        CRMService.getAllContacts(),
   802→        CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id)
   803→      ]);
   804→      setContacts(allConts);
   805→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   806→
   807→      // Reset form
   808→      setNewContactForm({ name: '' });
   809→      setContactRole('');
   810→      setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   811→      setContactMode('link');
   812→    } catch (error) {
   813→      console.error('Error creating and linking contact:', error);
   814→    } finally {
   815→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   816→    }
   817→  };
   818→
   819→  const handleOpenHistory = async (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   820→    setHistoryOpportunity(opp);
   821→    try {
   822→      const history = await CRMService.getStageHistory('opportunity', opp.id);
   823→      setStageHistory(history);
   824→    } catch (error) {
   825→      console.error('Error fetching history:', error);
   826→      setStageHistory([]);
   827→    }
   828→    setIsHistoryOpen(true);
   829→  };
   830→
   831→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities
   832→    .filter(o => {
   833→      // Search filter
   834→      if (searchTerm && !o.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) {
   835→        return false;
   836→      }
   837→      // Source filter
   838→      if (filterSource !== 'all' && o.source !== filterSource) {
   839→        return false;
   840→      }
   841→      // Account type filter
   842→      if (filterAccountType !== 'all' && o.account_type !== filterAccountType) {
   843→        return false;
   844→      }
   845→      // Affiliate filter
   846→      if (filterAffiliate !== 'all' && o.affiliate_id !== filterAffiliate) {
   847→        return false;
   848→      }
   849→      return true;
   850→    })
   851→    .sort((a, b) => {
   852→      switch (sortBy) {
   853→        case 'position':
   854→          return (a.position || 0) - (b.position || 0);
   855→        case 'created_desc':
   856→          return new Date(b.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.created_at).getTime();
   857→        case 'created_asc':
   858→          return new Date(a.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.created_at).getTime();
   859→        case 'name_asc':
   860→          return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
   861→        case 'name_desc':
   862→          return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
   863→        case 'value_desc':
   864→          return (b.deal_value || 0) - (a.deal_value || 0);
   865→        case 'value_asc':
   866→          return (a.deal_value || 0) - (b.deal_value || 0);
   867→        default:
   868→          // Default to position-based ordering
   869→          return (a.position || 0) - (b.position || 0);
   870→      }
   871→    });
   872→
   873→  const getOpportunitiesByStage = (stage: OpportunityStage) =>
   874→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   875→
   876→  // Check if any filters are active
   877→  const hasActiveFilters = filterSource !== 'all' || filterAccountType !== 'all' || filterAffiliate !== 'all';
   878→
   879→  // Clear all filters
   880→  const clearFilters = () => {
   881→    setFilterSource('all');
   882→    setFilterAccountType('all');
   883→    setFilterAffiliate('all');
   884→    setSearchTerm('');
   885→  };
   886→
   887→  // Mark opportunity as contacted
   888→  const handleMarkContacted = async (oppId: string) => {
   889→    try {
   890→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(oppId, {
   891→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString()
   892→      });
   893→      // Optimistic update
   894→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   895→        prev.map(o => o.id === oppId ? { ...o, last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString() } : o)
   896→      );
   897→    } catch (error) {
   898→      console.error('Error updating last contacted:', error);
   899→    }
   900→  };
   901→
   902→  // Count outreach: new stage with cold_outreach source
   903→  const totalOutreach = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'new' && o.source === 'cold_outreach').length;
   904→  // Count leads: lead stages excluding cold_outreach new leads
   905→  const totalLeads = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => {
   906→    if (o.stage === 'new' && o.source === 'cold_outreach') return false;
   907→    return leadStages.includes(o.stage);
   908→  }).length;
   909→  const totalDeals = dealStages.reduce((sum, stage) => sum + getOpportunitiesByStage(stage).length, 0);
   910→  const totalAccounts = accountStages.reduce((sum, stage) => sum + getOpportunitiesByStage(stage).length, 0);
   911→  const totalDealValue = filteredOpportunities
   912→    .filter(o => dealStages.includes(o.stage))
   913→    .reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   914→
   915→  const formatCurrency = (value: number) => {
   916→    return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
   917→      style: 'currency',
   918→      currency: 'USD',
   919→      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
   920→      maximumFractionDigits: 0
   921→    }).format(value);
   922→  };
   923→
   924→  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
   925→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('en-US', {
   926→      month: 'short',
   927→      day: 'numeric',
   928→      year: 'numeric',
   929→      hour: '2-digit',
   930→      minute: '2-digit'
   931→    });
   932→  };
   933→
   934→  const formatShortDate = (dateString: string) => {
   935→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
   936→      month: 'short',
   937→      day: 'numeric'
   938→    });
   939→  };
   940→
   941→  const formatSource = (source: string) => {
   942→    return source
   943→      .split('_')
   944→      .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1))
   945→      .join(' ');
   946→  };
   947→
   948→  const getNextStage = (currentStage: OpportunityStage): OpportunityStage | null => {
   949→    const leadIndex = leadStages.indexOf(currentStage);
   950→    const dealIndex = dealStages.indexOf(currentStage);
   951→
   952→    if (leadIndex >= 0 && leadIndex < leadStages.length - 1) {
   953→      return leadStages[leadIndex + 1];
   954→    }
   955→    if (dealIndex >= 0 && dealIndex < dealStages.length - 1) {
   956→      return dealStages[dealIndex + 1];
   957→    }
   958→    return null;
   959→  };
   960→
   961→  // Get linked contacts for an opportunity
   962→  const getOpportunityContacts = (oppId: string) => {
   963→    return allContactLinks.filter(link => link.opportunity_id === oppId);
   964→  };
   965→
   966→  // Get primary contact for an opportunity
   967→  const getPrimaryContact = (oppId: string) => {
   968→    const links = getOpportunityContacts(oppId);
   969→    return links.find(l => l.is_primary)?.contact || links[0]?.contact || null;
   970→  };
   971→
   972→  // Get current stages based on active tab
   973→  const currentStages = (() => {
   974→    switch (activeTab) {
   975→      case 'outreach': return outreachStages;
   976→      case 'leads': return leadStages;
   977→      case 'deals': return dealStages;
   978→      case 'accounts': return accountStages;
   979→      default: return leadStages;
   980→    }
   981→  })();
   982→
   983→  // Get current view mode based on active tab
   984→  const currentViewMode = (() => {
   985→    switch (activeTab) {
   986→      case 'outreach': return outreachViewMode;
   987→      case 'leads': return leadsViewMode;
   988→      case 'deals': return dealsViewMode;
   989→      case 'accounts': return accountsViewMode;
   990→      default: return leadsViewMode;
   991→    }
   992→  })();
   993→
   994→  const setCurrentViewMode = (mode: 'kanban' | 'table') => {
   995→    switch (activeTab) {
   996→      case 'outreach': setOutreachViewMode(mode); break;
   997→      case 'leads': setLeadsViewMode(mode); break;
   998→      case 'deals': setDealsViewMode(mode); break;
   999→      case 'accounts': setAccountsViewMode(mode); break;
  1000→    }
```
