```text
  1022→  const renderOpportunityCardContent = (opp: CRMOpportunity, isDeal: boolean = false, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
  1023→    const colors = stageColors[opp.stage] || stageColors.new;
  1024→
  1025→    return (
  1026→      <Card
  1027→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''}`}
  1028→      >
  1029→        <CardContent className="p-4">
  1030→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1031→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1032→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
  1033→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1034→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
  1035→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1036→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
  1037→              </div>
  1038→
  1039→              {/* Deal Value */}
  1040→              {isDeal && opp.deal_value && (
  1041→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
  1042→                  {formatCurrency(opp.deal_value)}
  1043→                </p>
  1044→              )}
  1045→
  1046→              {/* Badges: Source, Account Type, Affiliate */}
  1047→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
  1048→                {opp.source && (
  1049→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
  1050→                    {formatSource(opp.source)}
  1051→                  </Badge>
  1052→                )}
  1053→                {opp.account_type && (
  1054→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
  1055→                    {formatSource(opp.account_type)}
  1056→                  </Badge>
  1057→                )}
  1058→                {opp.affiliate && (
  1059→                  <Badge
  1060→                    className="text-xs"
  1061→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  1062→                  >
  1063→                    {opp.affiliate.name}
  1064→                  </Badge>
  1065→                )}
  1066→              </div>
  1067→
  1068→              {/* Details: Referrer, Group Chat, Notes */}
  1069→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
  1070→                {opp.referrer && (
  1071→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1072→                    <Users className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1073→                    <span>Referred by: {opp.referrer}</span>
  1074→                  </div>
  1075→                )}
  1076→                {opp.gc && (
  1077→                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
  1078→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1079→                      <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" />
  1080→                      <span className="font-medium">TG Connected</span>
  1081→                    </div>
  1082→                    <div className="ml-4 text-xs space-y-0.5">
  1083→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1084→                        <span>Lead:</span>
  1085→                        <span className={opp.last_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1086→                          {opp.last_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_message_at) : '-'}
  1087→                        </span>
  1088→                      </div>
  1089→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1090→                        <span>Team:</span>
  1091→                        <span className={opp.last_team_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1092→                          {opp.last_team_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_team_message_at) : '-'}
  1093→                        </span>
  1094→                      </div>
  1095→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1096→                        <span>Bot:</span>
  1097→                        <span className={opp.last_reply_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1098→                          {opp.last_reply_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_reply_at) : '-'}
  1099→                        </span>
  1100→                      </div>
  1101→                    </div>
  1102→                  </div>
  1103→                )}
  1104→                {opp.notes && (
  1105→                  <div className="flex items-start gap-1.5">
  1106→                    <Edit className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
  1107→                    <span className="line-clamp-2">{opp.notes}</span>
  1108→                  </div>
  1109→                )}
  1110→              </div>
  1111→
  1112→              {/* Linked Contacts */}
  1113→              {(() => {
  1114→                const oppContacts = getOpportunityContacts(opp.id);
  1115→                if (oppContacts.length === 0) return null;
  1116→                const primaryContact = oppContacts.find(l => l.is_primary)?.contact || oppContacts[0]?.contact;
  1117→                return (
  1118→                  <div className="mt-3 pt-2 border-t border-gray-100">
  1119→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
  1120→                      <Users className="h-3 w-3 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0" />
  1121→                      <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{primaryContact?.name}</span>
  1122→                      {oppContacts.length > 1 && (
  1123→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0">
  1124→                          +{oppContacts.length - 1}
  1125→                        </Badge>
  1126→                      )}
  1127→                    </div>
  1128→                    {primaryContact?.email && (
  1129→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 ml-5">
  1130→                        <Mail className="h-3 w-3" />
  1131→                        <span className="truncate">{primaryContact.email}</span>
  1132→                      </div>
  1133→                    )}
  1134→                    {primaryContact?.telegram_id && !primaryContact?.email && (
  1135→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 ml-5">
  1136→                        <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3" />
  1137→                        <span>@{primaryContact.telegram_id}</span>
  1138→                      </div>
  1139→                    )}
  1140→                  </div>
  1141→                );
  1142→              })()}
  1143→
  1144→            </div>
  1145→
  1146→            {!isDragging && renderActionMenu(opp)}
  1147→          </div>
  1148→        </CardContent>
  1149→      </Card>
  1150→    );
  1151→  };
  1152→
  1153→  // ============================================
  1154→  // RENDER: Draggable Opportunity Card
  1155→  // ============================================
  1156→  const DraggableCard = ({ opp, isDeal }: { opp: CRMOpportunity; isDeal: boolean }) => {
  1157→    const {
  1158→      attributes,
  1159→      listeners,
  1160→      setNodeRef,
  1161→      transform,
  1162→      transition,
  1163→      isDragging,
  1164→    } = useSortable({ id: opp.id });
  1165→
  1166→    const style = {
  1167→      transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
  1168→      transition,
  1169→      opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
  1170→    };
  1171→
  1172→    return (
  1173→      <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
  1174→        {renderOpportunityCardContent(opp, isDeal, isDragging)}
  1175→      </div>
  1176→    );
  1177→  };
  1178→
  1179→  // ============================================
  1180→  // RENDER: Action Menu (shared across views)
  1181→  // ============================================
  1182→  const renderActionMenu = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => (
  1183→    <DropdownMenu>
  1184→      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  1185→        <Button
  1186→          variant="ghost"
  1187→          size="sm"
  1188→          className="h-8 w-8 p-0"
  1189→        >
  1190→          <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  1191→        </Button>
  1192→      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  1193→      <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
  1194→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleEditOpportunity(opp)}>
  1195→          <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1196→          Edit
  1197→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1198→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenContactLink(opp)}>
  1199→          <Users className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1200→          Manage Contacts
  1201→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1202→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenHistory(opp)}>
  1203→          <History className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1204→          View History
  1205→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1206→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMarkContacted(opp.id)}>
  1207→          <Phone className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1208→          Mark as Contacted
  1209→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1210→        {getNextStage(opp.stage) && (
  1211→          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, getNextStage(opp.stage)!)}>
  1212→            <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1213→            Move to {stageLabels[getNextStage(opp.stage)!]}
  1214→          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1215→        )}
  1216→        {opp.stage === 'contract' && (
  1217→          <>
  1218→            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, 'closed_won')}>
  1219→              <Award className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-emerald-600" />
  1220→              Mark as Won
  1221→            </DropdownMenuItem>
  1222→            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, 'closed_lost')}>
  1223→              <X className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-red-600" />
  1224→              Mark as Lost
  1225→            </DropdownMenuItem>
  1226→          </>
  1227→        )}
  1228→        <DropdownMenuItem
  1229→          className="text-red-600"
  1230→          onClick={() => handleDeleteOpportunity(opp)}
  1231→        >
  1232→          <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1233→          Delete
  1234→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1235→      </DropdownMenuContent>
  1236→    </DropdownMenu>
  1237→  );
  1238→
  1239→  // ============================================
  1240→  // RENDER: Droppable Kanban Column
  1241→  // ============================================
  1242→  const DroppableColumn = ({ stage, isDeal }: { stage: OpportunityStage; isDeal: boolean }) => {
  1243→    const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id: stage });
  1244→    const opps = getOpportunitiesByStage(stage);
  1245→    const colors = stageColors[stage];
  1246→    const stageValue = isDeal
  1247→      ? opps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0)
  1248→      : null;
  1249→    const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
  1250→
  1251→    return (
  1252→      <div
  1253→        key={stage}
  1254→        className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
  1255→      >
  1256→        {/* Column Header */}
  1257→        <div
  1258→          className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
  1259→          onClick={() => toggleStageCollapse(stage)}
  1260→        >
  1261→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1262→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1263→              {isCollapsed ? (
  1264→                <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1265→              ) : (
  1266→                <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1267→              )}
  1268→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1269→                <>
  1270→                  <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{stageLabels[stage]}</h4>
  1271→                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
  1272→                    {opps.length}
  1273→                  </Badge>
  1274→                </>
  1275→              )}
  1276→            </div>
  1277→          </div>
  1278→          {!isCollapsed && isDeal && stageValue !== null && stageValue > 0 && (
  1279→            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 mt-1">
  1280→              {formatCurrency(stageValue)}
  1281→            </p>
  1282→          )}
  1283→          {isCollapsed && (
  1284→            <div className="mt-2 flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
  1285→              <span className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`} style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
  1286→                {stageLabels[stage]}
  1287→              </span>
  1288→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">
  1289→                {opps.length}
  1290→              </Badge>
  1291→            </div>
  1292→          )}
  1293→        </div>
  1294→
  1295→        {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
  1296→        {!isCollapsed && (
  1297→          <div
  1298→            ref={setNodeRef}
  1299→            className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors ${
  1300→              isOver ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-300' : ''
  1301→            }`}
  1302→          >
  1303→            <SortableContext items={opps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1304→              {opps.length === 0 ? (
  1305→                <div className={`flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm ${isOver ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
  1306→                  {isOver ? 'Drop here' : 'No opportunities'}
  1307→                </div>
  1308→              ) : (
  1309→                opps.map((opp) => (
  1310→                  <DraggableCard key={opp.id} opp={opp} isDeal={isDeal} />
  1311→                ))
  1312→              )}
  1313→            </SortableContext>
  1314→          </div>
  1315→        )}
  1316→      </div>
  1317→    );
  1318→  };
  1319→
  1320→  // ============================================
  1321→  // RENDER: Table View
  1322→  // ============================================
  1323→  const renderTableView = () => {
  1324→    const isDeal = activeTab === 'deals' || activeTab === 'accounts';
  1325→    const isAccount = activeTab === 'accounts';
  1326→    const isOutreach = activeTab === 'outreach';
  1327→    const currentStages = isAccount ? accountStages : isDeal ? dealStages : isOutreach ? outreachStages : leadStages;
  1328→
  1329→    const renderEditableText = (opp: CRMOpportunity, field: string, value: string | null | undefined, className?: string) => {
  1330→      const isEditing = editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === field;
  1331→
  1332→      if (isEditing) {
  1333→        return (
  1334→          <Input
  1335→            value={editingValue}
  1336→            onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1337→            onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, field, editingValue)}
  1338→            onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, field)}
  1339→            className="h-8 text-sm auth-input"
  1340→            autoFocus
  1341→          />
  1342→        );
  1343→      }
  1344→
  1345→      return (
  1346→        <div
  1347→          onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, field, value)}
  1348→          className={`cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1 min-h-[28px] flex items-center ${className || ''}`}
  1349→        >
  1350→          {value || <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>}
  1351→        </div>
  1352→      );
  1353→    };
  1354→
  1355→    const renderEditableNumber = (opp: CRMOpportunity, field: string, value: number | null | undefined) => {
  1356→      const isEditing = editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === field;
  1357→
  1358→      if (isEditing) {
  1359→        return (
  1360→          <Input
  1361→            type="number"
  1362→            value={editingValue}
  1363→            onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1364→            onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, field, parseFloat(editingValue) || null)}
  1365→            onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, field)}
  1366→            className="h-8 text-sm text-right auth-input"
  1367→            autoFocus
  1368→          />
  1369→        );
  1370→      }
  1371→
  1372→      return (
  1373→        <div
  1374→          onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, field, value)}
  1375→          className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1 min-h-[28px] flex items-center justify-end"
  1376→        >
  1377→          {value ? (
  1378→            <span className="font-semibold text-emerald-600">{formatCurrency(value)}</span>
  1379→          ) : (
  1380→            <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
  1381→          )}
  1382→        </div>
  1383→      );
  1384→    };
  1385→
  1386→    // Draggable table row component
  1387→    const DraggableTableRow = ({ opp, index }: { opp: CRMOpportunity; index: number }) => {
  1388→      const {
  1389→        attributes,
  1390→        listeners,
  1391→        setNodeRef,
  1392→        transform,
  1393→        transition,
  1394→        isDragging,
  1395→      } = useSortable({ id: opp.id });
  1396→
  1397→      const style: React.CSSProperties = {
  1398→        transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
  1399→        transition,
  1400→        opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
  1401→        position: 'relative' as const,
  1402→        zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
  1403→      };
  1404→
  1405→      return (
  1406→        <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`}>
  1407→          <TableCell className="w-10">
  1408→            <div
  1409→              {...attributes}
  1410→              {...listeners}
  1411→              className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
  1412→            >
  1413→              <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1414→            </div>
  1415→          </TableCell>
  1416→          <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm w-10">
  1417→            {(() => {
  1418→              const isChecked = selectedOpportunities.includes(opp.id);
  1419→              return (
  1420→                <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
  1421→                  {isChecked ? (
  1422→                    <Checkbox
  1423→                      checked={true}
  1424→                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
  1425→                        if (checked) {
  1426→                          setSelectedOpportunities(prev => [...prev, opp.id]);
  1427→                        } else {
  1428→                          setSelectedOpportunities(prev => prev.filter(id => id !== opp.id));
  1429→                        }
  1430→                      }}
  1431→                    />
  1432→                  ) : (
  1433→                    <>
  1434→                      <span className="block group-hover:hidden">{index + 1}</span>
  1435→                      <span className="hidden group-hover:flex">
  1436→                        <Checkbox
  1437→                          checked={false}
  1438→                          onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
  1439→                            if (checked) {
  1440→                              setSelectedOpportunities(prev => [...prev, opp.id]);
  1441→                            }
  1442→                          }}
  1443→                        />
  1444→                      </span>
  1445→                    </>
  1446→                  )}
  1447→                </div>
  1448→              );
  1449→            })()}
  1450→          </TableCell>
  1451→          <TableCell>
  1452→            {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === 'name' ? (
  1453→              <Input
  1454→                value={editingValue}
  1455→                onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1456→                onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
  1457→                onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, 'name')}
  1458→                className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
  1459→                autoFocus
  1460→              />
  1461→            ) : (
  1462→              <div
  1463→                onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, 'name', opp.name)}
  1464→                className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1"
  1465→              >
  1466→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1467→                <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  1468→              </div>
  1469→            )}
  1470→          </TableCell>
  1471→          <TableCell>
  1472→            <Select
  1473→              value={opp.stage}
  1474→              onValueChange={(v) => handleMoveStage(opp, v as OpportunityStage)}
  1475→            >
  1476→              <SelectTrigger className={`w-32 h-8 ${stageColors[opp.stage].bg} ${stageColors[opp.stage].text} border-none text-xs font-medium`}>
  1477→                <SelectValue />
  1478→              </SelectTrigger>
  1479→              <SelectContent>
  1480→                {currentStages.map((stage) => (
  1481→                  <SelectItem key={stage} value={stage}>
  1482→                    {stageLabels[stage]}
  1483→                  </SelectItem>
  1484→                ))}
  1485→              </SelectContent>
  1486→            </Select>
  1487→          </TableCell>
  1488→          <TableCell>
  1489→            <Select
  1490→              value={opp.owner_id || 'none'}
  1491→              onValueChange={(v) => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'owner_id', v === 'none' ? null : v)}
  1492→            >
  1493→              <SelectTrigger className="w-32 h-8 text-xs auth-input">
  1494→                <SelectValue placeholder="Select">
  1495→                  {opp.owner_id ? (users.find(u => u.id === opp.owner_id)?.name || users.find(u => u.id === opp.owner_id)?.email || '-') : <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>}
  1496→                </SelectValue>
  1497→              </SelectTrigger>
  1498→              <SelectContent>
  1499→                <SelectItem value="none">None</SelectItem>
  1500→                {users.map((u) => (
  1501→                  <SelectItem key={u.id} value={u.id}>
  1502→                    {u.name || u.email}
  1503→                  </SelectItem>
  1504→                ))}
  1505→              </SelectContent>
  1506→            </Select>
  1507→          </TableCell>
  1508→          {isDeal && (
  1509→            <TableCell>
  1510→              <Select
  1511→                value={opp.account_type || 'none'}
  1512→                onValueChange={(v) => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'account_type', v === 'none' ? null : v)}
  1513→              >
  1514→                <SelectTrigger className="w-28 h-8 text-xs auth-input">
  1515→                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select">
  1516→                    {opp.account_type ? formatSource(opp.account_type) : <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>}
  1517→                  </SelectValue>
  1518→                </SelectTrigger>
  1519→                <SelectContent>
  1520→                  <SelectItem value="none">None</SelectItem>
  1521→                  {accountTypeOptions.map((type) => (
  1522→                    <SelectItem key={type} value={type}>
  1523→                      {formatSource(type)}
  1524→                    </SelectItem>
  1525→                  ))}
  1526→                </SelectContent>
  1527→              </Select>
  1528→            </TableCell>
  1529→          )}
  1530→          <TableCell>
  1531→            <Select
  1532→              value={opp.source || 'none'}
  1533→              onValueChange={(v) => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'source', v === 'none' ? null : v)}
  1534→            >
  1535→              <SelectTrigger className="w-32 h-8 text-xs auth-input">
  1536→                <SelectValue placeholder="Select">
  1537→                  {opp.source ? formatSource(opp.source) : <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>}
  1538→                </SelectValue>
  1539→              </SelectTrigger>
  1540→              <SelectContent>
  1541→                <SelectItem value="none">None</SelectItem>
  1542→                {sourceOptions.map((source) => (
  1543→                  <SelectItem key={source} value={source}>
  1544→                    {formatSource(source)}
  1545→                  </SelectItem>
  1546→                ))}
  1547→              </SelectContent>
  1548→            </Select>
  1549→          </TableCell>
  1550→          <TableCell>
  1551→            <Popover open={affiliatePopoverOpen === opp.id} onOpenChange={(open) => setAffiliatePopoverOpen(open ? opp.id : null)}>
  1552→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  1553→                <Button
  1554→                  variant="outline"
  1555→                  role="combobox"
  1556→                  aria-expanded={affiliatePopoverOpen === opp.id}
  1557→                  className="w-32 h-8 justify-between text-xs auth-input"
  1558→                >
  1559→                  {opp.affiliate ? (
  1560→                    <Badge className="text-xs truncate" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>
  1561→                      {opp.affiliate.name}
  1562→                    </Badge>
  1563→                  ) : (
  1564→                    <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
  1565→                  )}
  1566→                  <ChevronsUpDown className="ml-1 h-3 w-3 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
  1567→                </Button>
  1568→              </PopoverTrigger>
  1569→              <PopoverContent className="w-48 p-0" align="start">
  1570→                <Command>
  1571→                  <CommandInput placeholder="Search affiliate..." className="h-9" />
  1572→                  <CommandList>
  1573→                    <CommandEmpty>No affiliate found.</CommandEmpty>
  1574→                    <CommandGroup>
  1575→                      <CommandItem
  1576→                        value="none"
  1577→                        onSelect={() => {
  1578→                          handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'affiliate_id', null);
  1579→                          setAffiliatePopoverOpen(null);
  1580→                        }}
  1581→                      >
  1582→                        <Check className={`mr-2 h-4 w-4 ${!opp.affiliate_id ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`} />
  1583→                        None
  1584→                      </CommandItem>
  1585→                      {affiliates.map((aff) => (
  1586→                        <CommandItem
  1587→                          key={aff.id}
  1588→                          value={aff.name}
  1589→                          onSelect={() => {
  1590→                            handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'affiliate_id', aff.id);
  1591→                            setAffiliatePopoverOpen(null);
  1592→                          }}
  1593→                        >
  1594→                          <Check className={`mr-2 h-4 w-4 ${opp.affiliate_id === aff.id ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`} />
  1595→                          {aff.name}
  1596→                        </CommandItem>
  1597→                      ))}
  1598→                    </CommandGroup>
  1599→                  </CommandList>
  1600→                </Command>
  1601→              </PopoverContent>
  1602→            </Popover>
  1603→          </TableCell>
  1604→          {isAccount && (
  1605→            <TableCell>
  1606→              <Select
  1607→                value={opp.client_id || 'none'}
  1608→                onValueChange={(v) => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'client_id', v === 'none' ? null : v)}
  1609→              >
  1610→                <SelectTrigger className="w-32 h-8 text-xs auth-input">
  1611→                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select">
  1612→                    {opp.client ? (
  1613→                      <span className="truncate">{opp.client.name}</span>
  1614→                    ) : (
  1615→                      <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
  1616→                    )}
  1617→                  </SelectValue>
  1618→                </SelectTrigger>
  1619→                <SelectContent>
  1620→                  <SelectItem value="none">None</SelectItem>
  1621→                  {clients.map((client) => (
  1622→                    <SelectItem key={client.id} value={client.id}>
  1623→                      {client.name}
  1624→                    </SelectItem>
  1625→                  ))}
  1626→                </SelectContent>
  1627→              </Select>
  1628→            </TableCell>
  1629→          )}
  1630→          {isAccount && (
  1631→            <TableCell>
  1632→              <Popover>
  1633→                <PopoverTrigger asChild>
  1634→                  <Button
  1635→                    variant="outline"
  1636→                    className="w-auto min-w-36 h-8 text-xs auth-input justify-between font-normal"
  1637→                  >
  1638→                    <span>
  1639→                      {opp.scope ? (
  1640→                        opp.scope.split(',').map(s => scopeOptions.find(o => o.value === s)?.label || s).join(', ')
  1641→                      ) : (
  1642→                        <span className="text-gray-400">Select scope</span>
  1643→                      )}
  1644→                    </span>
  1645→                  </Button>
  1646→                </PopoverTrigger>
  1647→                <PopoverContent className="w-48 p-2" align="start">
  1648→                  <div className="space-y-2">
  1649→                    {scopeOptions.map((opt) => {
  1650→                      const currentScopes = opp.scope ? opp.scope.split(',') : [];
  1651→                      const isChecked = currentScopes.includes(opt.value);
  1652→                      return (
  1653→                        <div key={opt.value} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
  1654→                          <Checkbox
  1655→                            id={`scope-${opp.id}-${opt.value}`}
  1656→                            checked={isChecked}
  1657→                            onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
  1658→                              let newScopes: string[];
  1659→                              if (checked) {
  1660→                                newScopes = [...currentScopes, opt.value];
  1661→                              } else {
  1662→                                newScopes = currentScopes.filter(s => s !== opt.value);
  1663→                              }
  1664→                              handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'scope', newScopes.length > 0 ? newScopes.join(',') : null);
  1665→                            }}
  1666→                          />
  1667→                          <label
  1668→                            htmlFor={`scope-${opp.id}-${opt.value}`}
  1669→                            className="text-sm cursor-pointer"
  1670→                          >
  1671→                            {opt.label}
  1672→                          </label>
  1673→                        </div>
  1674→                      );
  1675→                    })}
  1676→                  </div>
  1677→                </PopoverContent>
  1678→              </Popover>
  1679→            </TableCell>
  1680→          )}
  1681→          <TableCell>
  1682→            {(() => {
  1683→              const oppContacts = getOpportunityContacts(opp.id);
  1684→              if (oppContacts.length === 0) return <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>;
  1685→              const primaryContact = oppContacts.find(l => l.is_primary)?.contact || oppContacts[0]?.contact;
  1686→              const primaryLink = oppContacts.find(l => l.is_primary) || oppContacts[0];
  1687→              return (
  1688→                <HoverCard>
  1689→                  <HoverCardTrigger asChild>
  1690→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
  1691→                      <div className="flex flex-col">
  1692→                        <span className="text-sm font-medium hover:text-blue-600">{primaryContact?.name}</span>
  1693→                        {primaryContact?.email && (
  1694→                          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">{primaryContact.email}</span>
  1695→                        )}
  1696→                        {primaryContact?.telegram_id && !primaryContact?.email && (
  1697→                          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">@{primaryContact.telegram_id}</span>
  1698→                        )}
  1699→                      </div>
  1700→                      {oppContacts.length > 1 && (
  1701→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0">
  1702→                          +{oppContacts.length - 1}
  1703→                        </Badge>
  1704→                      )}
  1705→                    </div>
  1706→                  </HoverCardTrigger>
  1707→                  <HoverCardContent className="w-72" align="start">
  1708→                    <div className="space-y-3">
  1709→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  1710→                        <div className="p-2 bg-blue-100 rounded-full">
  1711→                          <Users className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
  1712→                        </div>
  1713→                        <div>
  1714→                          <p className="font-medium">{primaryContact?.name}</p>
  1715→                          {primaryLink?.role && (
  1716→                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{primaryLink.role}</p>
  1717→                          )}
  1718→                        </div>
  1719→                      </div>
  1720→                      <div className="space-y-1.5 text-sm">
  1721→                        {primaryContact?.email && (
  1722→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600">
  1723→                            <Mail className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  1724→                            <span>{primaryContact.email}</span>
  1725→                          </div>
  1726→                        )}
  1727→                        {primaryContact?.telegram_id && (
  1728→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600">
  1729→                            <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  1730→                            <span>@{primaryContact.telegram_id}</span>
  1731→                          </div>
  1732→                        )}
  1733→                        {primaryContact?.phone && (
  1734→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600">
  1735→                            <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  1736→                            <span>{primaryContact.phone}</span>
  1737→                          </div>
  1738→                        )}
  1739→                      </div>
  1740→                      {oppContacts.length > 1 && (
  1741→                        <div className="pt-2 border-t">
  1742→                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
  1743→                            +{oppContacts.length - 1} more contact{oppContacts.length > 2 ? 's' : ''}
  1744→                          </p>
  1745→                        </div>
  1746→                      )}
  1747→                    </div>
  1748→                  </HoverCardContent>
  1749→                </HoverCard>
  1750→              );
  1751→            })()}
  1752→          </TableCell>
  1753→          <TableCell>
  1754→            {renderEditableText(opp, 'referrer', opp.referrer, 'text-sm text-gray-600')}
  1755→          </TableCell>
  1756→          {activeTab !== 'accounts' && (
  1757→            <TableCell className="text-sm text-gray-500">
  1758→              {opp.last_contacted_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_contacted_at) : '-'}
  1759→            </TableCell>
  1760→          )}
  1761→          <TableCell>
  1762→            {renderActionMenu(opp)}
  1763→          </TableCell>
  1764→        </TableRow>
  1765→      );
  1766→    };
  1767→
  1768→    // Droppable stage table component
  1769→    const DroppableStageTable = ({ stage }: { stage: OpportunityStage }) => {
  1770→      const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id: stage });
  1771→      const stageOpps = currentOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
  1772→      const colors = stageColors[stage];
  1773→      const stageValue = isDeal ? stageOpps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0) : null;
  1774→      const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
  1775→
  1776→      return (
  1777→        <div key={stage} className="mb-4">
  1778→          {/* Stage Header */}
  1779→          <div
  1780→            className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}
  1781→            onClick={() => toggleStageCollapse(stage)}
  1782→          >
  1783→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  1784→              {isCollapsed ? (
  1785→                <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1786→              ) : (
  1787→                <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1788→              )}
  1789→              <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`} />
  1790→              <h3 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{stageLabels[stage]}</h3>
  1791→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
  1792→                {stageOpps.length}
  1793→              </Badge>
  1794→            </div>
  1795→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  1796→              {isDeal && stageValue !== null && stageValue > 0 && (
  1797→                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
  1798→                  {formatCurrency(stageValue)}
  1799→                </span>
  1800→              )}
  1801→              <Button
  1802→                variant="ghost"
  1803→                size="sm"
  1804→                className={`h-7 px-2 ${colors.text} hover:bg-black/10`}
  1805→                onClick={(e) => {
  1806→                  e.stopPropagation();
  1807→                  handleAddNewRow(stage);
  1808→                }}
  1809→              >
  1810→                <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
  1811→              </Button>
  1812→            </div>
  1813→          </div>
  1814→
  1815→          {/* Stage Table (collapsible) */}
  1816→          {!isCollapsed && (
  1817→            <div
  1818→              ref={setNodeRef}
  1819→              className={`bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 overflow-hidden transition-all ${isOver ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''}`}
  1820→            >
  1821→              <Table>
  1822→                <TableHeader>
  1823→                  <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
  1824→                    <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
  1825→                    <TableHead className="w-10">#</TableHead>
  1826→                    <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
  1827→                    <TableHead>Stage</TableHead>
  1828→                    <TableHead>Owner</TableHead>
  1829→                    {isDeal && <TableHead>Account Type</TableHead>}
  1830→                    <TableHead>Source</TableHead>
  1831→                    <TableHead>Affiliate</TableHead>
  1832→                    {isAccount && <TableHead>Client</TableHead>}
  1833→                    {isAccount && <TableHead>Scope</TableHead>}
  1834→                    <TableHead>Contact</TableHead>
  1835→                    <TableHead>Referrer</TableHead>
  1836→                    {activeTab !== 'accounts' && <TableHead>Last Contacted</TableHead>}
  1837→                    <TableHead className="w-16">Actions</TableHead>
  1838→                  </TableRow>
  1839→                </TableHeader>
  1840→                <TableBody>
  1841→                  {/* New row input */}
  1842→                  {addingToStage === stage && (
  1843→                    <TableRow className="bg-blue-50/50">
  1844→                      <TableCell className="w-10">
  1845→                        <div className="p-1">
  1846→                          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300" />
  1847→                        </div>
  1848→                      </TableCell>
  1849→                      <TableCell className="text-gray-400 text-sm w-10">•</TableCell>
  1850→                      <TableCell>
  1851→                        <Input
  1852→                          value={newRowName}
  1853→                          onChange={(e) => setNewRowName(e.target.value)}
  1854→                          onBlur={handleSaveNewRow}
  1855→                          onKeyDown={handleNewRowKeyDown}
  1856→                          placeholder="Enter opportunity name..."
  1857→                          className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
  1858→                          autoFocus
  1859→                        />
  1860→                      </TableCell>
  1861→                      <TableCell>
  1862→                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${colors.bg} ${colors.text}`}>
  1863→                          {stageLabels[stage]}
  1864→                        </span>
  1865→                      </TableCell>
  1866→                      <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
  1867→                      <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
  1868→                      {isDeal && <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>}
  1869→                      <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
  1870→                      {isAccount && <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>}
  1871→                      {isAccount && <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>}
  1872→                      <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
  1873→                      <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
  1874→                      {activeTab !== 'accounts' && <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>}
  1875→                      <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
  1876→                      <TableCell>
  1877→                        <Button
  1878→                          variant="ghost"
  1879→                          size="sm"
  1880→                          className="h-8 w-8 p-0 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
  1881→                          onClick={() => {
  1882→                            setAddingToStage(null);
  1883→                            setNewRowName('');
  1884→                            restoreScrollPosition();
  1885→                          }}
  1886→                        >
  1887→                          <X className="h-4 w-4" />
  1888→                        </Button>
  1889→                      </TableCell>
  1890→                    </TableRow>
  1891→                  )}
  1892→                  {stageOpps.length === 0 && addingToStage !== stage ? (
  1893→                    <TableRow>
  1894→                      <TableCell colSpan={isAccount ? 14 : isDeal ? 13 : 12} className="text-center py-6 text-gray-400 text-sm">
  1895→                        {isOver ? 'Drop here to move to this stage' : `No ${activeTab} in this stage`}
  1896→                      </TableCell>
  1897→                    </TableRow>
  1898→                  ) : (
  1899→                    <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1900→                      {stageOpps.map((opp, index) => (
  1901→                        <DraggableTableRow key={opp.id} opp={opp} index={index + (addingToStage === stage ? 1 : 0)} />
  1902→                      ))}
  1903→                    </SortableContext>
  1904→                  )}
  1905→                </TableBody>
  1906→              </Table>
  1907→            </div>
  1908→          )}
  1909→        </div>
  1910→      );
  1911→    };
  1912→
  1913→    return (
  1914→      <div className="pb-8">
  1915→        <DndContext
  1916→          sensors={sensors}
  1917→          collisionDetection={closestCenter}
  1918→          onDragStart={handleDragStart}
  1919→          onDragEnd={handleTableRowDragEnd}
  1920→        >
  1921→          {currentStages.map((stage) => (
  1922→            <DroppableStageTable key={stage} stage={stage} />
  1923→          ))}
  1924→          <DragOverlay>
  1925→            {activeOpportunity ? (
  1926→              <div className="bg-white border border-gray-300 shadow-lg rounded px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-3">
  1927→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1928→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1929→                <span className="font-medium">{activeOpportunity.name}</span>
  1930→                <Badge className={`text-xs ${stageColors[activeOpportunity.stage].bg} ${stageColors[activeOpportunity.stage].text}`}>
  1931→                  {stageLabels[activeOpportunity.stage]}
  1932→                </Badge>
  1933→              </div>
  1934→            ) : null}
  1935→          </DragOverlay>
  1936→        </DndContext>
  1937→      </div>
  1938→    );
  1939→  };
  1940→
  1941→  // ============================================
  1942→  // RENDER: Kanban View
  1943→  // ============================================
  1944→  const renderKanbanView = () => (
  1945→    <DndContext
  1946→      sensors={sensors}
  1947→      collisionDetection={closestCenter}
  1948→      onDragStart={handleDragStart}
  1949→      onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}
  1950→    >
  1951→      <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
  1952→        {currentStages.map((stage) => (
  1953→          <DroppableColumn key={stage} stage={stage} isDeal={activeTab === 'deals' || activeTab === 'accounts'} />
  1954→        ))}
  1955→      </div>
  1956→      <DragOverlay>
  1957→        {activeOpportunity ? (
  1958→          <div className="w-[280px]">
  1959→            {renderOpportunityCardContent(activeOpportunity, activeTab === 'deals' || activeTab === 'accounts', true)}
  1960→          </div>
  1961→        ) : null}
  1962→      </DragOverlay>
  1963→    </DndContext>
  1964→  );
  1965→
  1966→  if (loading) {
  1967→    return (
  1968→      <div className="flex flex-col h-full gap-6">
  1969→        {/* Header */}
  1970→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1971→          <div>
  1972→            <Skeleton className="h-8 w-32 mb-2" />
  1973→            <Skeleton className="h-4 w-48" />
  1974→          </div>
  1975→          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
  1976→            <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64 rounded-md" />
  1977→            <Skeleton className="h-10 w-36 rounded-md" />
  1978→          </div>
  1979→        </div>
  1980→
  1981→        {/* Stats Cards */}
  1982→        <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4">
  1983→          {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
  1984→            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />
  1985→          ))}
  1986→        </div>
  1987→
  1988→        {/* Filters */}
  1989→        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  1990→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-20" />
  1991→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-36 rounded-md" />
  1992→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-40 rounded-md" />
  1993→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-36 rounded-md" />
  1994→          <Skeleton className="h-6 w-px" />
  1995→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-16" />
  1996→          <Skeleton className="h-9 w-40 rounded-md" />
  1997→        </div>
  1998→
  1999→        {/* Tabs and Table */}
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./lib/clientService.ts`

```text
     1→import { supabase } from './supabase';
     2→import { Database } from './database.types';
     3→import { generateUniqueSlug } from './slugUtils';
     4→
     5→type Client = Database['public']['Tables']['clients']['Row'];
     6→type ClientAccessMember = Database['public']['Tables']['client_access_members']['Row'];
     7→
     8→export interface ClientWithAccess extends Client {
     9→  member_count?: number;
    10→  campaign_count?: number;
    11→  whitelist_partner_name?: string;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export class ClientService {
    15→  /**
    16→   * Get clients based on user role
    17→   * - Admins: See all clients
    18→   * - Members: See only clients they have access to via client_access_members
    19→   */
    20→  static async getClientsForUser(userRole: 'super_admin' | 'admin' | 'member' | 'client', userId: string): Promise<ClientWithAccess[]> {
    21→    try {
    22→      if (userRole === 'admin' || userRole === 'super_admin') {
    23→        // Admins and super admins can see all non-archived clients
    24→        const { data: clients, error } = await supabase
    25→          .from('clients')
    26→          .select(`
    27→            *,
    28→            client_access_members(count),
    29→            campaigns!campaigns_client_id_fkey(count),
    30→            whitelist_partner:partners!clients_whitelist_partner_id_fkey(name)
    31→          `)
    32→          .is('archived_at', null)
    33→          .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    34→
    35→        if (error) throw error;
    36→
    37→        return clients?.map(client => ({
    38→          ...client,
    39→          member_count: client.client_access_members?.[0]?.count || 0,
    40→          campaign_count: (client as any).campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0,
    41→          whitelist_partner_name: (client.whitelist_partner as any)?.name
    42→        })) || [];
    43→      } else {
    44→        // Members can only see non-archived clients they have access to
    45→        const { data: clientAccess, error } = await supabase
    46→          .from('client_access_members')
    47→          .select(`
    48→            clients!inner(
    49→              id,
    50→              name,
    51→              email,
    52→              location,
    53→              is_active,
    54→              archived_at,
    55→              created_at,
    56→              updated_at,
    57→              logo_url,
    58→              campaigns!campaigns_client_id_fkey(count),
    59→              whitelist_partner:partners!clients_whitelist_partner_id_fkey(name)
    60→            )
    61→          `)
    62→          .eq('user_id', userId);
    63→
    64→        if (error) throw error;
    65→
    66→        return clientAccess?.map(access => {
    67→          const client = (access as any).clients;
    68→          return {
    69→            ...client,
    70→            campaign_count: client.campaigns?.[0]?.count || 0,
    71→            whitelist_partner_name: (client.whitelist_partner as any)?.name
    72→          };
    73→        }).filter(c => c && !c.archived_at) || [];
    74→      }
    75→    } catch (error) {
    76→      console.error('Error fetching clients:', error);
    77→      throw error;
    78→    }
    79→  }
    80→
    81→  /**
    82→   * Get all non-archived clients (admin only)
    83→   */
    84→  static async getAllClients(): Promise<Client[]> {
    85→    try {
    86→      const { data, error } = await supabase
    87→        .from('clients')
    88→        .select('*')
    89→        .is('archived_at', null)
    90→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    91→
    92→      if (error) throw error;
    93→      return data || [];
    94→    } catch (error) {
    95→      console.error('Error fetching all clients:', error);
    96→      throw error;
    97→    }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  /**
   101→   * Create a new client
   102→   */
   103→  static async createClient(
   104→    name: string,
   105→    email: string,
   106→    location?: string,
   107→    source?: string,
   108→    onboarding_call_held?: boolean,
   109→    onboarding_call_date?: string | null,
   110→    is_whitelisted?: boolean,
   111→    whitelist_partner_id?: string | null
   112→  ): Promise<Client> {
   113→    try {
   114→      // Generate a unique slug from the client name
   115→      const slug = generateUniqueSlug(name);
   116→
   117→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   118→        .from('clients')
   119→        .insert({ name, email, location, source, onboarding_call_held, onboarding_call_date, is_whitelisted, whitelist_partner_id, slug })
   120→        .select()
   121→        .single();
   122→      if (error) throw error;
   123→      return data;
   124→    } catch (error) {
   125→      console.error('Error creating client:', error);
   126→      throw error;
   127→    }
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  /**
   131→   * Update client
   132→   */
   133→  static async updateClient(id: string, updates: Partial<Pick<Client, 'name' | 'email' | 'location' | 'is_active' | 'is_whitelisted' | 'whitelist_partner_id' | 'logo_url'>>): Promise<Client> {
   134→    try {
   135→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   136→        .from('clients')
   137→        .update(updates)
   138→        .eq('id', id)
   139→        .select()
   140→        .single();
   141→
   142→      if (error) throw error;
   143→      return data;
   144→    } catch (error) {
   145→      console.error('Error updating client:', error);
   146→      throw error;
   147→    }
   148→  }
   149→
   150→  /**
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-23 12:43:06Z)**_

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive report:

## Codebase Exploration Summary

I've successfully explored the KOL Campaign Manager codebase. Here's the complete analysis:

---

## 1. CRM SERVICE (`/lib/crmService.ts`) - FULL FILE CONTENT

**Key Types:**
- **OpportunityStage**: Union of 13 stages across 3 categories:
  - Lead stages: `new`, `contacted`, `qualified`, `unqualified`, `nurture`, `dead`
  - Deal stages: `deal_qualified`, `proposal`, `negotiation`, `contract`, `closed_won`, `closed_lost`
  - Account stages: `account_active`, `account_at_risk`, `account_churned`

- **CRMOpportunity Interface** (lines 45-73):
  - Core fields: `id`, `name`, `stage`, `account_type`, `deal_value`, `currency`
  - Telegram integration: `gc` (group chat ID), `last_contacted_at`, `last_message_at`, `last_reply_at`, `last_team_message_at`
  - Relations: `affiliate`, `contacts`, `client`, `owner_id`, `source`, `referrer`, `scope`, `notes`, `position`
  - Timestamps: `created_at`, `updated_at`, `qualified_at`, `closed_at`

- **CRMStageHistory Interface** (lines 124-133):
  - Tracks stage transitions: `from_stage`, `to_stage`, `changed_by`, `changed_at`, `notes`

**Key Service Methods:**

*Opportunities:*
- `getAllOpportunities()` - Fetches with affiliate + client joins, ordered by position
- `getOpportunitiesByStage(stages)` - Filter by stage array
- `getOpportunityById(id)`
- `createOpportunity(data)` - Auto-records stage history
- `updateOpportunity(id, updates)` - Sets `qualified_at` and `closed_at` automatically
- `deleteOpportunity(id)`
- `updateOpportunityPositions(positions)` - Batch position updates

*Stage History (lines 657-693):*
- `recordStageHistory(objectType, objectId, fromStage, toStage, notes)` - Non-throwing, logs user ID
- `getStageHistory(objectType, objectId)` - Chronological descending order

*Utility Methods:*
- `getOpportunityStages()` - Returns stages organized by category (lead/deal/account)
- `getOpportunitySources()` - Returns source options
- `getAccountTypes()` - Returns account type options
- `getOpportunityMetrics()` - Returns totalLeads, totalDeals, totalValue, wonValue, conversionRate

*Telegram Integration (lines 836-912):*
- `sendTelegramMessage(opportunityId, message)` - Sends message and updates `last_reply_at`
- `getStaleOpportunities(daysThreshold)` - Opportunities without recent activity

---

## 2. SIDEBAR NAVIGATION (`/components/Sidebar.tsx`) - FULL STRUCTURE

**Layout Pattern:**
- Header with logo, user avatar dropdown, changelog modal
- Collapsible sidebar (toggle stored in localStorage)
- Organized navigation into sections with dividers:

**Navigation Structure:**
1. **Holo GPT** - Top-level AI chat
2. **People Section**
   - Team → `/team`
   - Clients → `/clients`
3. **KOLs Section**
   - KOLs → `/kols`
   - Lists → `/lists`
   - Campaigns → `/campaigns`
4. **CRM Section** (lines 274-344)
   - Pipeline → `/crm/pipeline` (TrendingUp icon)
   - Network → `/crm/network` (Handshake icon)
   - Contacts → `/crm/contacts` (UserPlus icon)
   - TG Chats → `/crm/telegram` (MessageSquare icon, super_admin only)
5. **Workspace Section** (andy@holohive.io only)
   - Daily Stand-Up → `/daily-standup`
   - Tasks → `/tasks`
6. **Documents Section**
   - Delivery Logs → `/delivery-logs`
   - Forms → `/forms` (admin/super_admin)
   - Links → `/links`
   - Templates → `/templates`
   - SOPs → `/sops` (admin/super_admin)
7. **Admin Section**
   - Field Options → `/admin/field-options`
   - Changelog → `/admin/changelog` (super_admin)
   - Archive → `/archive`

**Key Patterns:**
- Button styling: Active routes use `backgroundColor: '#3e8692'` (teal)
- Icons from lucide-react
- Conditional rendering based on `userProfile?.role`
- Collapsed state: sidebar width transitions between `w-16` and `w-64`

---

## 3. PIPELINE PAGE (`/app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx`) - ARCHITECTURAL OVERVIEW

**State Management Structure:**
```
- View Modes: kanban | table (per tab)
- Tabs: outreach | leads | deals | accounts
- DnD: activeId, activeOpportunity
- Edit: editingCell, editingValue
- Forms: isNewOpportunityOpen, opportunityForm, opportunityType
- Contacts: isContactLinkOpen, selectedContactId, opportunityContacts
- History: isHistoryOpen, stageHistory
- Bulk Edit: selectedOpportunities, bulkEdit
- Filtering: filterSource, filterAccountType, filterAffiliate
- Sorting: sortBy (position|created_desc|created_asc|name_asc|name_desc|value_desc|value_asc)
- UI: collapsedStages (Set<OpportunityStage>), addingToStage
```

**Core Features:**

*Kanban View (lines 1944-1964):*
- DndContext with drag/drop handlers
- DroppableColumn components per stage
- Filtered opportunities grouped by stage
- DragOverlay for visual feedback

*Table View (lines 1323-1939):*
- Stage-based tables with collapsible headers
- Inline editing for name, deal_value, owner, source, affiliate, client, scope
- Row-level drag reordering within and across stages
- Add new row functionality with Enter/Escape handlers
- Checkbox selection for bulk operations

*Filtering & Sorting (lines 831-885):*
- Search term (case-insensitive name match)
- Source filter
- Account type filter
- Affiliate filter
- Sort options: position, created, name, deal value
- Active filter state badge

*Stage Transitions (lines 422-498):*
- qualified → qualified (show convert to deal dialog)
- closed_won → account_active (show convert to account dialog)
- Next stage quick action in context menu

*Inline Features:*
- Contact linking with role and primary flag
- Stage history viewer (modal with chronological view)
- Mark as contacted (updates last_contacted_at)
- Bulk delete with confirmation
- Scroll position preservation during state updates

**Tab-Based Filtering:**
- **Outreach**: stage=`new` AND source=`cold_outreach`
- **Leads**: stage IN [new, contacted, qualified, unqualified, nurture, dead] BUT NOT (new + cold_outreach)
- **Deals**: stage IN [deal_qualified, proposal, negotiation, contract, closed_won, closed_lost]
- **Accounts**: stage IN [account_active, account_at_risk, account_churned]

**Color System (lines 300-316):**
```typescript
stageColors: Record<OpportunityStage, { 
  bg: string;      // Light background
  text: string;    // Text color
  border: string;  // Border color
  solid: string;   // Solid badge color
}>
```

**DnD Integration (dnd-kit):**
- Sensors: PointerSensor (8px activation), KeyboardSensor
- Modifiers: restrictToVerticalAxis for table view
- Strategy: verticalListSortingStrategy
- Measurements: closestCenter collision detection

---

## 4. PIPELINE LAYOUT (`/app/crm/pipeline/layout.tsx`)

**Pattern:**
```tsx
export default function PipelineLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <ProtectedRoute>
      <Sidebar>{children}</Sidebar>
    </ProtectedRoute>
  );
}
```

**Route Structure:** `/app/crm/[feature]/layout.tsx` wraps pages with:
- ProtectedRoute authentication guard
- Sidebar wrapper with navigation

---

## 5. APP/CRM ROUTE STRUCTURE

```
/app/crm/
├── pipeline/
│   ├── layout.tsx (ProtectedRoute + Sidebar)
│   └── page.tsx (128KB - Comprehensive pipeline UI)
├── network/
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   └── page.tsx
├── contacts/
│   ├── layout.tsx
│   └── page.tsx
└── telegram/
    ├── layout.tsx
    └── page.tsx
```

All routes use identical layout pattern for consistent auth + nav.

---

## 6. KEY DEPENDENCIES

**DnD Kit (Drag & Drop):**
- `@dnd-kit/core` - ^6.3.1
- `@dnd-kit/sortable` - ^10.0.0
- `@dnd-kit/modifiers` - ^9.0.0
- `@dnd-kit/utilities` - ^3.2.2

**UI Components (Radix UI):**
- Dialog, Select, Popover, Tabs, Dropdown, HoverCard, ScrollArea, Checkbox
- All exposed via `/components/ui/` components

**Icons:**
- `lucide-react` - ^0.446.0 (Building2, Users, MessageSquare, TrendingUp, etc.)

**Database:**
- `@supabase/supabase-js` - ^2.50.5
- `@supabase/ssr` - ^0.7.0

**Forms:**
- `react-hook-form` - ^7.53.0

**Data Utilities:**
- `date-fns` - ^3.6.0
- `nanoid` - ^5.1.6

---

## 7. SERVICE PATTERN

Services are static classes with Supabase integration:
```typescript
export class CRMService {
  static async getAllOpportunities(): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase.from('crm_opportunities').select(...);
    if (error) throw error;
    return data || [];
  }
}
```

**Pattern for Related Data:**
- Uses Supabase `.select()` with foreign key joins (e.g., `affiliate:crm_affiliates(*)`)
- Returns typed interfaces with optional joined relationships
- Error handling: throws on errors (except non-critical logs)

---

## 8. CLIENT SERVICE PATTERN

Example pattern from `/lib/clientService.ts`:
- Role-based access control in queries
- Interface extensions (e.g., `ClientWithAccess` adds computed fields)
- Aggregation: count joins for relationships
- Static factory methods
- Try-catch with console logging

---

This gives you everything you need to build on the existing CRM infrastructure! The patterns are consistent, dnd-kit is fully integrated, and the service layer is well-established.

```text
   195→
   196→// ============================================
   197→// CRM Service Class
   198→// ============================================
   199→
   200→export class CRMService {
   201→  // ----------------------------------------
   202→  // AFFILIATES
   203→  // ----------------------------------------
   204→
   205→  static async getAllAffiliates(): Promise<CRMAffiliate[]> {
   206→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   207→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   208→      .select('*')
   209→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   210→
   211→    if (error) throw error;
   212→    return data || [];
   213→  }
   214→
   215→  static async getAffiliateById(id: string): Promise<CRMAffiliate | null> {
   216→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   217→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   218→      .select('*')
   219→      .eq('id', id)
   220→      .single();
   221→
   222→    if (error) throw error;
   223→    return data;
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  static async createAffiliate(affiliateData: CreateAffiliateData): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   227→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   228→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   229→      .insert([affiliateData])
   230→      .select()
   231→      .single();
   232→
   233→    if (error) throw error;
   234→
   235→    // Record stage history
   236→    await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', data.id, null, affiliateData.status || 'new');
   237→
   238→    return data;
   239→  }
   240→
   241→  static async updateAffiliate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateAffiliateData>): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   242→    // Get current state for stage history
   243→    const current = await this.getAffiliateById(id);
   244→
   245→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   246→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   247→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   248→      .eq('id', id)
   249→      .select()
   250→      .single();
   251→
   252→    if (error) throw error;
   253→
   254→    // Record stage change if status changed
   255→    if (updates.status && current && current.status !== updates.status) {
   256→      await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', id, current.status, updates.status);
   257→    }
   258→
   259→    return data;
   260→  }
   261→
   262→  static async deleteAffiliate(id: string): Promise<void> {
   263→    const { error } = await supabase
   264→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   265→      .delete()
   266→      .eq('id', id);
   267→
   268→    if (error) throw error;
   269→  }

   275→  static async getAllOpportunities(): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   276→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   277→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   278→      .select(`
   279→        *,
   280→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   281→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   282→      `)
   283→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   284→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   285→
   286→    if (error) {
   287→      console.error('Error fetching opportunities:', error);
   288→      throw error;
   289→    }
   290→    return data || [];
   291→  }

   298→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   299→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   300→      `)
   301→      .in('stage', stages)
   302→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   303→
   304→    if (error) throw error;
   305→    return data || [];
   306→  }

   308→  static async getOpportunityById(id: string): Promise<CRMOpportunity | null> {
   309→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   310→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   311→      .select(`
   312→        *,
   313→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   314→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   315→      `)
   316→      .eq('id', id)
   317→      .single();

   319→    if (error) throw error;

   322→
   323→  static async createOpportunity(opportunityData: CreateOpportunityData): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   324→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   325→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   326→      .insert([opportunityData])
   327→      .select()
   328→      .single();
   329→
   330→    if (error) throw error;
   331→
   332→    // Record stage history
   333→    await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', data.id, null, opportunityData.stage || 'new');
   334→
   335→    return data;
   336→  }
   337→
   338→  static async updateOpportunity(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateOpportunityData>): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   339→    // Get current state for stage history
   340→    const current = await this.getOpportunityById(id);
   341→
   342→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   343→
   344→    // Set qualified_at when moving to deal stages
   345→    if (updates.stage && ['proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   346→      if (current && !current.qualified_at && ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'].includes(current.stage)) {
   347→        updateData.qualified_at = new Date().toISOString();
   348→      }
   349→    }
   350→
   351→    // Set closed_at when closing
   352→    if (updates.stage && ['closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   353→      if (current && !current.closed_at) {
   354→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   355→      }
   356→    }
   357→
   358→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   359→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   360→      .update(updateData)
   361→      .eq('id', id)
   362→      .select()
   363→      .single();
   364→
   365→    if (error) throw error;
   366→
   367→    // Record stage change if stage changed
   368→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   369→      await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   370→    }
   371→
   372→    return data;
   373→  }
   374→
   375→  static async deleteOpportunity(id: string): Promise<void> {
   376→    const { error } = await supabase
   377→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   378→      .delete()
   379→      .eq('id', id);
   380→
   381→    if (error) throw error;
   382→  }
   383→
   384→  static async updateOpportunityPositions(positions: { id: string; position: number }[]): Promise<void> {
   385→    // Update each opportunity's position
   386→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position }) =>
   387→      supabase
   388→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   389→        .update({ position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   390→        .eq('id', id)
   391→    );
   392→
   393→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   394→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   395→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   396→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   397→      throw errors[0].error;
   398→    }
   399→  }

   653→  // ----------------------------------------
   654→  // STAGE HISTORY
   655→  // ----------------------------------------
   656→
   657→  static async recordStageHistory(
   658→    objectType: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   659→    objectId: string,
   660→    fromStage: string | null,
   661→    toStage: string,
   662→    notes?: string
   663→  ): Promise<void> {
   664→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   665→
   666→    const { error } = await supabase
   667→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   668→      .insert([{
   669→        object_type: objectType,
   670→        object_id: objectId,
   671→        from_stage: fromStage,
   672→        to_stage: toStage,
   673→        changed_by: user?.id || null,
   674→        notes
   675→      }]);
   676→
   677→    if (error) {
   678→      console.error('Error recording stage history:', error);
   679→      // Don't throw - stage history is non-critical
   680→    }
   681→  }
   682→
   683→  static async getStageHistory(objectType: string, objectId: string): Promise<CRMStageHistory[]> {
   684→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   685→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   686→      .select('*')
   687→      .eq('object_type', objectType)
   688→      .eq('object_id', objectId)
   689→      .order('changed_at', { ascending: false });
   690→
   691→    if (error) throw error;
   692→    return data || [];
   693→  }
   694→
   695→  // ----------------------------------------
   696→  // UTILITY METHODS
   697→  // ----------------------------------------
   698→
   699→  static async updateLastContacted(
   700→    type: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   701→    id: string
   702→  ): Promise<void> {
   703→    const tableName = type === 'opportunity' ? 'crm_opportunities' :
   704→                      type === 'partner' ? 'crm_partners' : 'crm_affiliates';
   705→
   706→    const { error } = await supabase
   707→      .from(tableName)
   708→      .update({
   709→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   710→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   711→      })
   712→      .eq('id', id);
   713→
   714→    if (error) throw error;
   715→  }
   716→

   720→
   721→  static getOpportunityStages() {
   722→    return {
   723→      lead: [
   724→        { value: 'new', label: 'New' },
   725→        { value: 'contacted', label: 'Contacted' },
   726→        { value: 'qualified', label: 'Qualified' },
   727→        { value: 'unqualified', label: 'Unqualified' },
   728→        { value: 'nurture', label: 'Nurture' },
   729→        { value: 'dead', label: 'Dead' }
   730→      ],
   731→      deal: [
   732→        { value: 'deal_qualified', label: 'Qualified' },
   733→        { value: 'proposal', label: 'Proposal' },
   734→        { value: 'negotiation', label: 'Negotiation' },
   735→        { value: 'contract', label: 'Contract' },
   736→        { value: 'closed_won', label: 'Closed Won' },
   737→        { value: 'closed_lost', label: 'Closed Lost' }
   738→      ],
   739→      account: [
   740→        { value: 'account_active', label: 'Active' },
   741→        { value: 'account_at_risk', label: 'At Risk' },
   742→        { value: 'account_churned', label: 'Churned' }
   743→      ]
   744→    };
   745→  }
   746→
   747→  static getAccountTypes() {
   748→    return [
   749→      { value: 'general', label: 'General' },
   750→      { value: 'channel', label: 'Channel' },
   751→      { value: 'campaign', label: 'Campaign' },
   752→      { value: 'lite', label: 'Lite' },
   753→      { value: 'ad_hoc', label: 'Ad Hoc' }
   754→    ];
   755→  }
   756→
   757→  static getOpportunitySources() {

   759→      { value: 'referral', label: 'Referral' },
   760→      { value: 'inbound', label: 'Inbound' },
   761→      { value: 'event', label: 'Event' },
   762→      { value: 'cold_outreach', label: 'Cold Outreach' }
   763→    ];
   764→  }
   765→
   766→  static getPartnerCategories() {
   767→    return [
   768→      { value: 'service_provider', label: 'Service Provider' },
   769→      { value: 'investor_vc', label: 'Investor / VC' },
   770→      { value: 'project', label: 'Project' },
   771→      { value: 'individual', label: 'Individual' }
   772→    ];
```
