   787→    ];
   788→  }
   789→
   790→  // ----------------------------------------
   791→  // ANALYTICS HELPERS
   792→  // ----------------------------------------
   793→
   794→  static async getOpportunityMetrics(): Promise<{
   795→    totalLeads: number;
   796→    totalDeals: number;
   797→    totalValue: number;
   798→    wonValue: number;
   799→    conversionRate: number;
   800→  }> {
   801→    const leadStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture', 'dead'];
   802→    const dealStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['deal_qualified', 'proposal', 'negotiation', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'];
   803→
   804→    const { data: opportunities, error } = await supabase
   805→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   806→      .select('stage, deal_value');
   807→
   808→    if (error) throw error;
   809→
   810→    const leads = opportunities?.filter(o => leadStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   811→    const deals = opportunities?.filter(o => dealStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   812→    const closedWon = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won') || [];
   813→    const closed = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won' || o.stage === 'closed_lost') || [];
   814→
   815→    const totalValue = deals.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   816→    const wonValue = closedWon.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   817→    const conversionRate = closed.length > 0 ? (closedWon.length / closed.length) * 100 : 0;
   818→
   819→    return {
   820→      totalLeads: leads.length,
   821→      totalDeals: deals.length,
   822→      totalValue,
   823→      wonValue,
   824→      conversionRate
   825→    };
   826→  }
   827→
   828→  // ----------------------------------------
   829→  // TELEGRAM INTEGRATION
   830→  // ----------------------------------------
   831→
   832→  /**
   833→   * Send a message to an opportunity's Telegram group chat
   834→   * and update the last_reply_at timestamp
   835→   */
   836→  static async sendTelegramMessage(
   837→    opportunityId: string,
   838→    message: string
   839→  ): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
   840→    // Get the opportunity to find the gc (chat ID)
   841→    const opportunity = await this.getOpportunityById(opportunityId);
   842→    if (!opportunity) {
   843→      return { success: false, error: 'Opportunity not found' };
   844→    }
   845→
   846→    if (!opportunity.gc) {
   847→      return { success: false, error: 'No Telegram group chat ID configured for this opportunity' };
   848→    }
   849→
   850→    // Send message via Telegram API
   851→    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
   852→    if (!botToken) {
   853→      return { success: false, error: 'Telegram bot not configured' };
   854→    }
   855→
   856→    try {
   857→      const response = await fetch(
   858→        `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
   859→        {
   860→          method: 'POST',
   861→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   862→          body: JSON.stringify({
   863→            chat_id: opportunity.gc,
   864→            text: message,
   865→            parse_mode: 'HTML'
   866→          })
   867→        }
   868→      );
   869→
   870→      if (!response.ok) {
   871→        const error = await response.json();
   872→        console.error('[CRM] Telegram send error:', error);
   873→        return { success: false, error: error.description || 'Failed to send message' };
   874→      }
   875→
   876→      // Update last_reply_at
   877→      await supabase
   878→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   879→        .update({
   880→          last_reply_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   881→          updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   882→        })
   883→        .eq('id', opportunityId);
   884→
   885→      return { success: true };
   886→    } catch (error) {
   887→      console.error('[CRM] Error sending Telegram message:', error);
   888→      return { success: false, error: 'Failed to send message' };
   889→    }
   890→  }
   891→
   892→  /**
   893→   * Get opportunities that haven't been contacted recently
   894→   */
   895→  static async getStaleOpportunities(daysThreshold: number = 7): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   896→    const thresholdDate = new Date();
   897→    thresholdDate.setDate(thresholdDate.getDate() - daysThreshold);
   898→
   899→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   900→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   901→      .select(`
   902→        *,
   903→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*)
   904→      `)
   905→      .not('gc', 'is', null)
   906→      .or(`last_message_at.is.null,last_message_at.lt.${thresholdDate.toISOString()}`)
   907→      .not('stage', 'in', '(closed_won,closed_lost,dead,account_churned)')
   908→      .order('last_message_at', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: true });
   909→
   910→    if (error) throw error;
   911→    return data || [];
   912→  }
   913→}
   914→
```
</details></tool-use>

    17→interface SidebarProps {

    19→}
    20→
    21→export default function Sidebar({ children }: SidebarProps) {
    22→  const pathname = usePathname();
    23→  const router = useRouter();
    24→  const { userProfile, signOut } = useAuth();
    25→  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = React.useState(() => {
    26→    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    27→      const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed');
    28→      return stored === 'true';
    29→    }
    30→    return false;
    31→  });
    32→  const [isChangelogOpen, setIsChangelogOpen] = useState(false);
    33→  const [changelogPage, setChangelogPage] = useState(0);
    34→  const changelogsPerPage = 3;
    35→
    36→  // Get changelog data from context (fetched once at app level)
    37→  const { changelogs, latestVersion } = useChangelog();
    38→
    39→  // Format date for changelog display
    40→  const formatChangelogDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    41→    if (!dateString) return '';
    42→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'
    46→    });
    47→  };
    48→
    49→  // Render changelog content
    50→  const renderChangelogContent = (content: string) => {
    51→    return content.split('\n').map((line, index) => {
    52→      if (line.trim().startsWith('- ') || line.trim().startsWith('* ')) {
    53→        return (
    54→          <li key={index} className="ml-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
    55→            {line.trim().substring(2)}
    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }
    59→      if (line.trim().startsWith('### ')) {
    60→        return (
    61→          <h4 key={index} className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-3 mb-1 text-sm">
    62→            {line.trim().substring(4)}
    63→          </h4>
    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {
    67→        return (
    68→          <h3 key={index} className="font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4 mb-2 text-sm">
    69→            {line.trim().substring(3)}
    70→          </h3>
    71→        );
    72→      }
    73→      if (line.trim() === '') {
    74→        return <div key={index} className="h-2" />;
    75→      }
    76→      return (
    77→        <p key={index} className="text-gray-700 text-sm">
    78→          {line}
    79→        </p>
    80→      );
    81→    });
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const handleSidebarToggle = () => {

    97→        .join('')
    98→        .slice(0, 2);

   441→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Links'}

   474→                    </Button>
   475→                  </Link>

   483→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   484→                </div>

   498→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Field Options'}
   499→                    </span>
   500→                  </Button>
   501→                </Link>
   502→                {/* Changelog tab - Super Admin only */}
   503→                {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin' && (
   504→                  <Link href="/admin/changelog" legacyBehavior>
   505→                    <Button
   506→                      asChild
   507→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   508→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   509→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   510→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}
   511→                    >

   513→                        <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   514→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}
   515→                      </span>
   516→                    </Button>
   517→                  </Link>
   518→                )}
   519→                {/* Archive tab */}
   520→                <Link href="/archive" legacyBehavior>
   521→                  <Button
   522→                    asChild
   523→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   524→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   525→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}

   527→                  >

   530→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   531→                    </span>
   532→                  </Button>
   533→                </Link>

   535→
   536→            </nav>
   537→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   538→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   539→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   540→                <Button
   541→                  variant="ghost"
   542→                  size="sm"
   543→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   544→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   545→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   546→                >
   547→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   548→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   549→                  ) : (
   550→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   551→                  )}
   552→                </Button>
   553→              </div>
   554→            </div>
   555→          </div>
   556→        </aside>
   557→        {/* Main Content */}
   558→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   559→      </div>
   560→
   561→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   562→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   563→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   564→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   565→      }}>
   566→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   567→          <DialogHeader>
   568→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   569→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   570→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   571→            </div>
   572→            <DialogDescription>
   573→              Version history and updates
   574→            </DialogDescription>
   575→          </DialogHeader>
   576→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   577→            <div className="space-y-6">
   578→              {changelogs
   579→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   580→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   581→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   582→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   583→                    <Badge
   584→                      variant="secondary"
   585→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   586→                    >
   587→                      v{changelog.version}
   588→                    </Badge>
   589→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   590→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   591→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   592→                      </span>
   593→                    )}
   594→                  </div>
   595→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   596→                    {changelog.title}
   597→                  </h3>
   598→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   599→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   600→                  </div>
   601→                </div>
   602→              ))}
   603→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   604→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   605→                  No changelogs available yet.
   606→                </p>
   607→              )}
   608→            </div>
   609→          </ScrollArea>
   610→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   611→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   612→              <Button
   613→                variant="outline"
   614→                size="sm"
   615→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   616→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   617→              >
   618→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   619→                Previous
   620→              </Button>
   621→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   622→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   623→              </span>
   624→              <Button
   625→                variant="outline"
   626→                size="sm"
   627→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   628→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   629→              >
   630→                Next
   631→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   632→              </Button>
   633→            </div>
   634→          )}
   635→        </DialogContent>
   636→      </Dialog>
   637→    </div>
   638→  );
   639→}
```
</details></tool-use>

```typescript
import { supabase } from './supabase';
import { CRMService, CRMOpportunity, OpportunityStage, CRMAffiliate } from './crmService';

// ============================================
// Sales Pipeline v2 Types
// ============================================

export type SalesPipelineStage =
  | 'cold_dm' | 'warm' | 'tg_intro' | 'booked' | 'discovery_done'
  | 'proposal_sent' | 'proposal_call' | 'v2_contract' | 'v2_closed_won'
  | 'orbit' | 'v2_closed_lost' | 'nurture';

export type Bucket = 'A' | 'B' | 'C';
export type DmAccount = 'closer' | 'sdr' | 'other';
export type WarmSubState = 'interested' | 'silent';
export type CalendlySentVia = 'dm' | 'tg' | 'not_yet';
export type OrbitReason = 'no_budget' | 'bad_timing' | 'no_response' | 'competitor' | 'other';
export type ActivityType = 'call' | 'message' | 'meeting' | 'proposal' | 'note' | 'bump';

export const ORBIT_REASONS: { value: OrbitReason; label: string }[] = [
  { value: 'no_budget', label: 'No Budget' },
  { value: 'bad_timing', label: 'Bad Timing' },
  { value: 'no_response', label: 'No Response' },
  { value: 'competitor', label: 'Went with Competitor' },
  { value: 'other', label: 'Other' },
];

export const PIPELINE_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const PATH_A_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const PATH_B_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
];

export const ALL_V2_STAGES: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
  'cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro', 'booked', 'discovery_done',
  'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract', 'v2_closed_won',
  'orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'nurture',
];

export const STAGE_LABELS: Record<SalesPipelineStage, string> = {
  cold_dm: 'Cold DM',
  warm: 'Warm',
  tg_intro: 'TG Intro',
  booked: 'Booked',
  discovery_done: 'Discovery Done',
  proposal_sent: 'Proposal Sent',
  proposal_call: 'Proposal Call',
  v2_contract: 'Contract',
  v2_closed_won: 'Closed Won',
  orbit: 'Orbit',
  v2_closed_lost: 'Closed Lost',
  nurture: 'Nurture',
};

export const STAGE_COLORS: Record<SalesPipelineStage, { bg: string; text: string; border: string; solid: string }> = {
  cold_dm: { bg: 'bg-sky-50', text: 'text-sky-700', border: 'border-sky-200', solid: 'bg-sky-500' },
  warm: { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200', solid: 'bg-amber-500' },
  tg_intro: { bg: 'bg-violet-50', text: 'text-violet-700', border: 'border-violet-200', solid: 'bg-violet-500' },
  booked: { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200', solid: 'bg-blue-500' },
  discovery_done: { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200', solid: 'bg-indigo-500' },
  proposal_sent: { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200', solid: 'bg-purple-500' },
  proposal_call: { bg: 'bg-fuchsia-50', text: 'text-fuchsia-700', border: 'border-fuchsia-200', solid: 'bg-fuchsia-500' },
  v2_contract: { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200', solid: 'bg-cyan-500' },
  v2_closed_won: { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200', solid: 'bg-emerald-500' },
  orbit: { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200', solid: 'bg-orange-500' },
  v2_closed_lost: { bg: 'bg-red-50', text: 'text-red-700', border: 'border-red-200', solid: 'bg-red-500' },
  nurture: { bg: 'bg-lime-50', text: 'text-lime-700', border: 'border-lime-200', solid: 'bg-lime-500' },
};

export const BUCKET_COLORS: Record<Bucket, { bg: string; text: string }> = {
  A: { bg: 'bg-green-100', text: 'text-green-800' },
  B: { bg: 'bg-amber-100', text: 'text-amber-800' },
  C: { bg: 'bg-gray-100', text: 'text-gray-600' },
};

// ============================================
// Extended Interfaces
// ============================================

export interface SalesPipelineOpportunity extends CRMOpportunity {
  bucket: Bucket | null;
  temperature_score: number;
  dm_account: DmAccount;
  bump_number: number;
  last_bump_date: string | null;
  warm_sub_state: WarmSubState | null;
  tg_handle: string | null;
  calendly_sent_via: CalendlySentVia;
  calendly_sent_date: string | null;
  calendly_booked_date: string | null;
  gc_opened: string;
  orbit_reason: OrbitReason | null;
  closed_lost_reason: string | null;
  dedup_key: string | null;
  next_meeting_at: string | null;
  next_meeting_type: string | null;
  bucket_changed_at: string | null;
  discovery_call_at: string | null;
  proposal_sent_at: string | null;
}

export interface CRMActivity {
  id: string;
  opportunity_id: string;
  type: ActivityType;
  title: string;
  description: string | null;
  outcome: string | null;
  next_step: string | null;
  next_step_date: string | null;
  owner_id: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}

export interface CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData {
  name: string;
  stage?: OpportunityStage;
  dm_account?: DmAccount;
  bucket?: Bucket;
  temperature_score?: number;
  source?: string;
  tg_handle?: string;
  owner_id?: string;
  referrer?: string;
  affiliate_id?: string;
  deal_value?: number;
  currency?: string;
  notes?: string;
  position?: number;
}

export interface CreateActivityData {
  opportunity_id: string;
  type: ActivityType;
  title: string;
  description?: string;
  outcome?: string;
  next_step?: string;
  next_step_date?: string;
}

// ============================================
// Sales Pipeline Service
// ============================================

export class SalesPipelineService {
  // ----------------------------------------
  // OPPORTUNITIES
  // ----------------------------------------

  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .select(`
        *,
        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
      `)
      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
      .order('position', { ascending: true })
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

    if (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
      throw error;
    }
    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
  }

  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
      const { data: existing } = await supabase
        .from('crm_opportunities')
        .select('id')
        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
        .maybeSingle();

      if (existing) {
        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
      }

      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
    }

    const insertData = {
      ...data,
      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
    };

    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .insert([insertData])
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) throw error;

    // Record stage history
    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');

    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
  }

  static async update(
    id: string,
    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
      bump_number?: number;
      last_bump_date?: string | null;
      bucket?: Bucket | null;
      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
      gc_opened?: string;
    }
  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
    // Get current state for stage history
    const { data: current } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .select('*')
      .eq('id', id)
      .single();

    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };

    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
    if (updates.stage && current) {
      if (updates.stage === 'discovery_done' && !current.discovery_call_at) {
        updateData.discovery_call_at = new Date().toISOString();
      }
      if (updates.stage === 'proposal_sent' && !current.proposal_sent_at) {
        updateData.proposal_sent_at = new Date().toISOString();
      }
      if ((updates.stage === 'v2_closed_won' || updates.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') && !current.closed_at) {
        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
      }
    }

    // Auto-set bucket_changed_at
    if (updates.bucket && current && updates.bucket !== current.bucket) {
      updateData.bucket_changed_at = new Date().toISOString();
    }

    const { data: updated, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .update(updateData)
      .eq('id', id)
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) throw error;

    // Record stage change
    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
      await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
    }

    return updated as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
  }

  static async delete(id: string): Promise<void> {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', id);

    if (error) throw error;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------
  // BUMPS
  // ----------------------------------------

  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
    const { data: current } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .select('bump_number')
      .eq('id', id)
      .single();

    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .update({
        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      })
      .eq('id', id)
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) throw error;

    // Also create a bump activity
    await this.createActivity({
      opportunity_id: id,
      type: 'bump',
      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
    });

    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------
  // ACTIVITIES
  // ----------------------------------------

  static async getActivities(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMActivity[]> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_activities')
      .select('*')
      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });

    if (error) throw error;
    return data || [];
  }

  static async createActivity(activityData: CreateActivityData): Promise<CRMActivity> {
    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_activities')
      .insert([{
        ...activityData,
        owner_id: user?.id || null,
      }])
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) throw error;
    return data;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------
  // BAMFAM VIOLATIONS
  // ----------------------------------------

  static async getBAMFAMViolations(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
    // BAMFAM: past discovery_done with no next_meeting or overdue next_meeting
    const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
      'discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
    ];

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .select(`
        *,
        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
      `)
      .in('stage', postDiscoveryStages)
      .or('next_meeting_at.is.null,next_meeting_at.lt.' + new Date().toISOString());

    if (error) throw error;
    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
  }

  // ----------------------------------------
  // STAGES HELPER
  // ----------------------------------------

  static getAvailableStages(dmAccount: DmAccount): SalesPipelineStage[] {
    if (dmAccount === 'closer') return PATH_A_STAGES;
    return PATH_B_STAGES;
  }

  // ----------------------------------------
  // METRICS
  // ----------------------------------------

  static async getMetrics(): Promise<{
    totalCount: number;
    bucketA: number;
    bucketB: number;
    bucketC: number;
    activeValue: number;
    bamfamViolations: number;
  }> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('crm_opportunities')
      .select('stage, bucket, deal_value, next_meeting_at')
      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES);

    if (error) throw error;

    const opps = data || [];
    const activeStages = PIPELINE_STAGES;
    const active = opps.filter(o => activeStages.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));

    const postDiscovery = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    const bamfam = opps.filter(o =>
      postDiscovery.includes(o.stage) &&
      (!o.next_meeting_at || o.next_meeting_at < now)
    );

    return {
      totalCount: opps.length,
      bucketA: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length,
      bucketB: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'B').length,
      bucketC: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'C').length,
      activeValue: active.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0),
      bamfamViolations: bamfam.length,
    };
  }

  // ----------------------------------------
  // POSITION UPDATES
  // ----------------------------------------

  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
      return supabase
        .from('crm_opportunities')
        .update(updateData)
        .eq('id', id);
    });

    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
    if (errors.length > 0) {
      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
      throw errors[0].error;
    }
  }
}

```
