```text
Perfect! I now have all the information needed. Let me compile the complete UI patterns extraction report:

---

## Complete UI Patterns from Pipeline Page (`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx`)

Here are all the exact UI patterns from the pipeline page:

### 1. PAGE HEADER

```jsx
<div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  <div>
    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Pipeline</h2>
    <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your leads and deals</p>
  </div>
  <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
    <div className="relative">
      <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
      <Input
        placeholder="Search opportunities..."
        className="pl-10 w-64 auth-input"
        value={searchTerm}
        onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
      />
    </div>
    <Button
      onClick={() => { /* handler */ }}
      className="hover:opacity-90"
      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
    >
      <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
      Add Opportunity
    </Button>
  </div>
</div>
```

Key patterns:
- Title/subtitle stacked vertically in left
- Search icon positioned absolutely inside input with `left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2`
- Input uses `pl-10` for padding around icon, `w-64`
- Button uses custom color style `#3e8692` with `hover:opacity-90`
- Gap of 4 between search and button

---

### 2. METRICS/STATS CARDS

```jsx
<div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4">
  <Card className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-white border-blue-100">
    <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">Total Leads</p>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{totalLeads}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="p-2.5 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg">
          <UserPlus className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </CardContent>
  </Card>
  {/* Similar pattern for other cards with different colors:
      - Purple for Deals
      - Cyan for Outreach
      - Emerald for Accounts
      - Amber for Win Rate
  */}
</div>
```

Key patterns:
- Grid of 5 equal columns with `gap-4`
- Card uses gradient: `bg-gradient-to-br from-[color]-50 to-white border-[color]-100`
- CardContent uses `pt-5 pb-4`
- Flex layout: text on left, icon box on right
- Icon box: `p-2.5 bg-[color]-100 rounded-lg`
- Label is `text-sm font-medium text-[color]-600`
- Value is `text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900`
- Icon is `h-5 w-5 text-[color]-600`

---

### 3. TABS PATTERN

```jsx
<Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(v) => setActiveTab(v as 'outreach' | 'leads' | 'deals' | 'accounts')}>
  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 flex-shrink-0">
    <TabsList>
      <TabsTrigger value="outreach" className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
        Outreach
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalOutreach}</Badge>
      </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="leads" className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <UserPlus className="h-4 w-4" />
        Leads
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalLeads}</Badge>
      </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="deals" className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <DollarSign className="h-4 w-4" />
        Deals
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalDeals}</Badge>
      </TabsTrigger>
      <TabsTrigger value="accounts" className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Building2 className="h-4 w-4" />
        Accounts
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalAccounts}</Badge>
      </TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>

    {/* View Toggle */}
    <div className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-muted p-1 text-muted-foreground">
      <div
        onClick={() => setCurrentViewMode('table')}
        className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 cursor-pointer ${currentViewMode === 'table' ? 'bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm' : ''}`}
      >
        <TableIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Table
      </div>
      <div
        onClick={() => setCurrentViewMode('kanban')}
        className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 cursor-pointer ${currentViewMode === 'kanban' ? 'bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm' : ''}`}
      >
        <LayoutGrid className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Kanban
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <TabsContent value="leads" className="mt-0">
    {leadsViewMode === 'kanban' && renderKanbanView()}
    {leadsViewMode === 'table' && renderTableView()}
  </TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

Key patterns:
- Each trigger has icon, label, and badge with count
- Badge uses `ml-1` for margin
- View toggle is styled like native TabsList but as custom divs
- Toggle background: `bg-muted p-1 rounded-md h-10`
- Toggle items: `px-3 py-1.5 rounded-sm` with conditional `bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm`

---

### 4. KANBAN COLUMNS (DroppableColumn)

```jsx
<div
  key={stage}
  className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
>
  {/* Column Header */}
  <div
    className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
    onClick={() => toggleStageCollapse(stage)}
  >
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        {isCollapsed ? (
          <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
        ) : (
          <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
        )}
        {!isCollapsed && (
          <>
            <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{stageLabels[stage]}</h4>
            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
              {opps.length}
            </Badge>
          </>
        )}
      </div>
      {/* Stage value display for deals */}
      {!isCollapsed && isDeal && stageValue !== null && stageValue > 0 && (
        <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 mt-1">
          {formatCurrency(stageValue)}
        </p>
      )}
      {/* Collapsed state - vertical text */}
      {isCollapsed && (
        <div className="mt-2 flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
          <span className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`} style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
            {stageLabels[stage]}
          </span>
          <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">
            {opps.length}
          </Badge>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  </div>

  {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
  {!isCollapsed && (
    <div
      ref={setNodeRef}
      className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors ${
        isOver ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-300' : ''
      }`}
    >
      <SortableContext items={opps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
        {opps.length === 0 ? (
          <div className={`flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm ${isOver ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
            {isOver ? 'Drop here' : 'No opportunities'}
          </div>
        ) : (
          opps.map((opp) => (
            <DraggableCard key={opp.id} opp={opp} isDeal={isDeal} />
          ))
        )}
      </SortableContext>
    </div>
  )}
</div>
```

Key patterns:
- Column width toggles: `w-12` (collapsed) vs `flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]` (expanded)
- Header background/border uses color scheme: `${colors.bg} border ${colors.border}`
- Border-bottom removed when not collapsed: `border-b-0`
- Collapsed state uses CSS `writingMode: 'vertical-rl'` with `textOrientation: 'mixed'`
- Droppable area: `bg-gray-50/50` with hover state `bg-blue-50 border-blue-300`
- Empty state: `h-24` with dynamic text color based on `isOver`

---

### 5. KANBAN CARD (Opportunity Card Content)

```jsx
<Card
  className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''}`}
>
  <CardContent className="p-4">
    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
        {/* Name with drag handle */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
          <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
          <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
        </div>

        {/* Deal Value */}
        {isDeal && opp.deal_value && (
          <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
            {formatCurrency(opp.deal_value)}
          </p>
        )}

        {/* Badges: Source, Account Type, Affiliate */}
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
          {opp.source && (
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
              {formatSource(opp.source)}
            </Badge>
          )}
          {opp.account_type && (
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
              {formatSource(opp.account_type)}
            </Badge>
          )}
          {opp.affiliate && (
            <Badge
              className="text-xs"
              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
            >
              {opp.affiliate.name}
            </Badge>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Details: Referrer, Group Chat, Notes */}
        <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
          {opp.referrer && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <Users className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span>Referred by: {opp.referrer}</span>
            </div>
          )}
          {opp.gc && (
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" />
                <span className="font-medium">TG Connected</span>
              </div>
              <div className="ml-4 text-xs space-y-0.5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
                  <span>Lead:</span>
                  <span className={opp.last_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
                    {opp.last_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_message_at) : '-'}
                  </span>
                </div>
                {/* Team and Bot messages similar */}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
          {opp.notes && (
            <div className="flex items-start gap-1.5">
              <Edit className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <span className="line-clamp-2">{opp.notes}</span>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Linked Contacts */}
        {(() => {
          const oppContacts = getOpportunityContacts(opp.id);
          if (oppContacts.length === 0) return null;
          const primaryContact = oppContacts.find(l => l.is_primary)?.contact || oppContacts[0]?.contact;
          return (
            <div className="mt-3 pt-2 border-t border-gray-100">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
                <Users className="h-3 w-3 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0" />
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{primaryContact?.name}</span>
                {oppContacts.length > 1 && (
                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0">
                    +{oppContacts.length - 1}
                  </Badge>
                )}
              </div>
              {primaryContact?.email && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 ml-5">
                  <Mail className="h-3 w-3" />
                  <span className="truncate">{primaryContact.email}</span>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })()}
      </div>

      {!isDragging && renderActionMenu(opp)}
    </div>
  </CardContent>
</Card>
```

Key patterns:
- Card border: `border-l-4 ${colors.border}` (left accent border with stage color)
- Hover: `hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200`
- Drag state: `shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90`
- Drag handle: `h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing`
- Name: `font-medium text-gray-900 truncate`
- Deal value: `text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2`
- Badges layout: `flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2`
- Details section: `mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500`
- Icons in details: `h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0`
- Contact border separator: `mt-3 pt-2 border-t border-gray-100`
- Action menu hidden during drag: `{!isDragging && renderActionMenu(opp)}`

---

### 6. TABLE VIEW - STRUCTURE & HEADERS

```jsx
const renderTableView = () => {
  // ...
  const DroppableStageTable = ({ stage }: { stage: OpportunityStage }) => {
    const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id: stage });
    const stageOpps = currentOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
    const colors = stageColors[stage];
    const stageValue = isDeal ? stageOpps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0) : null;
    const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);

    return (
      <div key={stage} className="mb-4">
        {/* Stage Header */}
        <div
          className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}
          onClick={() => toggleStageCollapse(stage)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {isCollapsed ? (
              <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
            ) : (
              <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
            )}
            <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`} />
            <h3 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{stageLabels[stage]}</h3>
            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
              {stageOpps.length}
            </Badge>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            {isDeal && stageValue !== null && stageValue > 0 && (
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
                {formatCurrency(stageValue)}
              </span>
            )}
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className={`h-7 px-2 ${colors.text} hover:bg-black/10`}
              onClick={(e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                handleAddNewRow(stage);
              }}
            >
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stage Table (collapsible) */}
        {!isCollapsed && (
          <div
            ref={setNodeRef}
            className={`bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 overflow-hidden transition-all ${isOver ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''}`}
          >
            <Table>
              <TableHeader>
                <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
                  <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
                  <TableHead className="w-10">#</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Stage</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Owner</TableHead>
                  {isDeal && <TableHead>Account Type</TableHead>}
                  <TableHead>Source</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Affiliate</TableHead>
                  {isAccount && <TableHead>Client</TableHead>}
                  {isAccount && <TableHead>Scope</TableHead>}
                  <TableHead>Contact</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Referrer</TableHead>
                  {activeTab !== 'accounts' && <TableHead>Last Contacted</TableHead>}
                  <TableHead className="w-16">Actions</TableHead>
                </TableRow>
              </TableHeader>
              <TableBody>
                {/* Add new row input - see below */}
                {/* Existing rows */}
              </TableBody>
            </Table>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  };
};
```

Key patterns:
- Stage header: `flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3`
- Header uses stage color scheme: `${colors.bg} ${colors.border}`
- Colored dot before stage name: `w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`
- Stage value right-aligned with currency format
- Add button in header: `h-7 px-2 ${colors.text} hover:bg-black/10`
- Table wrapper: `bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0`
- Drop zone highlight: `isOver ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''`
- Header row: `TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50"`
- Action column width: `className="w-16"`

---

### 7. TABLE VIEW - ROW STRUCTURE & INLINE EDITING

```jsx
const DraggableTableRow = ({ opp, index }: { opp: CRMOpportunity; index: number }) => {
  const {
    attributes,
    listeners,
    setNodeRef,
    transform,
    transition,
    isDragging,
  } = useSortable({ id: opp.id });

  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
    transition,
    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    position: 'relative' as const,
    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
  };

  return (
    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`}>
      {/* Grip handle cell */}
      <TableCell className="w-10">
        <div
          {...attributes}
          {...listeners}
          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
        >
          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
        </div>
      </TableCell>

      {/* Index/Checkbox cell */}
      <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm w-10">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
          {isChecked ? (
            <Checkbox
              checked={true}
              onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
                if (checked) {
                  setSelectedOpportunities(prev => [...prev, opp.id]);
                } else {
                  setSelectedOpportunities(prev => prev.filter(id => id !== opp.id));
                }
              }}
            />
          ) : (
            <>
              <span className="block group-hover:hidden">{index + 1}</span>
              <span className="hidden group-hover:flex">
                <Checkbox
                  checked={false}
                  onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
                    if (checked) {
                      setSelectedOpportunities(prev => [...prev, opp.id]);
                    }
                  }}
                />
              </span>
            </>
          )}
        </div>
      </TableCell>

      {/* Name cell with inline editing */}
      <TableCell>
        {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === 'name' ? (
          <Input
            value={editingValue}
            onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
            onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
            onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, 'name')}
            className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
            autoFocus
          />
        ) : (
          <div
            onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, 'name', opp.name)}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1"
          >
            <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
            <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </TableCell>

      {/* Stage cell with dropdown */}
      <TableCell>
        <Select
          value={opp.stage}
          onValueChange={(v) => handleMoveStage(opp, v as OpportunityStage)}
        >
          <SelectTrigger className={`w-32 h-8 ${stageColors[opp.stage].bg} ${stageColors[opp.stage].text} border-none text-xs font-medium`}>
            <SelectValue />
          </SelectTrigger>
          <SelectContent>
            {currentStages.map((stage) => (
              <SelectItem key={stage} value={stage}>
                {stageLabels[stage]}
              </SelectItem>
            ))}
          </SelectContent>
        </Select>
      </TableCell>

      {/* Owner cell with dropdown */}
      <TableCell>
        <Select
          value={opp.owner_id || 'none'}
          onValueChange={(v) => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'owner_id', v === 'none' ? null : v)}
        >
          <SelectTrigger className="w-32 h-8 text-xs auth-input">
            <SelectValue placeholder="Select">
              {opp.owner_id ? (users.find(u => u.id === opp.owner_id)?.name || users.find(u => u.id === opp.owner_id)?.email || '-') : <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>}
            </SelectValue>
          </SelectTrigger>
          <SelectContent>
            <SelectItem value="none">None</SelectItem>
            {users.map((u) => (
              <SelectItem key={u.id} value={u.id}>
                {u.name || u.email}
              </SelectItem>
            ))}
          </SelectContent>
        </Select>
      </TableCell>

      {/* Affiliate cell with Combobox */}
      <TableCell>
        <Popover open={affiliatePopoverOpen === opp.id} onOpenChange={(open) => setAffiliatePopoverOpen(open ? opp.id : null)}>
          <PopoverTrigger asChild>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              role="combobox"
              aria-expanded={affiliatePopoverOpen === opp.id}
              className="w-32 h-8 justify-between text-xs auth-input"
            >
              {opp.affiliate ? (
                <Badge className="text-xs truncate" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>
                  {opp.affiliate.name}
                </Badge>
              ) : (
                <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
              )}
              <ChevronsUpDown className="ml-1 h-3 w-3 shrink-0 opacity-50" />
            </Button>
          </PopoverTrigger>
          <PopoverContent className="w-48 p-0" align="start">
            <Command>
              <CommandInput placeholder="Search affiliate..." className="h-9" />
              <CommandList>
                <CommandEmpty>No affiliate found.</CommandEmpty>
                <CommandGroup>
                  <CommandItem
                    value="none"
                    onSelect={() => {
                      handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'affiliate_id', null);
                      setAffiliatePopoverOpen(null);
                    }}
                  >
                    <Check className={`mr-2 h-4 w-4 ${!opp.affiliate_id ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`} />
                    None
                  </CommandItem>
                  {affiliates.map((aff) => (
                    <CommandItem
                      key={aff.id}
                      value={aff.name}
                      onSelect={() => {
                        handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'affiliate_id', aff.id);
                        setAffiliatePopoverOpen(null);
                      }}
                    >
                      <Check className={`mr-2 h-4 w-4 ${opp.affiliate_id === aff.id ? 'opacity-100' : 'opacity-0'}`} />
                      {aff.name}
                    </CommandItem>
                  ))}
                </CommandGroup>
              </CommandList>
            </Command>
          </PopoverContent>
        </Popover>
      </TableCell>

      {/* Action menu cell */}
      <TableCell>
        {renderActionMenu(opp)}
      </TableCell>
    </TableRow>
  );
};
```

Key patterns:
- Row drag state: `className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`}`
- Grip cell: `w-10` with hover: `hover:bg-gray-100 rounded`
- Index cell shows number by default, checkbox on hover with `group-hover:hidden` and `hidden group-hover:flex`
- Inline editing trigger: `onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, field, value)}`
- Edit input styling: `className="h-8 text-sm auth-input"`
- Non-editable fields show hover state: `hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1`
- Stage dropdown: colored background `${stageColors[opp.stage].bg} ${stageColors[opp.stage].text}`
- Select triggers use custom styling with `h-8` and `text-xs`

---

### 8. TABLE VIEW - ADD NEW ROW PATTERN

```jsx
{/* New row input */}
{addingToStage === stage && (
  <TableRow className="bg-blue-50/50">
    <TableCell className="w-10">
      <div className="p-1">
        <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300" />
      </div>
    </TableCell>
    <TableCell className="text-gray-400 text-sm w-10">•</TableCell>
    <TableCell>
      <Input
        value={newRowName}
        onChange={(e) => setNewRowName(e.target.value)}
        onBlur={handleSaveNewRow}
        onKeyDown={handleNewRowKeyDown}
        placeholder="Enter opportunity name..."
        className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
        autoFocus
      />
    </TableCell>
    <TableCell>
      <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold ${colors.bg} ${colors.text}`}>
        {stageLabels[stage]}
      </span>
    </TableCell>
    <TableCell><span className="text-gray-400">-</span></TableCell>
    {/* Other cells with gray dashes */}
    <TableCell>
      <Button
        variant="ghost"
        size="sm"
        className="h-8 w-8 p-0 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
        onClick={() => {
          setAddingToStage(null);
          setNewRowName('');
          restoreScrollPosition();
        }}
      >
        <X className="h-4 w-4" />
      </Button>
    </TableCell>
  </TableRow>
)}
```

Key patterns:
- Row background: `bg-blue-50/50`
- Index cell shows bullet: `•`
- Input: `h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input` with `autoFocus`
- Stage badge uses color scheme with `rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold`
- Empty cells show: `<span className="text-gray-400">-</span>`
- Cancel button: `h-8 w-8 p-0` with icon

---

### 9. DND PATTERNS - Sensor Configuration

```jsx
// Drag and drop sensors
const sensors = useSensors(
  useSensor(PointerSensor, {
    activationConstraint: {
      distance: 8,
    },
  }),
  useSensor(KeyboardSensor)
);
```

Key patterns:
- PointerSensor with `distance: 8` constraint (8px before drag activates)
- KeyboardSensor for accessibility

---

### 10. DND PATTERNS - Kanban View Context

```jsx
const renderKanbanView = () => (
  <DndContext
    sensors={sensors}
    collisionDetection={closestCenter}
    onDragStart={handleDragStart}
    onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}
  >
    <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
      {currentStages.map((stage) => (
        <DroppableColumn key={stage} stage={stage} isDeal={activeTab === 'deals' || activeTab === 'accounts'} />
      ))}
    </div>
    <DragOverlay>
      {activeOpportunity ? (
        <div className="w-[280px]">
          {renderOpportunityCardContent(activeOpportunity, activeTab === 'deals' || activeTab === 'accounts', true)}
        </div>
      ) : null}
    </DragOverlay>
  </DndContext>
);
```

Key patterns:
- Container: `flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full`
- DragOverlay width: `w-[280px]` (matches column width)
- Overlay renders full card content with `isDragging={true}`

---

### 11. DND PATTERNS - Table View Context

```jsx
return (
  <div className="pb-8">
    <DndContext
      sensors={sensors}
      collisionDetection={closestCenter}
      onDragStart={handleDragStart}
      onDragEnd={handleTableRowDragEnd}
    >
      {currentStages.map((stage) => (
        <DroppableStageTable key={stage} stage={stage} />
      ))}
      <DragOverlay>
        {activeOpportunity ? (
          <div className="bg-white border border-gray-300 shadow-lg rounded px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-3">
            <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
            <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
            <span className="font-medium">{activeOpportunity.name}</span>
            <Badge className={`text-xs ${stageColors[activeOpportunity.stage].bg} ${stageColors[activeOpportunity.stage].text}`}>
              {stageLabels[activeOpportunity.stage]}
            </Badge>
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </DragOverlay>
    </DndContext>
  </div>
);
```

Key patterns:
- Table DragOverlay: `bg-white border border-gray-300 shadow-lg rounded px-4 py-2`
- Overlay is a minimal row preview: grip + icon + name + stage badge
- Gap between elements: `gap-3`

---

### 12. CREATE/EDIT OPPORTUNITY DIALOG

```jsx
<Dialog open={isNewOpportunityOpen} onOpenChange={setIsNewOpportunityOpen}>
  <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>{editingOpportunity ? 'Edit Opportunity' : 'Add New Opportunity'}</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>
        {editingOpportunity ? 'Update opportunity details.' : 'Create a new lead or deal.'}
      </DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); handleCreateOpportunity(); }}>
      <div className="grid gap-4 py-4">
        {/* Type Selector */}
        <div className="grid gap-2">
          <Label>Type</Label>
          <div className="flex rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-1 bg-gray-50">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => {
                setOpportunityType('lead');
                setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, stage: 'new' });
              }}
              className={`flex-1 py-2 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                opportunityType === 'lead'
                  ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-gray-900'
                  : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
              }`}
            >
              Lead
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => {
                setOpportunityType('deal');
                setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, stage: 'deal_qualified' });
              }}
              className={`flex-1 py-2 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                opportunityType === 'deal'
                  ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-gray-900'
                  : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
              }`}
            >
              Deal
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Name field */}
        <div className="grid gap-2">
          <Label htmlFor="opp-name">Name *</Label>
          <Input
            id="opp-name"
            value={opportunityForm.name}
            onChange={(e) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, name: e.target.value })}
            placeholder="Company or opportunity name"
            className="auth-input"
            required
          />
        </div>

        {/* Two-column layout for Stage and Source */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <div className="grid gap-2">
            <Label htmlFor="opp-stage">Stage</Label>
            <Select
              value={opportunityForm.stage}
              onValueChange={(v) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, stage: v as OpportunityStage })}
            >
              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
                <SelectValue />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                {opportunityType === 'lead' ? (
                  <>
                    <SelectItem value="new">New</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="contacted">Contacted</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="qualified">Qualified</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="unqualified">Unqualified</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="nurture">Nurture</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="dead">Dead</SelectItem>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <SelectItem value="deal_qualified">Qualified</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="proposal">Proposal</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="negotiation">Negotiation</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="contract">Contract</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="closed_won">Closed Won</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="closed_lost">Closed Lost</SelectItem>
                  </>
                )}
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>
          <div className="grid gap-2">
            <Label htmlFor="opp-source">Source</Label>
            <Select
              value={opportunityForm.source || ''}
              onValueChange={(v) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, source: v as any })}
            >
              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
                <SelectValue placeholder="Select source" />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                <SelectItem value="referral">Referral</SelectItem>
                <SelectItem value="inbound">Inbound</SelectItem>
                <SelectItem value="event">Event</SelectItem>
                <SelectItem value="cold_outreach">Cold Outreach</SelectItem>
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Affiliate Selector */}
        <div className="grid gap-2">
          <Label htmlFor="opp-affiliate">Affiliate</Label>
          <Select
            value={opportunityForm.affiliate_id || 'none'}
            onValueChange={(v) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, affiliate_id: v === 'none' ? undefined : v })}
          >
            <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
              <SelectValue placeholder="Select affiliate (optional)" />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="none">No affiliate</SelectItem>
              {affiliates.map((aff) => (
                <SelectItem key={aff.id} value={aff.id}>
                  {aff.name} {aff.affiliation ? `(${aff.affiliation})` : ''}
                </SelectItem>
              ))}
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>

        {/* Conditional fields for deals and accounts */}
        {opportunityType === 'deal' && (
          <div className="grid gap-2">
            <Label htmlFor="opp-type">Account Type</Label>
            <Select /* ... */ />
          </div>
        )}

        {accountStages.includes(opportunityForm.stage as OpportunityStage) && (
          <div className="grid gap-2">
            <Label htmlFor="opp-client">Linked Client</Label>
            <Select /* ... */ />
          </div>
        )}

        {accountStages.includes(opportunityForm.stage as OpportunityStage) && (
          <div className="grid gap-2">
            <Label htmlFor="opp-scope">Scope</Label>
            <Select /* ... */ />
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Text fields */}
        <div className="grid gap-2">
          <Label htmlFor="opp-referrer">Referrer</Label>
          <Input
            id="opp-referrer"
            value={opportunityForm.referrer || ''}
            onChange={(e) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, referrer: e.target.value })}
            placeholder="Who referred them?"
            className="auth-input"
          />
        </div>

        <div className="grid gap-2">
          <Label htmlFor="opp-gc">Telegram Chat ID</Label>
          <Input
            id="opp-gc"
            value={opportunityForm.gc || ''}
            onChange={(e) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, gc: e.target.value })}
            placeholder="-1001234567890"
            className="auth-input"
          />
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Enter the Telegram group chat ID to track message activity
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid gap-2">
          <Label htmlFor="opp-notes">Notes</Label>
          <Textarea
            id="opp-notes"
            value={opportunityForm.notes || ''}
            onChange={(e) => setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, notes: e.target.value })}
            placeholder="Additional notes..."
            className="auth-input"
            rows={3}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      <DialogFooter>
        <Button type="button" variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsNewOpportunityOpen(false)}>
          Cancel
        </Button>
        <Button
          type="submit"
          disabled={isSubmitting || !opportunityForm.name.trim()}
          className="hover:opacity-90"
          style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
        >
          {isSubmitting ? 'Saving...' : editingOpportunity ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create Opportunity'}
        </Button>
      </DialogFooter>
    </form>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

Key patterns:
- Dialog content width: `max-w-md`
- Form wrapper: `div className="grid gap-4 py-4"`
- Type selector: two-column flex buttons in `rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-1 bg-gray-50`
- Active button: `bg-white shadow-sm text-gray-900`
- Inactive button: `text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700`
- Field groups: `div className="grid gap-2"`
- Two-column layout for Stage/Source: `grid grid-cols-2 gap-4`
- Buttons: Cancel is outline, Submit uses custom color `#3e8692`
- Submit button disabled when name is empty: `disabled={isSubmitting || !opportunityForm.name.trim()}`
- Submit text changes based on state: `{isSubmitting ? 'Saving...' : editingOpportunity ? 'Save Changes' : 'Create Opportunity'}`

---

### 13. DELETE CONFIRMATION DIALOG

```jsx
{/* Delete Opportunity Confirmation Dialog */}
<Dialog open={isDeleteDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsDeleteDialogOpen}>
  <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Delete Opportunity</DialogTitle>
    </DialogHeader>
    <div className="py-4">
      <p className="text-gray-600">
        Are you sure you want to delete <strong>{opportunityToDelete?.name}</strong>? This action cannot be undone.
      </p>
    </div>
    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsDeleteDialogOpen(false)}>
        Cancel
      </Button>
      <Button
        variant="destructive"
        onClick={confirmDeleteOpportunity}
      >
        Delete Opportunity
      </Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>

{/* Bulk Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
<Dialog open={isBulkDeleteDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen}>
  <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Delete {selectedOpportunities.length} Opportunities</DialogTitle>
    </DialogHeader>
    <div className="py-4">
      <p className="text-gray-600">
        Are you sure you want to delete <strong>{selectedOpportunities.length}</strong> selected opportunities? This action cannot be undone.
      </p>
    </div>
    <DialogFooter>
      <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen(false)}>
        Cancel
      </Button>
      <Button
        variant="destructive"
        onClick={confirmBulkDelete}
      >
        Delete All
      </Button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

Key patterns:
- Width: `max-w-md`
- Message wrapper: `div className="py-4"`
- Strong text for emphasis: `<strong>{name}</strong>`
- Cancel button: `variant="outline"`
- Delete button: `variant="destructive"` (red background)
- Footer: standard `DialogFooter` with two buttons

---

### 14. CONTEXT MENU / DROPDOWN

```jsx
const renderActionMenu = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => (
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
      <Button
        variant="ghost"
        size="sm"
        className="h-8 w-8 p-0"
      >
        <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
      </Button>
    </DropdownMenuTrigger>
    <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
      <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleEditOpportunity(opp)}>
        <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Edit
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenContactLink(opp)}>
        <Users className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Manage Contacts
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenHistory(opp)}>
        <History className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        View History
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMarkContacted(opp.id)}>
        <Phone className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Mark as Contacted
      </DropdownMenuItem>
      {getNextStage(opp.stage) && (
        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, getNextStage(opp.stage)!)}>
          <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          Move to {stageLabels[getNextStage(opp.stage)!]}
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      )}
      {opp.stage === 'contract' && (
        <>
          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, 'closed_won')}>
            <Award className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-emerald-600" />
            Mark as Won
          </DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, 'closed_lost')}>
            <X className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-red-600" />
            Mark as Lost
          </DropdownMenuItem>
        </>
      )}
      <DropdownMenuItem
        className="text-red-600"
        onClick={() => handleDeleteOpportunity(opp)}
      >
        <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
        Delete
      </DropdownMenuItem>
    </DropdownMenuContent>
  </DropdownMenu>
);
```

Key patterns:
- Trigger button: `h-8 w-8 p-0 variant="ghost" size="sm"`
- Trigger icon: `h-4 w-4` (MoreHorizontal)
- Menu content width: `w-48` with `align="end"`
- Each menu item: icon (`h-4 w-4 mr-2`) + text
- Icon colors can be customized: `text-emerald-600` or `text-red-600`
- Delete item: `className="text-red-600"`

---

### 15. LOADING SKELETON

```jsx
if (loading) {
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full gap-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <Skeleton className="h-8 w-32 mb-2" />
          <Skeleton className="h-4 w-48" />
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64 rounded-md" />
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-36 rounded-md" />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Stats Cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-5 gap-4">
        {[...Array(5)].map((_, i) => (
          <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Filters */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <Skeleton className="h-9 w-20" />
        <Skeleton className="h-9 w-36 rounded-md" />
        <Skeleton className="h-9 w-40 rounded-md" />
        <Skeleton className="h-9 w-36 rounded-md" />
        <Skeleton className="h-6 w-px" />
        <Skeleton className="h-9 w-16" />
        <Skeleton className="h-9 w-40 rounded-md" />
      </div>

      {/* Tabs and Table */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-56 rounded-md" />
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-40 rounded-md" />
        </div>
        <div className="space-y-6 overflow-auto flex-1">
          {[...Array(3)].map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i}>
              <Skeleton className="h-12 w-full rounded-t-lg" />
              <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 p-4 space-y-3">
                <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full" />
                {[...Array(2)].map((_, j) => (
                  <Skeleton key={j} className="h-14 w-full" />
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key patterns:
- Outer wrapper: `flex flex-col h-full gap-6`
- Header skeletons: title `h-8 w-32` and subtitle `h-4 w-48`
- Button skeletons: `h-10 w-64` and `h-10 w-36`
- Stats cards: `h-24 rounded-lg` in 5-column grid
- Filter skeletons: varying widths `h-9`
- Divider skeleton: `h-6 w-px`
- Table stages: header `h-12 rounded-t-lg`, rows `h-14 w-full`
- Wrapper around table rows: `bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 p-4 space-y-3`

---

## Summary of Key Visual Classes Used

**Colors/Styling:**
- Custom teal color: `#3e8692` (used for buttons, affiliate badges)
- Stage colors: Use a `stageColors` object with `bg`, `text`, `border`, `solid` variants
- Gradients: `bg-gradient-to-br from-[color]-50 to-white`

**Spacing/Layout:**
- Consistent gap: `gap-4` for major sections, `gap-2` for form fields
- Card padding: `pt-5 pb-4` for stats, `p-4` for main cards
- Input height: `h-8` for table inputs, `h-10` for buttons
- Icon sizes: `h-4 w-4` (standard), `h-5 w-5` (larger), `h-3 w-3` (small)

**Borders/Corners:**
- Cards: `rounded-lg` or `rounded-t-lg`/`rounded-b-lg` for sectioned
- Border colors: `border-gray-200`, stage-specific colors
- Section dividers: `border-t border-gray-100`

**Interactions:**
- Hover states: `hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1`
- Drag states: `shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400`
- Disabled: uses CSS disabled state on buttons
- Active selects: `bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm`

  2439→      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={(v) => setActiveTab(v as 'outreach' | 'leads' | 'deals' | 'accounts')}>
  2440→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 flex-shrink-0">
  2441→          <TabsList>
  2442→            <TabsTrigger value="outreach" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2443→              <Mail className="h-4 w-4" />
  2444→              Outreach
  2445→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalOutreach}</Badge>
  2446→            </TabsTrigger>
  2447→            <TabsTrigger value="leads" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2448→              <UserPlus className="h-4 w-4" />
  2449→              Leads
  2450→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalLeads}</Badge>
  2451→            </TabsTrigger>
  2452→            <TabsTrigger value="deals" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2453→              <DollarSign className="h-4 w-4" />
  2454→              Deals
  2455→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalDeals}</Badge>
  2456→            </TabsTrigger>
  2457→            <TabsTrigger value="accounts" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  2458→              <Building2 className="h-4 w-4" />
  2459→              Accounts
  2460→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="ml-1">{totalAccounts}</Badge>
  2461→            </TabsTrigger>
  2462→          </TabsList>
  2463→
  2464→          {/* View Toggle for current tab */}
  2465→          <div className="inline-flex h-10 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-muted p-1 text-muted-foreground">
  2466→            <div
  2467→              onClick={() => setCurrentViewMode('table')}
  2468→              className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 cursor-pointer ${currentViewMode === 'table' ? 'bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm' : ''}`}
  2469→            >
  2470→              <TableIcon className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  2471→              Table
  2472→            </div>
  2473→            <div
  2474→              onClick={() => setCurrentViewMode('kanban')}
  2475→              className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-sm px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-all focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 cursor-pointer ${currentViewMode === 'kanban' ? 'bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm' : ''}`}
  2476→            >
  2477→              <LayoutGrid className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  2478→              Kanban
  2479→            </div>
  2480→          </div>
  2481→        </div>
  2482→
  2483→        <TabsContent value="outreach" className="mt-0">
  2484→          {outreachViewMode === 'kanban' && renderKanbanView()}
  2485→          {outreachViewMode === 'table' && renderTableView()}
  2486→        </TabsContent>
  2487→
  2488→        <TabsContent value="leads" className="mt-0">
  2489→          {leadsViewMode === 'kanban' && renderKanbanView()}
  2490→          {leadsViewMode === 'table' && renderTableView()}
  2491→        </TabsContent>
  2492→
  2493→        <TabsContent value="deals" className="mt-0">
  2494→          {dealsViewMode === 'kanban' && renderKanbanView()}
  2495→          {dealsViewMode === 'table' && renderTableView()}
  2496→        </TabsContent>
  2497→
  2498→        <TabsContent value="accounts" className="mt-0">
  2499→          {accountsViewMode === 'kanban' && renderKanbanView()}
  2500→          {accountsViewMode === 'table' && renderTableView()}
  2501→        </TabsContent>
  2502→      </Tabs>
  2503→
  2504→      {/* Opportunity Dialog */}
  2505→      <Dialog open={isNewOpportunityOpen} onOpenChange={setIsNewOpportunityOpen}>
  2506→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
  2507→          <DialogHeader>
  2508→            <DialogTitle>{editingOpportunity ? 'Edit Opportunity' : 'Add New Opportunity'}</DialogTitle>
  2509→            <DialogDescription>
  2510→              {editingOpportunity ? 'Update opportunity details.' : 'Create a new lead or deal.'}
  2511→            </DialogDescription>
  2512→          </DialogHeader>
  2513→          <form onSubmit={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); handleCreateOpportunity(); }}>
  2514→            <div className="grid gap-4 py-4">
  2515→              {/* Type Selector */}
  2516→              <div className="grid gap-2">
  2517→                <Label>Type</Label>
  2518→                <div className="flex rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-1 bg-gray-50">
  2519→                  <button
  2520→                    type="button"
  2521→                    onClick={() => {
  2522→                      setOpportunityType('lead');
  2523→                      setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, stage: 'new' });
  2524→                    }}
  2525→                    className={`flex-1 py-2 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
  2526→                      opportunityType === 'lead'
  2527→                        ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-gray-900'
  2528→                        : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2529→                    }`}
  2530→                  >
  2531→                    Lead
  2532→                  </button>
  2533→                  <button
  2534→                    type="button"
  2535→                    onClick={() => {
  2536→                      setOpportunityType('deal');
  2537→                      setOpportunityForm({ ...opportunityForm, stage: 'deal_qualified' });
  2538→                    }}
  2539→                    className={`flex-1 py-2 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
  2540→                      opportunityType === 'deal'
  2541→                        ? 'bg-white shadow-sm text-gray-900'
  2542→                        : 'text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700'
  2543→                    }`}
  2544→                  >
  2545→                    Deal
  2546→                  </button>
  2547→                </div>
  2548→              </div>
  2549→

  1044→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card Content

  1046→  const renderOpportunityCardContent = (opp: CRMOpportunity, isDeal: boolean = false, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
  1047→    const colors = stageColors[opp.stage] || stageColors.new;
  1048→
  1049→    return (
  1050→      <Card
  1051→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''}`}
  1052→      >
  1053→        <CardContent className="p-4">
  1054→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1055→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1056→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
  1057→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1058→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
  1059→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1060→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
  1061→              </div>
  1062→
  1063→              {/* Deal Value */}
  1064→              {isDeal && opp.deal_value && (
  1065→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
  1066→                  {formatCurrency(opp.deal_value)}
  1067→                </p>
  1068→              )}
  1069→
  1070→              {/* Badges: Source, Account Type, Affiliate */}
  1071→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
  1072→                {opp.source && (
  1073→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
  1074→                    {formatSource(opp.source)}
  1075→                  </Badge>
  1076→                )}
  1077→                {opp.account_type && (
  1078→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
  1079→                    {formatSource(opp.account_type)}
  1080→                  </Badge>
  1081→                )}
  1082→                {opp.affiliate && (
  1083→                  <Badge
  1084→                    className="text-xs"
  1085→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  1086→                  >
  1087→                    {opp.affiliate.name}
  1088→                  </Badge>
  1089→                )}
  1090→              </div>
  1091→
  1092→              {/* Details: Referrer, Group Chat, Notes */}
  1093→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
  1094→                {opp.referrer && (
  1095→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1096→                    <Users className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1097→                    <span>Referred by: {opp.referrer}</span>
  1098→                  </div>
  1099→                )}
  1100→                {opp.gc && (
  1101→                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
  1102→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1103→                      <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" />
  1104→                      <span className="font-medium">TG Connected</span>
  1105→                    </div>
  1106→                    <div className="ml-4 text-xs space-y-0.5">
  1107→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1108→                        <span>Lead:</span>
  1109→                        <span className={opp.last_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1110→                          {opp.last_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_message_at) : '-'}
  1111→                        </span>
  1112→                      </div>
  1113→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1114→                        <span>Team:</span>
  1115→                        <span className={opp.last_team_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1116→                          {opp.last_team_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_team_message_at) : '-'}
  1117→                        </span>
  1118→                      </div>
  1119→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1120→                        <span>Bot:</span>
  1121→                        <span className={opp.last_reply_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1122→                          {opp.last_reply_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_reply_at) : '-'}
  1123→                        </span>
  1124→                      </div>
  1125→                    </div>
  1126→                  </div>
  1127→                )}
  1128→                {opp.notes && (
  1129→                  <div className="flex items-start gap-1.5">
  1130→                    <Edit className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
  1131→                    <span className="line-clamp-2">{opp.notes}</span>
  1132→                  </div>
  1133→                )}
  1134→              </div>
  1135→
  1136→              {/* Linked Contacts */}
  1137→              {(() => {
  1138→                const oppContacts = getOpportunityContacts(opp.id);
  1139→                if (oppContacts.length === 0) return null;
  1140→                const primaryContact = oppContacts.find(l => l.is_primary)?.contact || oppContacts[0]?.contact;
  1141→                return (
  1142→                  <div className="mt-3 pt-2 border-t border-gray-100">
  1143→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
  1144→                      <Users className="h-3 w-3 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0" />
  1145→                      <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{primaryContact?.name}</span>
  1146→                      {oppContacts.length > 1 && (
  1147→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs px-1.5 py-0">
  1148→                          +{oppContacts.length - 1}
  1149→                        </Badge>
  1150→                      )}
  1151→                    </div>
  1152→                    {primaryContact?.email && (
  1153→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 ml-5">
  1154→                        <Mail className="h-3 w-3" />
  1155→                        <span className="truncate">{primaryContact.email}</span>
  1156→                      </div>
  1157→                    )}
  1158→                    {primaryContact?.telegram_id && !primaryContact?.email && (
  1159→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1 ml-5">
  1160→                        <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3" />
  1161→                        <span>@{primaryContact.telegram_id}</span>
  1162→                      </div>
  1163→                    )}
  1164→                  </div>
  1165→                );
  1166→              })()}
  1167→
  1168→            </div>
  1169→
  1170→            {!isDragging && renderActionMenu(opp)}
  1171→          </div>
  1172→        </CardContent>
  1173→      </Card>
  1174→    );
  1175→  };
  1176→
  1177→  // ============================================
  1178→  // RENDER: Draggable Opportunity Card
  1179→  // ============================================
  1180→  const DraggableCard = ({ opp, isDeal }: { opp: CRMOpportunity; isDeal: boolean }) => {
  1181→    const {
  1182→      attributes,
  1183→      listeners,
  1184→      setNodeRef,
  1185→      transform,
  1186→      transition,
  1187→      isDragging,
  1188→    } = useSortable({ id: opp.id });
  1189→
  1190→    const style = {
  1191→      transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
  1192→      transition,
  1193→      opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
  1194→    };
  1195→
  1196→    return (
  1197→      <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
  1198→        {renderOpportunityCardContent(opp, isDeal, isDragging)}
  1199→      </div>
  1200→    );
  1201→  };
  1202→
  1203→  // ============================================
  1204→  // RENDER: Action Menu (shared across views)
  1205→  // ============================================
  1206→  const renderActionMenu = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => (
  1207→    <DropdownMenu>
  1208→      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  1209→        <Button
  1210→          variant="ghost"
  1211→          size="sm"
  1212→          className="h-8 w-8 p-0"
  1213→        >
  1214→          <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  1215→        </Button>
  1216→      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  1217→      <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
  1218→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleEditOpportunity(opp)}>
  1219→          <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1220→          Edit
  1221→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1222→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenContactLink(opp)}>
  1223→          <Users className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1224→          Manage Contacts
  1225→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1226→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenHistory(opp)}>
  1227→          <History className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1228→          View History
  1229→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1230→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMarkContacted(opp.id)}>
  1231→          <Phone className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1232→          Mark as Contacted
  1233→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1234→        {getNextStage(opp.stage) && (
  1235→          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, getNextStage(opp.stage)!)}>
  1236→            <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1237→            Move to {stageLabels[getNextStage(opp.stage)!]}
  1238→          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1239→        )}
```
</details></tool-use>

  1320→        {!isCollapsed && (
  1321→          <div
  1322→            ref={setNodeRef}
  1323→            className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors ${
  1324→              isOver ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-300' : ''
  1325→            }`}
  1326→          >
  1327→            <SortableContext items={opps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
  1328→              {opps.length === 0 ? (
  1329→                <div className={`flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm ${isOver ? 'text-blue-500' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>
  1330→                  {isOver ? 'Drop here' : 'No opportunities'}
  1331→                </div>
  1332→              ) : (
  1333→                opps.map((opp) => (
  1334→                  <DraggableCard key={opp.id} opp={opp} isDeal={isDeal} />
  1335→                ))
  1336→              )}
  1337→            </SortableContext>
  1338→          </div>
  1339→        )}
  1340→      </div>
  1341→    );
  1342→  };
  1343→
  1344→  // ============================================
  1345→  // RENDER: Table View
  1346→  // ============================================
  1347→  const renderTableView = () => {
  1348→    const isDeal = activeTab === 'deals' || activeTab === 'accounts';
  1349→    const isAccount = activeTab === 'accounts';
  1350→    const isOutreach = activeTab === 'outreach';
  1351→    const currentStages = isAccount ? accountStages : isDeal ? dealStages : isOutreach ? outreachStages : leadStages;
  1352→
  1353→    const renderEditableText = (opp: CRMOpportunity, field: string, value: string | null | undefined, className?: string) => {
  1354→      const isEditing = editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === field;
  1355→
  1356→      if (isEditing) {
  1357→        return (
  1358→          <Input
  1359→            value={editingValue}
  1360→            onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1361→            onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, field, editingValue)}
  1362→            onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, field)}
  1363→            className="h-8 text-sm auth-input"
  1364→            autoFocus
  1365→          />
  1366→        );
  1367→      }
  1368→
  1369→      return (
  1370→        <div
  1371→          onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, field, value)}
  1372→          className={`cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1 min-h-[28px] flex items-center ${className || ''}`}
  1373→        >
  1374→          {value || <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>}
  1375→        </div>
  1376→      );
  1377→    };
  1378→
  1379→    const renderEditableNumber = (opp: CRMOpportunity, field: string, value: number | null | undefined) => {
  1380→      const isEditing = editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === field;
  1381→
  1382→      if (isEditing) {
  1383→        return (
  1384→          <Input
  1385→            type="number"
  1386→            value={editingValue}
  1387→            onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1388→            onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, field, parseFloat(editingValue) || null)}
  1389→            onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, field)}
  1390→            className="h-8 text-sm text-right auth-input"
  1391→            autoFocus
  1392→          />
  1393→        );
  1394→      }
  1395→
  1396→      return (
  1397→        <div
  1398→          onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, field, value)}
  1399→          className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1 min-h-[28px] flex items-center justify-end"
  1400→        >
  1401→          {value ? (
  1402→            <span className="font-semibold text-emerald-600">{formatCurrency(value)}</span>
  1403→          ) : (
  1404→            <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
  1405→          )}
  1406→        </div>
  1407→      );
  1408→    };
  1409→
  1410→    // Draggable table row component
  1411→    const DraggableTableRow = ({ opp, index }: { opp: CRMOpportunity; index: number }) => {
  1412→      const {
  1413→        attributes,
  1414→        listeners,
  1415→        setNodeRef,
  1416→        transform,
  1417→        transition,
  1418→        isDragging,
  1419→      } = useSortable({ id: opp.id });
  1420→
  1421→      const style: React.CSSProperties = {
  1422→        transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
  1423→        transition,
  1424→        opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
  1425→        position: 'relative' as const,
  1426→        zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
  1427→      };
  1428→
  1429→      return (
  1430→        <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`}>
  1431→          <TableCell className="w-10">
  1432→            <div
  1433→              {...attributes}
  1434→              {...listeners}
  1435→              className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
  1436→            >
  1437→              <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1438→            </div>
  1439→          </TableCell>
  1440→          <TableCell className="text-gray-500 text-sm w-10">
  1441→            {(() => {
  1442→              const isChecked = selectedOpportunities.includes(opp.id);
  1443→              return (
  1444→                <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
  1445→                  {isChecked ? (
  1446→                    <Checkbox
  1447→                      checked={true}
  1448→                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
  1449→                        if (checked) {
  1450→                          setSelectedOpportunities(prev => [...prev, opp.id]);
  1451→                        } else {
  1452→                          setSelectedOpportunities(prev => prev.filter(id => id !== opp.id));
  1453→                        }
  1454→                      }}
  1455→                    />
  1456→                  ) : (
  1457→                    <>
  1458→                      <span className="block group-hover:hidden">{index + 1}</span>
  1459→                      <span className="hidden group-hover:flex">
  1460→                        <Checkbox
  1461→                          checked={false}
  1462→                          onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
  1463→                            if (checked) {
  1464→                              setSelectedOpportunities(prev => [...prev, opp.id]);
  1465→                            }
  1466→                          }}
  1467→                        />
  1468→                      </span>
  1469→                    </>
  1470→                  )}
  1471→                </div>
  1472→              );
  1473→            })()}
  1474→          </TableCell>
  1475→          <TableCell>
  1476→            {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell?.field === 'name' ? (
  1477→              <Input
  1478→                value={editingValue}
  1479→                onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
  1480→                onBlur={() => handleInlineUpdate(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
  1481→                onKeyDown={(e) => handleKeyDown(e, opp.id, 'name')}
  1482→                className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
  1483→                autoFocus
  1484→              />
  1485→            ) : (
  1486→              <div
  1487→                onClick={() => startEditing(opp.id, 'name', opp.name)}
  1488→                className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1"
  1489→              >
  1490→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1491→                <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
  1492→              </div>
  1493→            )}
  1494→          </TableCell>
  1495→          <TableCell>
  1496→            <Select
  1497→              value={opp.stage}
  1498→              onValueChange={(v) => handleMoveStage(opp, v as OpportunityStage)}
  1499→            >
```
</details></tool-use>

  1689→                            }}
  1690→                          />
  1691→                          <label
  1692→                            htmlFor={`scope-${opp.id}-${opt.value}`}
  1693→                            className="text-sm cursor-pointer"
  1694→                          >
  1695→                            {opt.label}
  1696→                          </label>
  1697→                        </div>

  1290→                <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1291→              )}
  1292→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1293→                <>
  1294→                  <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{stageLabels[stage]}</h4>
  1295→                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
  1296→                    {opps.length}
  1297→                  </Badge>
  1298→                </>
  1299→              )}

  3041→              Delete All
  3042→            </Button>
  3043→          </DialogFooter>
  3044→        </DialogContent>
  3045→      </Dialog>
  3046→
  3047→      {/* Convert to Deal Dialog */}
  3048→      <Dialog open={isConvertDialogOpen} onOpenChange={setIsConvertDialogOpen}>
  3049→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
  3050→          <DialogHeader>
  3051→            <DialogTitle>Convert to Deal?</DialogTitle>
  3052→            <DialogDescription>
  3053→              <strong>{opportunityToConvert?.name}</strong> has been qualified.
  3054→            </DialogDescription>
  3055→          </DialogHeader>
  3056→          <div className="py-4">
  3057→            <p className="text-gray-600">
  3058→              Would you like to convert this lead into a deal? This will move it to the Deals pipeline.
  3059→            </p>
  3060→          </div>
  3061→          <DialogFooter className="gap-2 sm:gap-0">
  3062→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={handleKeepAsLead}>
  3063→              Keep as Lead
  3064→            </Button>
  3065→            <Button
  3066→              onClick={handleConvertToDeal}
  3067→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  3068→              className="hover:opacity-90"
  3069→            >
  3070→              Convert to Deal
  3071→            </Button>
  3072→          </DialogFooter>
  3073→        </DialogContent>
  3074→      </Dialog>
  3075→
  3076→      {/* Convert to Account Dialog */}
```
