   152→    try {
   153→      const [opps, affs, usrs, met] = await Promise.all([
   154→        SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
   155→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
   156→        UserService.getAllUsers(),
   157→        SalesPipelineService.getMetrics(),
   158→      ]);
   159→      setOpportunities(opps);
   160→      setAffiliates(affs);
   161→      setUsers(usrs);
   162→      setMetrics(met);
   163→    } catch (err) {
   164→      console.error('Error fetching data:', err);
   165→    } finally {
   166→      setLoading(false);
   167→    }
   168→  }, []);
   169→
   170→  useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);
   171→
   172→  const fetchActivities = async (oppId: string) => {
   173→    try {
   174→      const acts = await SalesPipelineService.getActivities(oppId);
   175→      setActivities(acts);
   176→    } catch (err) {
   177→      console.error('Error fetching activities:', err);
   178→    }
   179→  };
   180→
   181→  // ============================================
   182→  // Filtered Opportunities
   183→  // ============================================
   184→
   185→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities.filter(opp => {
   186→    if (searchTerm && !opp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) return false;
   187→    if (pathFilter === 'closer' && opp.dm_account !== 'closer') return false;
   188→    if (pathFilter === 'sdr' && opp.dm_account !== 'sdr') return false;
   189→    return true;
   190→  });
   191→
   192→  const getStageOpps = (stage: SalesPipelineStage) =>
   193→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage).sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
   194→
   195→  const visiblePipelineStages = pathFilter === 'closer' ? PATH_A_STAGES : PIPELINE_STAGES;
   196→
   197→  const orbitOpps = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   198→  const orbitByReason = ORBIT_REASONS.map(r => ({
   199→    ...r,
   200→    opps: orbitOpps.filter(o => o.orbit_reason === r.value),
   201→  }));
   202→
   203→  // ============================================
   204→  // CRUD Handlers
   205→  // ============================================
   206→
   207→  const handleCreate = async () => {
   208→    if (!form.name.trim()) return;
   209→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   210→    try {
   211→      await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
   212→      setIsCreateOpen(false);
   213→      setForm({ name: '' });
   214→      await fetchData();
   215→    } catch (err: any) {
   216→      alert(err.message || 'Error creating opportunity');
   217→    } finally {
   218→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   219→    }
   220→  };
   221→
   222→  const handleUpdate = async () => {
   223→    if (!editingOpp || !form.name.trim()) return;
   224→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   225→    try {
   226→      await SalesPipelineService.update(editingOpp.id, form);
   227→      setEditingOpp(null);
   228→      setForm({ name: '' });
   229→      await fetchData();
   230→    } catch (err: any) {
   231→      alert(err.message || 'Error updating opportunity');
   232→    } finally {
   233→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   234→    }
   235→  };
   236→
   237→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   238→    if (!confirm('Delete this opportunity?')) return;
   239→    try {
   240→      await SalesPipelineService.delete(id);
   241→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === id) setSlideOverOpp(null);
   242→      await fetchData();
   243→    } catch (err) {
   244→      console.error('Error deleting:', err);
   245→    }
   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const handleStageChange = async (oppId: string, newStage: SalesPipelineStage, currentStage: string) => {
   249→    if (newStage === 'orbit') {
   250→      setOrbitPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   251→      return;
   252→    }
   253→    if (newStage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   254→      setClosedLostPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   255→      return;
   256→    }
   257→    try {
   258→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { stage: newStage as OpportunityStage });
   259→      await fetchData();
   260→    } catch (err) {
   261→      console.error('Error changing stage:', err);
   262→    }
   263→  };
   264→
   265→  const confirmOrbit = async () => {
   266→    if (!orbitPrompt) return;
   267→    try {
   268→      await SalesPipelineService.update(orbitPrompt.oppId, {
   269→        stage: 'orbit' as OpportunityStage,
   270→        orbit_reason: orbitReasonValue,
   271→      });
   272→      setOrbitPrompt(null);
   273→      setOrbitReasonValue('no_response');
   274→      await fetchData();
   275→    } catch (err) {
   276→      console.error('Error moving to orbit:', err);
   277→    }
   278→  };
   279→
   280→  const confirmClosedLost = async () => {
   281→    if (!closedLostPrompt) return;
   282→    try {
   283→      await SalesPipelineService.update(closedLostPrompt.oppId, {
   284→        stage: 'v2_closed_lost' as OpportunityStage,
   285→        closed_lost_reason: closedLostReasonValue || undefined,
   286→      });
   287→      setClosedLostPrompt(null);
   288→      setClosedLostReasonValue('');
   289→      await fetchData();
   290→    } catch (err) {
   291→      console.error('Error closing lost:', err);
   292→    }
   293→  };
   294→
   295→  const handleResurrect = async (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   296→    try {
   297→      await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, {
   298→        stage: 'cold_dm' as OpportunityStage,
   299→        orbit_reason: null,
   300→      });
   301→      await fetchData();
   302→    } catch (err) {
   303→      console.error('Error resurrecting:', err);
   304→    }
   305→  };
   306→
   307→  const handleRecordBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   308→    try {
   309→      await SalesPipelineService.recordBump(oppId);
   310→      await fetchData();
   311→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === oppId) {
   312→        await fetchActivities(oppId);
   313→        // Refresh the slide-over opp data
   314→        const updated = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   315→        if (updated) setSlideOverOpp(updated);
   316→      }
   317→    } catch (err) {
   318→      console.error('Error recording bump:', err);
   319→    }
   320→  };
   321→
   322→  const handleAddActivity = async () => {
   323→    if (!activityForm.title.trim() || !slideOverOpp) return;
   324→    setIsActivitySubmitting(true);
   325→    try {
   326→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
   327→        ...activityForm,
   328→        opportunity_id: slideOverOpp.id,
   329→      });
   330→      setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: '', type: 'note', title: '' });
   331→      await fetchActivities(slideOverOpp.id);
   332→    } catch (err) {
   333→      console.error('Error adding activity:', err);
   334→    } finally {
   335→      setIsActivitySubmitting(false);
   336→    }
   337→  };
   338→
   339→  const handleInlineEdit = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: string) => {
   340→    try {
   341→      const updates: any = {};
   342→      if (field === 'deal_value') {
   343→        updates.deal_value = value ? parseFloat(value) : null;
   344→      } else if (field === 'temperature_score') {
   345→        updates.temperature_score = parseInt(value) || 50;
   346→      } else {
   347→        updates[field] = value || null;
   348→      }
   349→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, updates);
   350→      await fetchData();
   351→    } catch (err) {
   352→      console.error('Error inline edit:', err);
   353→    }
   354→    setEditingCell(null);
   355→  };
   356→
   357→  // ============================================
   358→  // DnD Handlers
   359→  // ============================================
   360→
   361→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   362→    const id = event.active.id as string;
   363→    setActiveId(id);
   364→    setActiveOpportunity(opportunities.find(o => o.id === id) || null);
   365→  };
   366→
   367→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   368→    const { active, over } = event;
   369→    setActiveId(null);
   370→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   371→
   372→    if (!over) return;
   373→
   374→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   375→    const overId = over.id as string;
   376→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   377→    if (!opp) return;
   378→
   379→    // Check if dropped on a stage column
   380→    const isStageColumn = ALL_V2_STAGES.includes(overId as SalesPipelineStage);
   381→
   382→    if (isStageColumn) {
   383→      const newStage = overId as SalesPipelineStage;
   384→      if (opp.stage !== newStage) {
   385→        await handleStageChange(oppId, newStage, opp.stage);
   386→      }
   387→    } else {
   388→      // Dropped on another card — reorder within same stage
   389→      const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   390→      if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage === opp.stage) {
   391→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage);
   392→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === oppId);
   393→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === overId);
   394→        if (oldIndex !== -1 && newIndex !== -1) {
   395→          const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   396→          const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
   397→          await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
   398→          await fetchData();
   399→        }
   400→      } else if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage !== opp.stage) {
   401→        // Dropped on card in different stage
   402→        await handleStageChange(oppId, targetOpp.stage as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage);
   403→      }
   404→    }
   405→  };
   406→
   407→  // ============================================
   408→  // Open slide-over
   409→  // ============================================
   410→
   411→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   412→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   413→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   414→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
   415→  };
   416→
   417→  const openEditDialog = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   418→    setEditingOpp(opp);
   419→    setForm({
   420→      name: opp.name,
   421→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   422→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   423→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   424→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   425→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   426→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   427→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   428→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   429→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   430→      currency: opp.currency,
   431→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   432→    });
   433→  };
   434→
   435→  // ============================================
   436→  // BAMFAM check
   437→  // ============================================
   438→
   439→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   440→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   441→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   442→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   443→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   444→  };
   445→
   446→  // ============================================
   447→  // Helpers
   448→  // ============================================
   449→
   450→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
   451→    if (!userId) return '—';
   452→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
   453→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
   454→  };
   455→
   456→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
   457→    switch (type) {
   458→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   459→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   460→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   461→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   462→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   463→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   464→    }
   465→  };
   466→
   467→  // ============================================
   468→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
   469→  // ============================================
   470→
   471→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   472→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
   473→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
   474→
   475→    return (
   476→      <Card
   477→        className={`cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border ${bamfam ? 'border-red-300 bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
   478→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   479→      >
   480→        <CardContent className="p-3 space-y-2">
   481→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
   482→            <span className="font-medium text-sm truncate flex-1">{opp.name}</span>
   483→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2 flex-shrink-0">
   484→              {opp.bucket && (
   485→                <Badge className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   486→                  {opp.bucket}
   487→                </Badge>
   488→              )}
   489→              {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
   490→                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 border-blue-300 text-blue-600">C</Badge>
   491→              )}
   492→              {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
   493→                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 border-green-300 text-green-600">S</Badge>
   494→              )}
   495→            </div>
   496→          </div>
   497→
   498→          {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
   499→          {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   500→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   501→              <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-500">Bump {opp.bump_number}/4</span>
   502→              <div className="flex gap-0.5">
   503→                {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
   504→                  <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
   505→                ))}
   506→              </div>
   507→            </div>
   508→          )}
   509→
   510→          {/* Warm sub-state badge */}
   511→          {opp.stage === 'warm' && opp.warm_sub_state && (
   512→            <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 ${opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'border-green-300 text-green-600' : 'border-gray-300 text-gray-500'}`}>
   513→              {opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'Interested' : 'Silent'}
   514→            </Badge>
   515→          )}
   516→
   517→          {/* Temperature bar */}
   518→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   519→            <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   520→              <div
   521→                className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
   522→                style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
   523→              />
   524→            </div>
   525→            <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
   526→          </div>
   527→
   528→          {/* BAMFAM warning */}
   529→          {bamfam && (
   530→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-red-600">
   531→              <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
   532→              <span className="text-[10px] font-medium">BAMFAM</span>
   533→            </div>
   534→          )}
   535→
   536→          {/* Bottom row */}
   537→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-[10px] text-gray-500">
   538→            {opp.deal_value ? (
   539→              <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}</span>
   540→            ) : (
   541→              <span>—</span>
   542→            )}
   543→            {opp.last_contacted_at && (
   544→              <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
   545→            )}
   546→          </div>
   547→        </CardContent>
   548→      </Card>
   549→    );
   550→  };
   551→
   552→  // ============================================
   553→  // RENDER: Kanban View
   554→  // ============================================
   555→
   556→  const renderKanban = () => (
   557→    <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
   558→      <div className="flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-4" style={{ minHeight: 'calc(100vh - 280px)' }}>
   559→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
   560→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
   561→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
   562→          return (
   563→            <DroppableColumn key={stage} id={stage} className="flex-shrink-0 w-[260px]">
   564→              <div className={`rounded-lg border ${colors.border} bg-white`}>
   565→                {/* Column header */}
   566→                <div className={`px-3 py-2 border-b ${colors.border} ${colors.bg} rounded-t-lg`}>
   567→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   568→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   569→                      <div className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`} />
   570→                      <h4 className={`font-semibold text-sm ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
   571→                    </div>
   572→                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
   573→                  </div>
   574→                </div>
   575→                {/* Cards */}
   576→                <div className="p-2 space-y-2 min-h-[100px]">
   577→                  <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
   578→                    {stageOpps.map(opp => (
   579→                      <SortableCard key={opp.id} id={opp.id}>
   580→                        {renderCard(opp)}
   581→                      </SortableCard>
   582→                    ))}
   583→                  </SortableContext>
   584→                </div>
   585→              </div>
   586→            </DroppableColumn>
   587→          );
   588→        })}
   589→
   590→        {/* Orbit drop zone */}
   591→        <DroppableColumn id="orbit" className="flex-shrink-0 w-[260px]">
   592→          <div className="rounded-lg border border-orange-200 bg-white">
   593→            <div className="px-3 py-2 border-b border-orange-200 bg-orange-50 rounded-t-lg">
   594→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   595→                <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-orange-500" />
   596→                <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm text-orange-700">Orbit</h4>
   597→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
   598→              </div>
   599→            </div>
   600→            <div className="p-2 min-h-[100px] text-center text-xs text-gray-400 pt-8">
   601→              Drag here to orbit
   602→            </div>
   603→          </div>
   604→        </DroppableColumn>
   605→
   606→        {/* Closed Lost drop zone */}
   607→        <DroppableColumn id="v2_closed_lost" className="flex-shrink-0 w-[260px]">
   608→          <div className="rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-white">
   609→            <div className="px-3 py-2 border-b border-red-200 bg-red-50 rounded-t-lg">
   610→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   611→                <div className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500" />
   612→                <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm text-red-700">Closed Lost</h4>
   613→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">
   614→                  {filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost').length}
   615→                </Badge>
   616→              </div>
   617→            </div>
   618→            <div className="p-2 min-h-[100px] text-center text-xs text-gray-400 pt-8">
   619→              Drag here to close lost
   620→            </div>
   621→          </div>
   622→        </DroppableColumn>
   623→      </div>
   624→
   625→      <DragOverlay>
   626→        {activeOpportunity ? (
   627→          <div className="w-[260px] opacity-90">
   628→            {renderCard(activeOpportunity)}
   629→          </div>
   630→        ) : null}
   631→      </DragOverlay>
   632→    </DndContext>
   633→  );
   634→
   635→  // ============================================
   636→  // RENDER: Table View
   637→  // ============================================
   638→
   639→  const renderTable = () => (
   640→    <div className="space-y-4">
   641→      {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
   642→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
   643→        const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
   644→        const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
   645→
   646→        return (
   647→          <div key={stage} className="border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
   648→            <button
   649→              onClick={() => {
   650→                const next = new Set(collapsedStages);
   651→                isCollapsed ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   652→                setCollapsedStages(next);
   653→              }}
   654→              className={`w-full px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between ${colors.bg} border-b ${colors.border}`}
   655→            >
   656→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   657→                {isCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4" />}
   658→                <div className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`} />
   659→                <span className={`font-semibold text-sm ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</span>
   660→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
   661→              </div>
   662→              {stageOpps.length > 0 && (
   663→                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
   664→                  ${stageOpps.reduce((s, o) => s + (o.deal_value || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}
   665→                </span>
   666→              )}
   667→            </button>
   668→
   669→            {!isCollapsed && (
   670→              <Table>
   671→                <TableHeader>
   672→                  <TableRow className="text-xs">
   673→                    <TableHead className="w-[200px]">Name</TableHead>
   674→                    <TableHead className="w-[60px]">Bucket</TableHead>
   675→                    <TableHead className="w-[60px]">DM</TableHead>
   676→                    <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Temp</TableHead>
   677→                    <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Value</TableHead>
   678→                    <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Owner</TableHead>
   679→                    <TableHead className="w-[100px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
   680→                    {stage === 'cold_dm' && <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>}
   681→                    <TableHead className="w-[80px]">BAMFAM</TableHead>
   682→                    <TableHead className="w-[40px]"></TableHead>
   683→                  </TableRow>
   684→                </TableHeader>
   685→                <TableBody>
   686→                  {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
   687→                    <TableRow>
   688→                      <TableCell colSpan={10} className="text-center text-xs text-gray-400 py-4">
   689→                        No opportunities in this stage
   690→                      </TableCell>
   691→                    </TableRow>
   692→                  ) : stageOpps.map(opp => (
   693→                    <TableRow
   694→                      key={opp.id}
   695→                      className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 text-xs"
   696→                      onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   697→                    >
   698→                      <TableCell className="font-medium">
   699→                        {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'name' ? (
   700→                          <Input
   701→                            value={editingValue}
   702→                            onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   703→                            onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
   704→                            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
   705→                            className="h-7 text-xs"
   706→                            autoFocus
   707→                            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   708→                          />
   709→                        ) : (
   710→                          <span
   711→                            className="hover:underline"
   712→                            onDoubleClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' }); setEditingValue(opp.name); }}
   713→                          >
   714→                            {opp.name}
   715→                          </span>
   716→                        )}
   717→                      </TableCell>
   718→                      <TableCell>
   719→                        {opp.bucket && (
   720→                          <Badge className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   721→                            {opp.bucket}
   722→                          </Badge>
   723→                        )}
   724→                      </TableCell>
   725→                      <TableCell>
   726→                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0">
   727→                          {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'C' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'S' : 'O'}
   728→                        </Badge>
   729→                      </TableCell>
   730→                      <TableCell>
   731→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   732→                          <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   733→                            <div
   734→                              className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
   735→                              style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
   736→                            />
   737→                          </div>
   738→                          <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
   739→                        </div>
   740→                      </TableCell>
   741→                      <TableCell>
   742→                        {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'deal_value' ? (
   743→                          <Input
   744→                            type="number"
   745→                            value={editingValue}
   746→                            onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   747→                            onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'deal_value', editingValue)}
   748→                            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'deal_value', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
   749→                            className="h-7 text-xs w-20"
   750→                            autoFocus
   751→                            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   752→                          />
   753→                        ) : (
   754→                          <span
   755→                            onDoubleClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'deal_value' }); setEditingValue(String(opp.deal_value || '')); }}
   756→                          >
   757→                            {opp.deal_value ? `$${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}` : '—'}
   758→                          </span>
   759→                        )}
   760→                      </TableCell>
   761→                      <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
   762→                      <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</TableCell>
   763→                      {stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   764→                        <TableCell>
   765→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   766→                            <span>{opp.bump_number}/4</span>
   767→                            <div className="flex gap-0.5">
   768→                              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
   769→                                <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
   770→                              ))}
   771→                            </div>
   772→                          </div>
   773→                        </TableCell>
   774→                      )}
   775→                      <TableCell>
   776→                        {isBAMFAM(opp) ? (
   777→                          <span className="text-red-600 flex items-center gap-1">
   778→                            <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
   779→                          </span>
   780→                        ) : (
   781→                          <span className="text-green-600 text-[10px]">OK</span>
   782→                        )}
   783→                      </TableCell>
   784→                      <TableCell>
   785→                        <DropdownMenu>
   786→                          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   787→                            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 w-6 p-0">
   788→                              <MoreHorizontal className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   789→                            </Button>
   790→                          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   791→                          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
   792→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
   793→                              <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Edit
   794→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   795→                            {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   796→                              <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
   797→                                <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Record Bump
   798→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
   799→                            )}
   800→                            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   801→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage); }} className="text-orange-600">
   802→                              <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Move to Orbit
   803→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   804→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
   805→                              <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Delete
   806→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   807→                          </DropdownMenuContent>
   808→                        </DropdownMenu>
   809→                      </TableCell>
   810→                    </TableRow>
   811→                  ))}
   812→                </TableBody>
   813→              </Table>
   814→            )}
   815→          </div>
   816→        );
   817→      })}
   818→    </div>
   819→  );
   820→
   821→  // ============================================
   822→  // RENDER: Orbit Tab
   823→  // ============================================
   824→
   825→  const renderOrbitTab = () => (
   826→    <div className="space-y-6">
   827→      {orbitByReason.map(group => (
   828→        <div key={group.value} className="border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
   829→          <div className="px-4 py-2 bg-orange-50 border-b border-orange-200 flex items-center justify-between">
   830→            <span className="font-semibold text-sm text-orange-700">{group.label}</span>
   831→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{group.opps.length}</Badge>
   832→          </div>
   833→          {group.opps.length === 0 ? (
   834→            <div className="p-4 text-center text-xs text-gray-400">No opportunities</div>
   835→          ) : (
   836→            <Table>
   837→              <TableHeader>
   838→                <TableRow className="text-xs">
   839→                  <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
   840→                  <TableHead>Bucket</TableHead>
   841→                  <TableHead>Time in Orbit</TableHead>
   842→                  <TableHead>Last Contacted</TableHead>
   843→                  <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Action</TableHead>
   844→                </TableRow>
   845→              </TableHeader>
   846→              <TableBody>
   847→                {group.opps.map(opp => (
   848→                  <TableRow key={opp.id} className="text-xs cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50" onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}>
   849→                    <TableCell className="font-medium">{opp.name}</TableCell>
   850→                    <TableCell>
   851→                      {opp.bucket && (
   852→                        <Badge className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   853→                          {opp.bucket}
   854→                        </Badge>
   855→                      )}
   856→                    </TableCell>
   857→                    <TableCell>{opp.updated_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.updated_at)) : '—'}</TableCell>
   858→                    <TableCell>{opp.last_contacted_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true }) : '—'}</TableCell>
   859→                    <TableCell>
   860→                      <Button
   861→                        variant="outline"
   862→                        size="sm"
   863→                        className="h-7 text-xs"
   864→                        onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleResurrect(opp); }}
   865→                      >
   866→                        <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Resurrect
   867→                      </Button>
   868→                    </TableCell>
   869→                  </TableRow>
   870→                ))}
   871→              </TableBody>
   872→            </Table>
   873→          )}
   874→        </div>
   875→      ))}
   876→    </div>
   877→  );
   878→
   879→  // ============================================
   880→  // RENDER: Activity Slide-Over
   881→  // ============================================
   882→
   883→  const renderSlideOver = () => {
   884→    if (!slideOverOpp) return null;
   885→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === slideOverOpp.id) || slideOverOpp;
   886→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
   887→
   888→    return (
   889→      <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[440px] bg-white border-l shadow-xl z-50 flex flex-col">
   890→        {/* Header */}
   891→        <div className="p-4 border-b flex items-center justify-between">
   892→          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   893→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg truncate">{opp.name}</h3>
   894→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
   895→              <Badge className={`text-xs ${STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.bg || ''} ${STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.text || ''}`}>
   896→                {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
   897→              </Badge>
   898→              {opp.bucket && (
   899→                <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   900→                  Bucket {opp.bucket}
   901→                </Badge>
   902→              )}
   903→            </div>
   904→          </div>
   905→          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   906→            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => openEditDialog(opp)}>
   907→              <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
   908→            </Button>
   909→            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => setSlideOverOpp(null)}>
   910→              <X className="h-4 w-4" />
   911→            </Button>
   912→          </div>
   913→        </div>
   914→
   915→        {/* BAMFAM indicator */}
   916→        {bamfam && (
   917→          <div className="px-4 py-2 bg-red-50 border-b border-red-200 flex items-center gap-2 text-red-700 text-sm">
   918→            <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4" />
   919→            <span className="font-medium">BAMFAM: No upcoming meeting scheduled</span>
   920→          </div>
   921→        )}
   922→
   923→        <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
   924→          <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
   925→            {/* Opportunity Details */}
   926→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm">
   927→              <div>
   928→                <span className="text-gray-500">DM Account</span>
   929→                <p className="font-medium capitalize">{opp.dm_account}</p>
   930→              </div>
   931→              <div>
   932→                <span className="text-gray-500">Temperature</span>
   933→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-0.5">
   934→                  <div className="w-16 h-2 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   935→                    <div
   936→                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
   937→                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
   938→                    />
   939→                  </div>
   940→                  <span className="text-xs">{opp.temperature_score}%</span>
   941→                </div>
   942→              </div>
   943→              <div>
   944→                <span className="text-gray-500">Deal Value</span>
   945→                <p className="font-medium">{opp.deal_value ? `$${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()} ${opp.currency}` : '—'}</p>
   946→              </div>
   947→              <div>
   948→                <span className="text-gray-500">Owner</span>
   949→                <p className="font-medium">{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</p>
   950→              </div>
   951→              <div>
   952→                <span className="text-gray-500">TG Handle</span>
   953→                <p className="font-medium">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</p>
   954→              </div>
   955→              <div>
   956→                <span className="text-gray-500">Source</span>
   957→                <p className="font-medium capitalize">{opp.source || '—'}</p>
   958→              </div>
   959→              {opp.next_meeting_at && (
   960→                <div>
   961→                  <span className="text-gray-500">Next Meeting</span>
   962→                  <p className="font-medium">{format(new Date(opp.next_meeting_at), 'MMM d, yyyy h:mm a')}</p>
   963→                </div>
   964→              )}
   965→              {opp.referrer && (
   966→                <div>
   967→                  <span className="text-gray-500">Referrer</span>
   968→                  <p className="font-medium">{opp.referrer}</p>
   969→                </div>
   970→              )}
   971→            </div>
   972→
   973→            {opp.notes && (
   974→              <div className="text-sm">
   975→                <span className="text-gray-500">Notes</span>
   976→                <p className="mt-1 text-gray-700 whitespace-pre-wrap">{opp.notes}</p>
   977→              </div>
   978→            )}
   979→
   980→            {/* Quick actions */}
   981→            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
   982→              {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   983→                <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs" onClick={() => handleRecordBump(opp.id)}>
   984→                  <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Record Bump ({opp.bump_number}/4)
   985→                </Button>
   986→              )}
   987→              <Button
   988→                variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs text-orange-600 border-orange-300"
   989→                onClick={() => handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage)}
   990→              >
   991→                <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Orbit
   992→              </Button>
   993→            </div>
   994→
   995→            {/* Stage move */}
   996→            <div>
   997→              <Label className="text-xs text-gray-500">Move to stage</Label>
   998→              <Select
   999→                value={opp.stage}
  1000→                onValueChange={(v) => handleStageChange(opp.id, v as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage)}
  1001→              >
  1002→                <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-xs mt-1">
  1003→                  <SelectValue />
  1004→                </SelectTrigger>
  1005→                <SelectContent>
  1006→                  {ALL_V2_STAGES.map(s => (
  1007→                    <SelectItem key={s} value={s} className="text-xs">{STAGE_LABELS[s]}</SelectItem>
  1008→                  ))}
  1009→                </SelectContent>
  1010→              </Select>
  1011→            </div>
  1012→
  1013→            {/* Activity Timeline */}
  1014→            <div className="border-t pt-4">
  1015→              <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm mb-3">Activity Timeline</h4>
  1016→
  1017→              {/* Add activity form */}
  1018→              <div className="space-y-2 mb-4 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
  1019→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  1020→                  <Select
  1021→                    value={activityForm.type}
  1022→                    onValueChange={v => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, type: v as ActivityType }))}
  1023→                  >
  1024→                    <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-xs w-28">
  1025→                      <SelectValue />
  1026→                    </SelectTrigger>
  1027→                    <SelectContent>
  1028→                      <SelectItem value="note">Note</SelectItem>
  1029→                      <SelectItem value="call">Call</SelectItem>
  1030→                      <SelectItem value="message">Message</SelectItem>
  1031→                      <SelectItem value="meeting">Meeting</SelectItem>
  1032→                      <SelectItem value="proposal">Proposal</SelectItem>
  1033→                    </SelectContent>
  1034→                  </Select>
  1035→                  <Input
  1036→                    placeholder="Title..."
  1037→                    value={activityForm.title}
  1038→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, title: e.target.value }))}
  1039→                    className="h-8 text-xs flex-1"
  1040→                  />
  1041→                </div>
  1042→                <Textarea
  1043→                  placeholder="Description (optional)"
  1044→                  value={activityForm.description || ''}
  1045→                  onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}
  1046→                  className="text-xs min-h-[60px]"
  1047→                  rows={2}
  1048→                />
  1049→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  1050→                  <Input
  1051→                    placeholder="Outcome"
  1052→                    value={activityForm.outcome || ''}
  1053→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, outcome: e.target.value }))}
  1054→                    className="h-8 text-xs flex-1"
  1055→                  />
  1056→                  <Input
  1057→                    placeholder="Next step"
  1058→                    value={activityForm.next_step || ''}
  1059→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step: e.target.value }))}
  1060→                    className="h-8 text-xs flex-1"
  1061→                  />
  1062→                </div>
  1063→                <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
  1064→                  <Input
  1065→                    type="datetime-local"
  1066→                    value={activityForm.next_step_date || ''}
  1067→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step_date: e.target.value }))}
  1068→                    className="h-8 text-xs flex-1"
  1069→                    placeholder="Next step date"
  1070→                  />
  1071→                  <Button size="sm" className="h-8 text-xs" onClick={handleAddActivity} disabled={isActivitySubmitting || !activityForm.title.trim()}>
  1072→                    Add
  1073→                  </Button>
  1074→                </div>
  1075→              </div>
  1076→
  1077→              {/* Activity list */}
  1078→              <div className="space-y-3">
  1079→                {activities.length === 0 ? (
  1080→                  <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 text-center py-4">No activities yet</p>
  1081→                ) : activities.map(act => (
  1082→                  <div key={act.id} className="flex gap-3 text-xs">
  1083→                    <div className="mt-0.5 p-1.5 rounded-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 flex-shrink-0">
  1084→                      {activityIcon(act.type)}
  1085→                    </div>
  1086→                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1087→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1088→                        <span className="font-medium">{act.title}</span>
  1089→                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1">{act.type}</Badge>
  1090→                      </div>
  1091→                      {act.description && <p className="text-gray-600 mt-0.5">{act.description}</p>}
  1092→                      {act.outcome && <p className="text-gray-500 mt-0.5">Outcome: {act.outcome}</p>}
  1093→                      {act.next_step && (
  1094→                        <p className="text-blue-600 mt-0.5 flex items-center gap-1">
  1095→                          <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3" /> {act.next_step}
  1096→                          {act.next_step_date && (
  1097→                            <span className="text-gray-400 ml-1">
  1098→                              ({format(new Date(act.next_step_date), 'MMM d')})
  1099→                            </span>
  1100→                          )}
  1101→                        </p>
  1102→                      )}
  1103→                      <span className="text-gray-400 mt-1 block">
  1104→                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(act.created_at), { addSuffix: true })}
  1105→                      </span>
  1106→                    </div>
  1107→                  </div>
  1108→                ))}
  1109→              </div>
  1110→            </div>
  1111→          </div>
  1112→        </ScrollArea>
  1113→      </div>
  1114→    );
  1115→  };
  1116→
  1117→  // ============================================
  1118→  // RENDER: Create / Edit Dialog
  1119→  // ============================================
  1120→
  1121→  const renderFormDialog = () => {
  1122→    const isEdit = !!editingOpp;
  1123→    const isOpen = isCreateOpen || !!editingOpp;
  1124→
  1125→    return (
  1126→      <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={open => {
  1127→        if (!open) { setIsCreateOpen(false); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }
  1128→      }}>
  1129→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg">
  1130→          <DialogHeader>
  1131→            <DialogTitle>{isEdit ? 'Edit Opportunity' : 'New Opportunity'}</DialogTitle>
  1132→            <DialogDescription>
  1133→              {isEdit ? 'Update opportunity details' : 'Add a new opportunity to the sales pipeline'}
  1134→            </DialogDescription>
  1135→          </DialogHeader>
  1136→
  1137→          <div className="space-y-4 py-2">
  1138→            <div>
  1139→              <Label className="text-sm">Name *</Label>
  1140→              <Input
  1141→                value={form.name}
  1142→                onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))}
  1143→                placeholder="Company or contact name"
  1144→                className="mt-1"
  1145→              />
  1146→            </div>
  1147→
  1148→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
  1149→              <div>
  1150→                <Label className="text-sm">DM Account</Label>
  1151→                <Select
  1152→                  value={form.dm_account || 'sdr'}
  1153→                  onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, dm_account: v as DmAccount }))}
  1154→                >
  1155→                  <SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  1156→                  <SelectContent>
  1157→                    <SelectItem value="closer">Closer (Path A)</SelectItem>
  1158→                    <SelectItem value="sdr">SDR (Path B)</SelectItem>
  1159→                    <SelectItem value="other">Other</SelectItem>
  1160→                  </SelectContent>
  1161→                </Select>
  1162→              </div>
  1163→              <div>
  1164→                <Label className="text-sm">Bucket</Label>
  1165→                <Select
  1166→                  value={form.bucket || ''}
  1167→                  onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, bucket: v as Bucket }))}
  1168→                >
  1169→                  <SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1170→                  <SelectContent>
  1171→                    <SelectItem value="A">A - High Priority</SelectItem>
  1172→                    <SelectItem value="B">B - Medium</SelectItem>
  1173→                    <SelectItem value="C">C - Low Priority</SelectItem>
  1174→                  </SelectContent>
  1175→                </Select>
  1176→              </div>
  1177→            </div>
  1178→
  1179→            <div>
  1180→              <Label className="text-sm">Temperature Score: {form.temperature_score || 50}</Label>
  1181→              <input
  1182→                type="range"
  1183→                min="0"
  1184→                max="100"
  1185→                value={form.temperature_score || 50}
  1186→                onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, temperature_score: parseInt(e.target.value) }))}
  1187→                className="w-full mt-1 accent-[#3e8692]"
  1188→              />
  1189→            </div>
  1190→
  1191→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
  1192→              <div>
  1193→                <Label className="text-sm">Source</Label>
  1194→                <Select
  1195→                  value={form.source || ''}
  1196→                  onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, source: v }))}
  1197→                >
  1198→                  <SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1199→                  <SelectContent>
  1200→                    <SelectItem value="referral">Referral</SelectItem>
  1201→                    <SelectItem value="inbound">Inbound</SelectItem>
  1202→                    <SelectItem value="event">Event</SelectItem>
  1203→                    <SelectItem value="cold_outreach">Cold Outreach</SelectItem>
  1204→                  </SelectContent>
  1205→                </Select>
  1206→              </div>
  1207→              <div>
  1208→                <Label className="text-sm">TG Handle</Label>
  1209→                <Input
  1210→                  value={form.tg_handle || ''}
  1211→                  onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, tg_handle: e.target.value }))}
  1212→                  placeholder="@handle"
  1213→                  className="mt-1"
  1214→                />
  1215→              </div>
  1216→            </div>
  1217→
  1218→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
  1219→              <div>
  1220→                <Label className="text-sm">Owner</Label>
  1221→                <Select
  1222→                  value={form.owner_id || ''}
  1223→                  onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, owner_id: v }))}
  1224→                >
  1225→                  <SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1226→                  <SelectContent>
  1227→                    {users.map(u => (
  1228→                      <SelectItem key={u.id} value={u.id}>{u.name || u.email}</SelectItem>
  1229→                    ))}
  1230→                  </SelectContent>
  1231→                </Select>
  1232→              </div>
  1233→              <div>
  1234→                <Label className="text-sm">Referrer</Label>
  1235→                <Input
  1236→                  value={form.referrer || ''}
  1237→                  onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, referrer: e.target.value }))}
  1238→                  placeholder="Who referred?"
  1239→                  className="mt-1"
  1240→                />
  1241→              </div>
  1242→            </div>
  1243→
  1244→            <div>
  1245→              <Label className="text-sm">Affiliate</Label>
  1246→              <Select
  1247→                value={form.affiliate_id || ''}
  1248→                onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, affiliate_id: v }))}
  1249→              >
  1250→                <SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue placeholder="Select affiliate..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1251→                <SelectContent>
  1252→                  {affiliates.map(a => (
  1253→                    <SelectItem key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</SelectItem>
  1254→                  ))}
  1255→                </SelectContent>
  1256→              </Select>
  1257→            </div>
  1258→
  1259→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
  1260→              <div>
  1261→                <Label className="text-sm">Deal Value</Label>
  1262→                <Input
  1263→                  type="number"
  1264→                  value={form.deal_value || ''}
  1265→                  onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, deal_value: e.target.value ? parseFloat(e.target.value) : undefined }))}
  1266→                  placeholder="0"
  1267→                  className="mt-1"
  1268→                />
  1269→              </div>
  1270→              <div>
  1271→                <Label className="text-sm">Currency</Label>
  1272→                <Select
  1273→                  value={form.currency || 'USD'}
  1274→                  onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, currency: v }))}
  1275→                >
  1276→                  <SelectTrigger className="mt-1"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  1277→                  <SelectContent>
  1278→                    <SelectItem value="USD">USD</SelectItem>
  1279→                    <SelectItem value="USDT">USDT</SelectItem>
  1280→                    <SelectItem value="USDC">USDC</SelectItem>
  1281→                    <SelectItem value="ETH">ETH</SelectItem>
  1282→                    <SelectItem value="BTC">BTC</SelectItem>
  1283→                  </SelectContent>
  1284→                </Select>
  1285→              </div>
  1286→            </div>
  1287→
  1288→            <div>
  1289→              <Label className="text-sm">Notes</Label>
  1290→              <Textarea
  1291→                value={form.notes || ''}
  1292→                onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))}
  1293→                placeholder="Additional notes..."
  1294→                className="mt-1"
  1295→                rows={3}
  1296→              />
  1297→            </div>
  1298→          </div>
  1299→
  1300→          <DialogFooter>
  1301→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsCreateOpen(false); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }}>
  1302→              Cancel
  1303→            </Button>
  1304→            <Button
  1305→              onClick={isEdit ? handleUpdate : handleCreate}
  1306→              disabled={isSubmitting || !form.name.trim()}
  1307→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}
  1308→            >
  1309→              {isSubmitting ? 'Saving...' : isEdit ? 'Update' : 'Create'}
  1310→            </Button>
  1311→          </DialogFooter>
  1312→        </DialogContent>
  1313→      </Dialog>
  1314→    );
  1315→  };
  1316→
  1317→  // ============================================
  1318→  // RENDER: Orbit Reason Prompt
  1319→  // ============================================
  1320→
  1321→  const renderOrbitPrompt = () => (
  1322→    <Dialog open={!!orbitPrompt} onOpenChange={open => { if (!open) setOrbitPrompt(null); }}>
  1323→      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-sm">
  1324→        <DialogHeader>
  1325→          <DialogTitle>Move to Orbit</DialogTitle>
  1326→          <DialogDescription>Select the reason for moving this opportunity to orbit.</DialogDescription>
  1327→        </DialogHeader>
  1328→        <Select value={orbitReasonValue} onValueChange={v => setOrbitReasonValue(v as OrbitReason)}>
  1329→          <SelectTrigger><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  1330→          <SelectContent>
  1331→            {ORBIT_REASONS.map(r => (
  1332→              <SelectItem key={r.value} value={r.value}>{r.label}</SelectItem>
  1333→            ))}
  1334→          </SelectContent>
  1335→        </Select>
  1336→        <DialogFooter>
  1337→          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setOrbitPrompt(null)}>Cancel</Button>
  1338→          <Button onClick={confirmOrbit} style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>Confirm</Button>
  1339→        </DialogFooter>
  1340→      </DialogContent>
  1341→    </Dialog>
  1342→  );
  1343→
  1344→  const renderClosedLostPrompt = () => (
  1345→    <Dialog open={!!closedLostPrompt} onOpenChange={open => { if (!open) setClosedLostPrompt(null); }}>
  1346→      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-sm">
  1347→        <DialogHeader>
  1348→          <DialogTitle>Close as Lost</DialogTitle>
  1349→          <DialogDescription>Optionally add a reason for closing this opportunity.</DialogDescription>
  1350→        </DialogHeader>
  1351→        <Input
  1352→          value={closedLostReasonValue}
  1353→          onChange={e => setClosedLostReasonValue(e.target.value)}
  1354→          placeholder="Reason (optional)"
  1355→        />
  1356→        <DialogFooter>
  1357→          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setClosedLostPrompt(null)}>Cancel</Button>
  1358→          <Button onClick={confirmClosedLost} variant="destructive">Close Lost</Button>
  1359→        </DialogFooter>
  1360→      </DialogContent>
  1361→    </Dialog>
  1362→  );
  1363→
  1364→  // ============================================
  1365→  // RENDER: Loading
  1366→  // ============================================
  1367→
  1368→  if (loading) {
  1369→    return (
  1370→      <div className="space-y-6">
  1371→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1372→          <Skeleton className="h-8 w-48" />
  1373→          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-32" />
  1374→        </div>
  1375→        <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
  1376→          {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24" />)}
  1377→        </div>
  1378→        <div className="flex gap-3">
  1379→          {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-[400px] w-[260px]" />)}
  1380→        </div>
  1381→      </div>
  1382→    );
  1383→  }
  1384→
  1385→  // ============================================
  1386→  // MAIN RENDER
  1387→  // ============================================
  1388→
  1389→  return (
  1390→    <div className="space-y-4">
  1391→      {/* Header */}
  1392→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1393→        <div>
  1394→          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
  1395→            <Target className="h-6 w-6 text-[#3e8692]" />
  1396→            Sales Pipeline
  1397→          </h1>
  1398→          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-0.5">Playbook-driven sales pipeline</p>
  1399→        </div>
  1400→        <Button onClick={() => { setForm({ name: '' }); setIsCreateOpen(true); }} style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }}>
  1401→          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> New Opportunity
  1402→        </Button>
  1403→      </div>
  1404→
  1405→      {/* Metrics Bar */}
  1406→      <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  1407→        <Card>
  1408→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1409→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.totalCount}</p>
  1410→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Total Pipeline</p>
  1411→          </CardContent>
  1412→        </Card>
  1413→        <Card>
  1414→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1415→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-700">{metrics.bucketA}</p>
  1416→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Bucket A</p>
  1417→          </CardContent>
  1418→        </Card>
  1419→        <Card>
  1420→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1421→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-700">{metrics.bucketB}</p>
  1422→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Bucket B</p>
  1423→          </CardContent>
  1424→        </Card>
  1425→        <Card>
  1426→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1427→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-600">{metrics.bucketC}</p>
  1428→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Bucket C</p>
  1429→          </CardContent>
  1430→        </Card>
  1431→        <Card>
  1432→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1433→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${metrics.activeValue.toLocaleString()}</p>
  1434→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Active Value</p>
  1435→          </CardContent>
  1436→        </Card>
  1437→        <Card className={metrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'border-red-300 bg-red-50' : ''}>
  1438→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1439→            <p className={`text-2xl font-bold ${metrics.bamfamViolations > 0 ? 'text-red-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
  1440→              {metrics.bamfamViolations}
  1441→            </p>
  1442→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
  1443→              {metrics.bamfamViolations > 0 && <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3 text-red-500" />}
  1444→              BAMFAM
  1445→            </p>
  1446→          </CardContent>
  1447→        </Card>
  1448→      </div>
  1449→
  1450→      {/* Tabs + Controls */}
  1451→      <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={v => setActiveTab(v as 'pipeline' | 'orbit')}>
  1452→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1453→          <TabsList>
  1454→            <TabsTrigger value="pipeline">Pipeline</TabsTrigger>
  1455→            <TabsTrigger value="orbit" className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1456→              Orbit
  1457→              {orbitOpps.length > 0 && (
  1458→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[10px] px-1.5">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
  1459→              )}
  1460→            </TabsTrigger>
  1461→          </TabsList>
  1462→
  1463→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1464→            {/* Search */}
  1465→            <div className="relative">
  1466→              <Search className="absolute left-2.5 top-2.5 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
  1467→              <Input
  1468→                placeholder="Search..."
  1469→                value={searchTerm}
  1470→                onChange={e => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
  1471→                className="pl-9 h-9 w-56 text-sm"
  1472→              />
  1473→            </div>
  1474→
  1475→            {/* Path filter */}
  1476→            {activeTab === 'pipeline' && (
  1477→              <Select value={pathFilter} onValueChange={v => setPathFilter(v as 'all' | 'closer' | 'sdr')}>
  1478→                <SelectTrigger className="h-9 w-40 text-sm">
  1479→                  <SelectValue />
  1480→                </SelectTrigger>
  1481→                <SelectContent>
  1482→                  <SelectItem value="all">All Paths</SelectItem>
  1483→                  <SelectItem value="closer">Path A (Closer)</SelectItem>
  1484→                  <SelectItem value="sdr">Path B (SDR)</SelectItem>
  1485→                </SelectContent>
  1486→              </Select>
  1487→            )}
  1488→
  1489→            {/* View toggle */}
  1490→            {activeTab === 'pipeline' && (
  1491→              <div className="flex border rounded-md">
  1492→                <Button
  1493→                  variant={viewMode === 'kanban' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
  1494→                  size="sm"
  1495→                  className="h-9 px-3"
  1496→                  onClick={() => setViewMode('kanban')}
  1497→                  style={viewMode === 'kanban' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } : {}}
  1498→                >
  1499→                  <LayoutGrid className="h-4 w-4" />
  1500→                </Button>
  1501→                <Button
  1502→                  variant={viewMode === 'table' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
  1503→                  size="sm"
  1504→                  className="h-9 px-3"
  1505→                  onClick={() => setViewMode('table')}
  1506→                  style={viewMode === 'table' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } : {}}
  1507→                >
  1508→                  <TableIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
  1509→                </Button>
  1510→              </div>
  1511→            )}
  1512→          </div>
  1513→        </div>
  1514→
  1515→        <TabsContent value="pipeline" className="mt-4">
  1516→          {viewMode === 'kanban' ? renderKanban() : renderTable()}
  1517→        </TabsContent>
  1518→
  1519→        <TabsContent value="orbit" className="mt-4">
  1520→          {renderOrbitTab()}
  1521→        </TabsContent>
  1522→      </Tabs>
  1523→
  1524→      {/* Dialogs */}
  1525→      {renderFormDialog()}
  1526→      {renderOrbitPrompt()}
  1527→      {renderClosedLostPrompt()}
  1528→
  1529→      {/* Activity Slide-Over */}
  1530→      {renderSlideOver()}
  1531→
  1532→      {/* Slide-over backdrop */}
  1533→      {slideOverOpp && (
  1534→        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 z-40" onClick={() => setSlideOverOpp(null)} />
  1535→      )}
  1536→    </div>
  1537→  );
  1538→}
  1539→
```
</details></tool-use>

<analysis>
Let me go through the conversation chronologically:

1. User provided a detailed implementation plan for "Sales Pipeline v2 — Phase 1a" with 5 steps: database migrations, new service, extend types, new page, sidebar update.

2. I explored the codebase to understand existing patterns (crmService.ts, Sidebar.tsx, pipeline page, layout patterns, dependencies).

3. I read the key files directly: lib/crmService.ts, components/Sidebar.tsx, app/crm/pipeline/layout.tsx

4. Created task list with 4 tasks.

5. Step 1 - Database Migrations via Supabase MCP:
   - Migration 1: Added v2 columns to crm_opportunities (bucket, temperature_score, dm_account, bump_number, etc.) with indexes
   - Migration 2: Created crm_activities table with RLS policies

6. Step 2/3 - Extended OpportunityStage type in crmService.ts:
   - Added v2 stages to the union type
   - Had a duplicate 'nurture' issue that I fixed immediately
   - Updated pipeline page stageLabels and stageColors - initially tried Partial<Record<...>> approach but reverted to full Record with all v2 stages added (cleaner, no TS breakage)

7. Created lib/salesPipelineService.ts - new service file with types, constants, and all service methods

8. User said "Continue from where you left off" - I continued with creating the sales-pipeline page

9. Created app/crm/sales-pipeline/layout.tsx and page.tsx (full implementation)

10. Updated Sidebar.tsx - added Target import and Sales link between Pipeline and Network

11. Build passed cleanly

12. User asked "Are all the things in the integration html file implemented?" - I read the full HTML document and compared against implementation. Found one gap: `is_decision_maker` and `influence_level` on crm_contacts.

13. User said "yes add that migration" - I added the migration via Supabase MCP.

14. User said "now build the app and make sure it compiles" - Build passed.

15. User asked "So is everything implemented?" - I confirmed all Phase 1a items are done.

16. User asked "Can you explain how it works right now?" - I provided a detailed explanation of the full pipeline functionality.

17. User asked "Can you make the ui consistent to the other page's ui" - I launched an Explore agent to study the existing pipeline page's UI patterns in detail. Got comprehensive pattern analysis back. Then I read the full sales-pipeline page.tsx to prepare for the UI consistency update.

The conversation ended with me having read the full sales-pipeline/page.tsx and having the detailed UI pattern analysis from the existing pipeline page. I was about to start making UI consistency changes but the user requested a summary.

Key differences identified between the two pages:
- Header: existing uses h2 not h1, search is in header right side not in tabs area, uses `auth-input` class
- Metrics cards: existing uses gradient backgrounds with icons on right side
- View toggle: existing uses custom div-based toggle matching TabsList style, not Button-based
- Kanban columns: existing uses flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px], collapsible columns with vertical text, bg-gray-50/50 droppable area
- Kanban cards: existing uses border-l-4 accent, GripVertical handle, Building2 icon, more detailed content
- Table: existing uses DnD in table rows with grip handles, checkboxes, add-new-row pattern, stage header has + button
- Dialog: existing uses max-w-md, auth-input class, form tag wrapper, grid gap-4 py-4 pattern
- Loading skeleton: existing uses flex flex-col h-full gap-6, more detailed skeleton structure
- Action menu: existing uses h-8 w-8 p-0, w-48 menu width, h-4 w-4 icons
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user asked to implement "Sales Pipeline v2 — Phase 1a" based on a detailed implementation plan. This involved: database migrations (new columns on crm_opportunities, new crm_activities table), a new service file (salesPipelineService.ts), extending the OpportunityStage type, building a new full-featured page at /crm/sales-pipeline with Kanban/Table/Orbit views, DnD, activity slide-over, and updating the Sidebar. After implementation was complete, the user verified all items from a reference HTML document were implemented (found one gap - decision-maker fields on contacts), asked for build verification, asked for an explanation of functionality, and finally asked to **make the UI consistent with the existing pipeline page's UI**. This last request is the active/pending task.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Next.js App Router with route groups (app/crm/sales-pipeline/)
   - Supabase MCP for database migrations with RLS policies

    66→
    67→// ============================================

    70→
    71→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    72→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    73→  return (
    74→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-[#3e8692] ring-opacity-50' : ''}`}>
    75→      {children}
    76→    </div>
    77→  );
    78→}
    79→
    80→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    81→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    82→  const style = {
    83→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    84→    transition,
    85→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    86→  };
    87→  return (
    88→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
    89→      {children}
    90→    </div>
    91→  );
    92→}
    93→
    94→// ============================================
    95→// Main Page
    96→// ============================================
