   333→    discovery_done: { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200', solid: 'bg-indigo-500' },
   334→    proposal_sent: { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200', solid: 'bg-purple-500' },
   335→    proposal_call: { bg: 'bg-fuchsia-50', text: 'text-fuchsia-700', border: 'border-fuchsia-200', solid: 'bg-fuchsia-500' },
   336→    v2_contract: { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200', solid: 'bg-cyan-500' },
   337→    v2_closed_won: { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200', solid: 'bg-emerald-500' },
   338→    orbit: { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200', solid: 'bg-orange-500' },
   339→    v2_closed_lost: { bg: 'bg-red-50', text: 'text-red-700', border: 'border-red-200', solid: 'bg-red-500' },
   340→  };
   341→
   342→  useEffect(() => {
   343→    fetchData();
   344→  }, []);
   345→
   346→  const fetchData = async () => {
   347→    setLoading(true);
   348→    try {
   349→      const [opps, affs, conts, metricsData, contactLinks, allUsers, allClients] = await Promise.all([
   350→        CRMService.getAllOpportunities(),
   351→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
   352→        CRMService.getAllContacts(),
   353→        CRMService.getOpportunityMetrics(),
   354→        CRMService.getAllContactLinks(),
   355→        UserService.getAllUsers(),
   356→        ClientService.getAllClients()
   357→      ]);
   358→      setOpportunities(opps);
   359→      setAffiliates(affs);
   360→      setContacts(conts);
   361→      setMetrics(metricsData);
   362→      setAllContactLinks(contactLinks);
   363→      setUsers(allUsers);
   364→      setClients(allClients);
   365→    } catch (error) {
   366→      console.error('Error fetching data:', error);
   367→    } finally {
   368→      setLoading(false);
   369→    }
   370→  };
   371→
   372→  const handleCreateOpportunity = async () => {
   373→    if (!opportunityForm.name.trim()) return;
   374→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   375→    try {
   376→      if (editingOpportunity) {
   377→        await CRMService.updateOpportunity(editingOpportunity.id, opportunityForm);
   378→      } else {
   379→        await CRMService.createOpportunity({
   380→          ...opportunityForm,
   381→          owner_id: user?.id
   382→        });
   383→      }
   384→      setIsNewOpportunityOpen(false);
   385→      setEditingOpportunity(null);
   386→      setOpportunityForm({ name: '', stage: 'new' });
   387→      fetchData();
   388→    } catch (error) {
   389→      console.error('Error saving opportunity:', error);
   390→    } finally {
   391→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   392→    }
   393→  };
   394→
   395→  const handleEditOpportunity = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   396→    setEditingOpportunity(opp);
   397→    const isDeal = dealStages.includes(opp.stage) || accountStages.includes(opp.stage);
   398→    setOpportunityType(isDeal ? 'deal' : 'lead');
   399→    setOpportunityForm({
   400→      name: opp.name,
   401→      stage: opp.stage,
   402→      account_type: opp.account_type || undefined,
   403→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   404→      currency: opp.currency,
   405→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   406→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   407→      gc: opp.gc || undefined,
   408→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   409→      client_id: opp.client_id || undefined,
   410→      scope: opp.scope || undefined,
   411→      notes: opp.notes || undefined
   412→    });
   413→    setIsNewOpportunityOpen(true);
   414→  };
   415→
   416→  const handleDeleteOpportunity = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   417→    setOpportunityToDelete({ id: opp.id, name: opp.name });
   418→    setIsDeleteDialogOpen(true);
   419→  };
   420→
   421→  const confirmDeleteOpportunity = async () => {
   422→    if (!opportunityToDelete) return;
   423→    try {
   424→      await CRMService.deleteOpportunity(opportunityToDelete.id);
   425→      setIsDeleteDialogOpen(false);
   426→      setOpportunityToDelete(null);
   427→      fetchData();
   428→    } catch (error) {
   429→      console.error('Error deleting opportunity:', error);
   430→    }
   431→  };
   432→
   433→  const confirmBulkDelete = async () => {
   434→    if (selectedOpportunities.length === 0) return;
   435→    try {
   436→      await Promise.all(selectedOpportunities.map(id => CRMService.deleteOpportunity(id)));
   437→      setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen(false);
   438→      setSelectedOpportunities([]);
   439→      setBulkEdit({});
   440→      fetchData();
   441→    } catch (error) {
   442→      console.error('Error bulk deleting opportunities:', error);
   443→    }
   444→  };
   445→
   446→  const handleMoveStage = async (opp: CRMOpportunity, newStage: OpportunityStage) => {
   447→    // If moving to qualified, show convert to deal dialog
   448→    if (newStage === 'qualified' && opp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   449→      // First move to qualified
   450→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   451→      // Then ask if they want to convert to deal
   452→      setOpportunityToConvert({ ...opp, stage: 'qualified' });
   453→      setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   454→      return;
   455→    }
   456→
   457→    // If moving to closed_won (deal won), show convert to account dialog
   458→    if (newStage === 'closed_won' && opp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(opp.stage)) {
   459→      // First move to closed_won
   460→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   461→      // Then ask if they want to convert to account
   462→      setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...opp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   463→      setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   464→      return;
   465→    }
   466→
   467→    await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   468→  };
   469→
   470→  const performStageMove = async (opp: CRMOpportunity, newStage: OpportunityStage) => {
   471→    const oldStage = opp.stage;
   472→
   473→    // Preserve scroll position
   474→    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   475→    const scrollTop = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   476→
   477→    // Optimistic update - update UI immediately
   478→    setOpportunities(prev =>
   479→      prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, stage: newStage } : o)
   480→    );
   481→
   482→    // Restore scroll position after React re-render
   483→    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   484→      if (scrollContainer) {
   485→        scrollContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
   486→      }
   487→    });
   488→
   489→    try {
   490→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(opp.id, { stage: newStage });
   491→    } catch (error) {
   492→      console.error('Error moving stage:', error);
   493→      // Revert on error
   494→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   495→        prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, stage: oldStage } : o)
   496→      );
   497→    }
   498→  };
   499→
```
</details></tool-use>

   222→  const handleUpdate = async () => {
   223→    if (!editingOpp || !form.name.trim()) return;
   224→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   225→    try {
   226→      await SalesPipelineService.update(editingOpp.id, form);
   227→      setEditingOpp(null);

   229→      await fetchData();

   231→      alert(err.message || 'Error updating opportunity');

   233→      setIsSubmitting(false);

   235→  };
   236→
   237→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   238→    if (!confirm('Delete this opportunity?')) return;
   239→    try {
   240→      await SalesPipelineService.delete(id);
   241→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === id) setSlideOverOpp(null);
   242→      await fetchData();
   243→    } catch (err) {
   244→      console.error('Error deleting:', err);

   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const handleStageChange = async (oppId: string, newStage: SalesPipelineStage, currentStage: string) => {
   249→    if (newStage === 'orbit') {
   250→      setOrbitPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   251→      return;
   252→    }
   253→    if (newStage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   254→      setClosedLostPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   255→      return;
   256→    }
   257→    try {
   258→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { stage: newStage as OpportunityStage });
   259→      await fetchData();
   260→    } catch (err) {
   261→      console.error('Error changing stage:', err);
   262→    }
   263→  };
   264→
   265→  const confirmOrbit = async () => {
   266→    if (!orbitPrompt) return;

   268→      await SalesPipelineService.update(orbitPrompt.oppId, {
   269→        stage: 'orbit' as OpportunityStage,
   270→        orbit_reason: orbitReasonValue,
   271→      });
   272→      setOrbitPrompt(null);
   273→      setOrbitReasonValue('no_response');
   274→      await fetchData();
   275→    } catch (err) {
   276→      console.error('Error moving to orbit:', err);
   277→    }
   278→  };
   279→
   280→  const confirmClosedLost = async () => {
   281→    if (!closedLostPrompt) return;

   283→      await SalesPipelineService.update(closedLostPrompt.oppId, {
   284→        stage: 'v2_closed_lost' as OpportunityStage,
   285→        closed_lost_reason: closedLostReasonValue || undefined,
   286→      });
   287→      setClosedLostPrompt(null);
   288→      setClosedLostReasonValue('');
   289→      await fetchData();
   290→    } catch (err) {
   291→      console.error('Error closing lost:', err);

   293→  };
   294→
   295→  const handleResurrect = async (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {

   298→        stage: 'cold_dm' as OpportunityStage,
   299→        orbit_reason: null,
   300→      });

   302→    } catch (err) {
   303→      console.error('Error resurrecting:', err);

   306→

   312→        await fetchActivities(oppId);

   317→    } catch (err) {
   318→      console.error('Error recording bump:', err);
   319→    }
   320→  };
   321→
   322→  const handleAddActivity = async () => {

   324→    setIsActivitySubmitting(true);

   326→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
   327→        ...activityForm,
   328→        opportunity_id: slideOverOpp.id,
   329→      });
   330→      setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: '', type: 'note', title: '' });
   331→      await fetchActivities(slideOverOpp.id);
   332→    } catch (err) {
   333→      console.error('Error adding activity:', err);
   334→    } finally {
   335→      setIsActivitySubmitting(false);
   336→    }
   337→  };
   338→
   339→  const handleInlineEdit = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: string) => {
   340→    try {
   341→      const updates: any = {};
   342→      if (field === 'deal_value') {
   343→        updates.deal_value = value ? parseFloat(value) : null;
   344→      } else if (field === 'temperature_score') {
   345→        updates.temperature_score = parseInt(value) || 50;
   346→      } else {
   347→        updates[field] = value || null;
   348→      }
   349→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, updates);
   350→      await fetchData();
   351→    } catch (err) {
   352→      console.error('Error inline edit:', err);
   353→    }
   354→    setEditingCell(null);
   355→  };
   356→
   357→  // ============================================
   358→  // DnD Handlers
   359→  // ============================================
   360→
   361→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   362→    const id = event.active.id as string;
   363→    setActiveId(id);
   364→    setActiveOpportunity(opportunities.find(o => o.id === id) || null);
   365→  };
   366→
   367→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   368→    const { active, over } = event;
   369→    setActiveId(null);
   370→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   371→
   372→    if (!over) return;
   373→
   374→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   375→    const overId = over.id as string;
   376→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   377→    if (!opp) return;
   378→
   379→    // Check if dropped on a stage column
   380→    const isStageColumn = ALL_V2_STAGES.includes(overId as SalesPipelineStage);
   381→
   382→    if (isStageColumn) {
   383→      const newStage = overId as SalesPipelineStage;
   384→      if (opp.stage !== newStage) {
   385→        await handleStageChange(oppId, newStage, opp.stage);
   386→      }
   387→    } else {
   388→      // Dropped on another card — reorder within same stage
   389→      const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   390→      if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage === opp.stage) {
   391→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage);
   392→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === oppId);
   393→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === overId);
   394→        if (oldIndex !== -1 && newIndex !== -1) {
   395→          const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   396→          const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
   397→          await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
   398→          await fetchData();
   399→        }
   400→      } else if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage !== opp.stage) {
   401→        // Dropped on card in different stage
   402→        await handleStageChange(oppId, targetOpp.stage as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage);
   403→      }
   404→    }
   405→  };
   406→
   407→  // ============================================
   408→  // Open slide-over
   409→  // ============================================
   410→
   411→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   412→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   413→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   414→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
   415→  };
   416→
   417→  const openEditDialog = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   418→    setEditingOpp(opp);
   419→    setForm({
   420→      name: opp.name,
   421→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   422→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   423→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   424→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   425→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   426→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   427→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   428→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   429→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   430→      currency: opp.currency,
   431→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   432→    });
   433→  };
   434→
   435→  // ============================================
   436→  // BAMFAM check
   437→  // ============================================
   438→
   439→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   440→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   441→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   442→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   443→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   444→  };
   445→
   446→  // ============================================
   447→  // Helpers
   448→  // ============================================
   449→
   450→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
   451→    if (!userId) return '—';
   452→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
   453→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
   454→  };
   455→
   456→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
   457→    switch (type) {
   458→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   459→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   460→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   461→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   462→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   463→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   464→    }
   465→  };
   466→
   467→  // ============================================
   468→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
   469→  // ============================================
   470→
   471→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   472→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
   473→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
   474→
   475→    return (
   476→      <Card
   477→        className={`cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-shadow border ${bamfam ? 'border-red-300 bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
   478→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   479→      >
   480→        <CardContent className="p-3 space-y-2">
   481→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
   482→            <span className="font-medium text-sm truncate flex-1">{opp.name}</span>
   483→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 ml-2 flex-shrink-0">
   484→              {opp.bucket && (
   485→                <Badge className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   486→                  {opp.bucket}
   487→                </Badge>
   488→              )}
   489→              {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
   490→                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 border-blue-300 text-blue-600">C</Badge>
   491→              )}
   492→              {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
   493→                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 border-green-300 text-green-600">S</Badge>
   494→              )}
   495→            </div>
   496→          </div>
   497→
   498→          {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
   499→          {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
```

   524→  const handleInlineUpdate = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: any) => {
   525→    // Preserve scroll position
   526→    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   527→    const scrollTop = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   528→
   529→    try {
   530→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   531→        prev.map(o => {
   532→          if (o.id !== oppId) return o;
   533→
   534→          const updates: Partial<CRMOpportunity> = { [field]: value || null };
   535→
   536→          // Handle related object updates for display
   537→          if (field === 'client_id') {
   538→            const selectedClient = clients.find(c => c.id === value);
   539→            updates.client = selectedClient ? { id: selectedClient.id, name: selectedClient.name } : null;
   540→          } else if (field === 'affiliate_id') {
   541→            const selectedAffiliate = affiliates.find(a => a.id === value);
   542→            updates.affiliate = selectedAffiliate || null;
   543→          }
   544→
   545→          return { ...o, ...updates };
   546→        })
   547→      );
   548→
   549→      // Restore scroll position after React re-render
   550→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   551→        if (scrollContainer) {
   552→          scrollContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
   553→        }
   554→      });
   555→
   556→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(oppId, { [field]: value || null });
   557→    } catch (error) {
   558→      console.error('Error updating field:', error);
   559→    }
   560→    setEditingCell(null);
   561→    setEditingValue('');

   563→
   564→  // Bulk update handler
   565→  const handleBulkUpdate = async () => {
   566→    if (selectedOpportunities.length === 0 || Object.keys(bulkEdit).length === 0) return;
   567→
   568→    // Filter out undefined values
   569→    const updates: Record<string, any> = {};
   570→    Object.entries(bulkEdit).forEach(([key, value]) => {
   571→      if (value !== undefined) {
   572→        updates[key] = value;
   573→      }
   574→    });
   575→
   576→    if (Object.keys(updates).length === 0) return;
   577→
   578→    try {
   579→      // Optimistic update
   580→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   581→        prev.map(o => selectedOpportunities.includes(o.id) ? { ...o, ...updates } : o)
   582→      );
   583→
   584→      // Update in database
   585→      await Promise.all(
   586→        selectedOpportunities.map(id => CRMService.updateOpportunity(id, updates))
   587→      );
   588→
   589→      // Clear selection and bulk edit
   590→      setSelectedOpportunities([]);
   591→      setBulkEdit({});
   592→    } catch (error) {
   593→      console.error('Error bulk updating:', error);
   594→    }
   595→  };
   596→
   597→  const startEditing = (id: string, field: string, currentValue: string | number | null | undefined) => {
   598→    setEditingCell({ id, field });
   599→    setEditingValue(currentValue?.toString() || '');
   600→  };
   601→
   602→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent, oppId: string, field: string) => {
   603→    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   604→      e.preventDefault();
   605→      const value = field === 'deal_value' ? (parseFloat(editingValue) || null) : editingValue;
   606→      handleInlineUpdate(oppId, field, value);
   607→    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   608→      setEditingCell(null);
   609→      setEditingValue('');
   610→    }
   611→  };
   612→
   613→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   614→    const { active } = event;
   615→    setActiveId(active.id as string);
   616→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === active.id);
   617→    setActiveOpportunity(opp || null);
   618→  };
   619→
   620→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   621→    const { active, over } = event;
   622→    setActiveId(null);
   623→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   624→
   625→    if (!over) return;
   626→
   627→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   628→    const newStage = over.id as OpportunityStage;
   629→
   630→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   631→    if (!opp || opp.stage === newStage) return;
   632→
   633→    // Check if the move is valid (leads can only move to lead stages, deals to deal stages)
   634→    const isLeadStage = leadStages.includes(newStage);
   635→    const isDealStage = dealStages.includes(newStage);
   636→    const oppIsLead = leadStages.includes(opp.stage);
   637→    const oppIsDeal = dealStages.includes(opp.stage);
   638→
   639→    // Allow moving within same category, or from qualified to deal_qualified (converting lead to deal)
   640→    if (oppIsLead && !isLeadStage && !(opp.stage === 'qualified' && newStage === 'deal_qualified')) {
   641→      return;
   642→    }
   643→    if (oppIsDeal && !isDealStage) {
   644→      return;
   645→    }
   646→
   647→    // If moving to qualified, show convert to deal dialog after the move
   648→    if (newStage === 'qualified' && opp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   649→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   650→      setOpportunityToConvert({ ...opp, stage: 'qualified' });
   651→      setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   652→      return;
   653→    }
   654→
   655→    await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   656→  };
   657→
   658→  // Handler for table row reordering (supports cross-stage dragging)
   659→  const handleTableRowDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   660→    const { active, over } = event;
   661→    setActiveId(null);
   662→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   663→
   664→    if (!over) return;
   665→
   666→    const draggedOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === active.id);
   667→    if (!draggedOpp) return;
   668→
   669→    const overId = over.id as string;
   670→
   671→    // Check if dropped on a stage droppable (stage name)
   672→    const isStageDroppable = currentStages.includes(overId as OpportunityStage);
   673→
   674→    // Check if dropped on another opportunity
   675→    const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   676→
   677→    if (isStageDroppable) {
   678→      // Dropped on a stage area - move to that stage
   679→      const newStage = overId as OpportunityStage;
   680→      if (draggedOpp.stage !== newStage) {
   681→        // If moving to qualified, show convert dialog
   682→        if (newStage === 'qualified' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   683→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   684→          setOpportunityToConvert({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'qualified' });
   685→          setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   686→          return;
   687→        }
   688→
   689→        // If moving to closed_won, show convert to account dialog
   690→        if (newStage === 'closed_won' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(draggedOpp.stage)) {
   691→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   692→          setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   693→          setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   694→          return;
   695→        }
   696→
   697→        await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   698→      }
   699→    } else if (targetOpp) {
   700→      // Dropped on another opportunity
   701→      const sourceStage = draggedOpp.stage;
   702→      const targetStage = targetOpp.stage;
   703→
   704→      if (sourceStage === targetStage) {
   705→        // Same stage - reorder within stage
   706→        const stageOpps = currentOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === sourceStage);
   707→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === active.id);
   708→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === over.id);
   709→
   710→        if (oldIndex === -1 || newIndex === -1 || oldIndex === newIndex) return;
   711→
   712→        const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   713→        const positionUpdates = reordered.map((opp, index) => ({
   714→          id: opp.id,
   715→          position: index
   716→        }));
   717→
   718→        setOpportunities(prev => {
   719→          const otherOpps = prev.filter(o => o.stage !== sourceStage);
   720→          const updatedOpps = reordered.map((opp, index) => ({
   721→            ...opp,
   722→            position: index
   723→          }));
   724→          return [...updatedOpps, ...otherOpps];
   725→        });
   726→
   727→        try {
   728→          await CRMService.updateOpportunityPositions(positionUpdates);
   729→        } catch (error) {
   730→          console.error('Error updating positions:', error);
   731→          const freshData = await CRMService.getAllOpportunities();
   732→          setOpportunities(freshData);
   733→        }
   734→      } else {
   735→        // Different stage - move to target stage at target position
   736→        // If moving to qualified, show convert dialog
   737→        if (targetStage === 'qualified' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   738→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   739→          setOpportunityToConvert({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'qualified' });
   740→          setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   741→          return;
   742→        }
   743→
   744→        // If moving to closed_won, show convert to account dialog
   745→        if (targetStage === 'closed_won' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(draggedOpp.stage)) {
   746→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   747→          setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   748→          setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   749→          return;
   750→        }
   751→
   752→        await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   753→      }
   754→    }
   755→  };
   756→
   757→  const handleOpenContactLink = async (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   758→    setLinkingOpportunity(opp);
   759→    setSelectedContactId('');
   760→    setContactRole('');
   761→    setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   762→    try {
   763→      const links = await CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(opp.id);
   764→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   765→    } catch (error) {
   766→      console.error('Error fetching contacts:', error);
   767→      setOpportunityContacts([]);
   768→    }
   769→    setIsContactLinkOpen(true);
   770→  };
   771→
   772→  const handleLinkContact = async () => {
   773→    if (!linkingOpportunity || !selectedContactId) return;
   774→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   775→    try {
   776→      await CRMService.linkContactToOpportunity(
   777→        selectedContactId,
   778→        linkingOpportunity.id,
   779→        contactRole || undefined,
   780→        isPrimaryContact
   781→      );
   782→      const links = await CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id);
   783→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   784→      setSelectedContactId('');
   785→      setContactRole('');
   786→      setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   787→    } catch (error) {
   788→      console.error('Error linking contact:', error);
   789→    } finally {
   790→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   791→    }
   792→  };
   793→
   794→  const handleUnlinkContact = async (linkId: string) => {
   795→    if (!linkingOpportunity) return;
   796→    try {
   797→      await CRMService.unlinkContact(linkId);
   798→      const links = await CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id);
   799→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   800→    } catch (error) {
   801→      console.error('Error unlinking contact:', error);
   802→    }
   803→  };
   804→
   805→  const handleCreateAndLinkContact = async () => {
   806→    if (!linkingOpportunity || !newContactForm.name.trim()) return;
   807→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   808→    try {
   809→      // Create the new contact
   810→      const newContact = await CRMService.createContact({
   811→        ...newContactForm,
   812→        owner_id: user?.id
   813→      });
   814→
   815→      // Link the new contact to the opportunity
   816→      await CRMService.linkContactToOpportunity(
   817→        newContact.id,
   818→        linkingOpportunity.id,
   819→        contactRole || undefined,
   820→        isPrimaryContact
   821→      );
   822→
   823→      // Refresh contacts list
   824→      const [allConts, links] = await Promise.all([
   825→        CRMService.getAllContacts(),
   826→        CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id)
   827→      ]);
   828→      setContacts(allConts);
   829→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   830→
   831→      // Reset form
   832→      setNewContactForm({ name: '' });
   833→      setContactRole('');
   834→      setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   835→      setContactMode('link');
   836→    } catch (error) {
   837→      console.error('Error creating and linking contact:', error);
   838→    } finally {
   839→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   840→    }
   841→  };
   842→
   843→  const handleOpenHistory = async (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   844→    setHistoryOpportunity(opp);
   845→    try {
   846→      const history = await CRMService.getStageHistory('opportunity', opp.id);
   847→      setStageHistory(history);
   848→    } catch (error) {
   849→      console.error('Error fetching history:', error);
   850→      setStageHistory([]);
   851→    }
   852→    setIsHistoryOpen(true);
   853→  };
   854→
   855→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities
   856→    .filter(o => {
   857→      // Search filter
   858→      if (searchTerm && !o.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) {
   859→        return false;
   860→      }
   861→      // Source filter
   862→      if (filterSource !== 'all' && o.source !== filterSource) {
   863→        return false;
   864→      }
   865→      // Account type filter
   866→      if (filterAccountType !== 'all' && o.account_type !== filterAccountType) {
   867→        return false;
   868→      }
   869→      // Affiliate filter
   870→      if (filterAffiliate !== 'all' && o.affiliate_id !== filterAffiliate) {
   871→        return false;
   872→      }
   873→      return true;
   874→    })
   875→    .sort((a, b) => {
   876→      switch (sortBy) {
   877→        case 'position':
   878→          return (a.position || 0) - (b.position || 0);
   879→        case 'created_desc':
   880→          return new Date(b.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.created_at).getTime();
   881→        case 'created_asc':
   882→          return new Date(a.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.created_at).getTime();
   883→        case 'name_asc':
   884→          return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
   885→        case 'name_desc':
   886→          return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
   887→        case 'value_desc':
   888→          return (b.deal_value || 0) - (a.deal_value || 0);
   889→        case 'value_asc':
   890→          return (a.deal_value || 0) - (b.deal_value || 0);
   891→        default:
   892→          // Default to position-based ordering
   893→          return (a.position || 0) - (b.position || 0);
   894→      }
   895→    });
   896→
   897→  const getOpportunitiesByStage = (stage: OpportunityStage) =>
   898→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
```
</details></tool-use>

   585→              </div>

   589→
   590→        {/* Orbit drop zone */}

   592→          <div className="rounded-lg border border-orange-200 bg-white">

   638→
   639→  const renderTable = () => (
   640→    <div className="space-y-4">
   641→      {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {

   643→        const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
   644→        const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);

   646→        return (
   647→          <div key={stage} className="border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
   648→            <button
   649→              onClick={() => {
   650→                const next = new Set(collapsedStages);
   651→                isCollapsed ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   652→                setCollapsedStages(next);
   653→              }}
   654→              className={`w-full px-4 py-2 flex items-center justify-between ${colors.bg} border-b ${colors.border}`}
   655→            >
   656→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   657→                {isCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" /> : <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4" />}
   658→                <div className={`w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`} />
   659→                <span className={`font-semibold text-sm ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</span>
   660→                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
   661→              </div>
   662→              {stageOpps.length > 0 && (
   663→                <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
   664→                  ${stageOpps.reduce((s, o) => s + (o.deal_value || 0), 0).toLocaleString()}
   665→                </span>
   666→              )}
   667→            </button>
   668→
   669→            {!isCollapsed && (
   670→              <Table>
   671→                <TableHeader>
   672→                  <TableRow className="text-xs">
   673→                    <TableHead className="w-[200px]">Name</TableHead>
   674→                    <TableHead className="w-[60px]">Bucket</TableHead>
   675→                    <TableHead className="w-[60px]">DM</TableHead>
   676→                    <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Temp</TableHead>
   677→                    <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Value</TableHead>
   678→                    <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Owner</TableHead>
   679→                    <TableHead className="w-[100px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
   680→                    {stage === 'cold_dm' && <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>}
   681→                    <TableHead className="w-[80px]">BAMFAM</TableHead>
   682→                    <TableHead className="w-[40px]"></TableHead>
   683→                  </TableRow>
   684→                </TableHeader>
   685→                <TableBody>
   686→                  {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
   687→                    <TableRow>
   688→                      <TableCell colSpan={10} className="text-center text-xs text-gray-400 py-4">
   689→                        No opportunities in this stage
   690→                      </TableCell>
   691→                    </TableRow>
   692→                  ) : stageOpps.map(opp => (
   693→                    <TableRow
   694→                      key={opp.id}
   695→                      className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50 text-xs"
   696→                      onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   697→                    >
   698→                      <TableCell className="font-medium">
   699→                        {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'name' ? (
   700→                          <Input
   701→                            value={editingValue}
   702→                            onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   703→                            onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
   704→                            onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
   705→                            className="h-7 text-xs"
   706→                            autoFocus
   707→                            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   708→                          />
   709→                        ) : (
   710→                          <span
   711→                            className="hover:underline"
   712→                            onDoubleClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' }); setEditingValue(opp.name); }}
   713→                          >
   714→                            {opp.name}
   715→                          </span>
   716→                        )}
   717→                      </TableCell>
   718→                      <TableCell>
   719→                        {opp.bucket && (

   722→                          </Badge>
   723→                        )}

   725→                      <TableCell>
   726→                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0">

   737→                          </div>
   738→                          <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
   739→                        </div>

   741→                      <TableCell>

   745→                            value={editingValue}

   749→                            className="h-7 text-xs w-20"
   750→                            autoFocus
   751→                            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   752→                          />
   753→                        ) : (
   754→                          <span
   755→                            onDoubleClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'deal_value' }); setEditingValue(String(opp.deal_value || '')); }}
   756→                          >
   757→                            {opp.deal_value ? `$${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}` : '—'}
   758→                          </span>
   759→                        )}
   760→                      </TableCell>
   761→                      <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
   762→                      <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</TableCell>
   763→                      {stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   764→                        <TableCell>
   765→                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   766→                            <span>{opp.bump_number}/4</span>
   767→                            <div className="flex gap-0.5">
   768→                              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
   769→                                <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
   770→                              ))}
   771→                            </div>
   772→                          </div>
   773→                        </TableCell>
   774→                      )}
   775→                      <TableCell>
   776→                        {isBAMFAM(opp) ? (
   777→                          <span className="text-red-600 flex items-center gap-1">
   778→                            <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
   779→                          </span>
   780→                        ) : (
   781→                          <span className="text-green-600 text-[10px]">OK</span>
   782→                        )}
   783→                      </TableCell>
   784→                      <TableCell>
   785→                        <DropdownMenu>
   786→                          <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   787→                            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 w-6 p-0">
   788→                              <MoreHorizontal className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   789→                            </Button>
   790→                          </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   791→                          <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
   792→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
   793→                              <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Edit
   794→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   795→                            {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (

   798→                              </DropdownMenuItem>
   799→                            )}
   800→                            <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   801→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage); }} className="text-orange-600">
   802→                              <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Move to Orbit
   803→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   804→                            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
   805→                              <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2" /> Delete
   806→                            </DropdownMenuItem>
   807→                          </DropdownMenuContent>
   808→                        </DropdownMenu>
   809→                      </TableCell>
   810→                    </TableRow>
   811→                  ))}
   812→                </TableBody>
   813→              </Table>
   814→            )}
   815→          </div>

   900→  // Check if any filters are active

   910→
   911→  // Mark opportunity as contacted
   912→  const handleMarkContacted = async (oppId: string) => {
   913→    try {
   914→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(oppId, {
   915→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString()
   916→      });
   917→      // Optimistic update
   918→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   919→        prev.map(o => o.id === oppId ? { ...o, last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString() } : o)
   920→      );
   921→    } catch (error) {
   922→      console.error('Error updating last contacted:', error);
   923→    }
   924→  };
   925→
   926→  // Count outreach: new stage with cold_outreach source
   927→  const totalOutreach = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'new' && o.source === 'cold_outreach').length;
   928→  // Count leads: lead stages excluding cold_outreach new leads
   929→  const totalLeads = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => {
   930→    if (o.stage === 'new' && o.source === 'cold_outreach') return false;
   931→    return leadStages.includes(o.stage);
   932→  }).length;
   933→  const totalDeals = dealStages.reduce((sum, stage) => sum + getOpportunitiesByStage(stage).length, 0);
   934→  const totalAccounts = accountStages.reduce((sum, stage) => sum + getOpportunitiesByStage(stage).length, 0);
   935→  const totalDealValue = filteredOpportunities
   936→    .filter(o => dealStages.includes(o.stage))
   937→    .reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   938→
   939→  const formatCurrency = (value: number) => {
   940→    return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
   941→      style: 'currency',
   942→      currency: 'USD',
   943→      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
   944→      maximumFractionDigits: 0
   945→    }).format(value);
   946→  };
   947→
   948→  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
   949→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString('en-US', {
   950→      month: 'short',
   951→      day: 'numeric',
   952→      year: 'numeric',
   953→      hour: '2-digit',
   954→      minute: '2-digit'
   955→    });
   956→  };
   957→
   958→  const formatShortDate = (dateString: string) => {
   959→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
   960→      month: 'short',
   961→      day: 'numeric'
   962→    });
   963→  };
   964→
   965→  const formatSource = (source: string) => {
   966→    return source
   967→      .split('_')
   968→      .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1))
   969→      .join(' ');
   970→  };
   971→
   972→  const getNextStage = (currentStage: OpportunityStage): OpportunityStage | null => {
   973→    const leadIndex = leadStages.indexOf(currentStage);
   974→    const dealIndex = dealStages.indexOf(currentStage);
   975→
   976→    if (leadIndex >= 0 && leadIndex < leadStages.length - 1) {
   977→      return leadStages[leadIndex + 1];
   978→    }
   979→    if (dealIndex >= 0 && dealIndex < dealStages.length - 1) {
   980→      return dealStages[dealIndex + 1];
   981→    }
   982→    return null;
   983→  };
   984→
   985→  // Get linked contacts for an opportunity
   986→  const getOpportunityContacts = (oppId: string) => {
   987→    return allContactLinks.filter(link => link.opportunity_id === oppId);
   988→  };
   989→
   990→  // Get primary contact for an opportunity
   991→  const getPrimaryContact = (oppId: string) => {
   992→    const links = getOpportunityContacts(oppId);
   993→    return links.find(l => l.is_primary)?.contact || links[0]?.contact || null;
   994→  };
   995→
   996→  // Get current stages based on active tab
   997→  const currentStages = (() => {
   998→    switch (activeTab) {
   999→      case 'outreach': return outreachStages;
  1000→      case 'leads': return leadStages;
  1001→      case 'deals': return dealStages;
  1002→      case 'accounts': return accountStages;
  1003→      default: return leadStages;
  1004→    }
  1005→  })();
  1006→
  1007→  // Get current view mode based on active tab
  1008→  const currentViewMode = (() => {
  1009→    switch (activeTab) {
  1010→      case 'outreach': return outreachViewMode;
  1011→      case 'leads': return leadsViewMode;
  1012→      case 'deals': return dealsViewMode;
  1013→      case 'accounts': return accountsViewMode;
  1014→      default: return leadsViewMode;
  1015→    }
  1016→  })();
  1017→
  1018→  const setCurrentViewMode = (mode: 'kanban' | 'table') => {
  1019→    switch (activeTab) {
  1020→      case 'outreach': setOutreachViewMode(mode); break;
  1021→      case 'leads': setLeadsViewMode(mode); break;
  1022→      case 'deals': setDealsViewMode(mode); break;
  1023→      case 'accounts': setAccountsViewMode(mode); break;
  1024→    }
  1025→  };
  1026→
  1027→  const currentOpportunities = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => {
  1028→    // Outreach tab: show only 'new' stage with source 'cold_outreach'
  1029→    if (activeTab === 'outreach') {
  1030→      return o.stage === 'new' && o.source === 'cold_outreach';
  1031→    }
  1032→    // Leads tab: show lead stages but exclude cold_outreach new leads (they're in outreach)
  1033→    if (activeTab === 'leads') {
  1034→      if (o.stage === 'new' && o.source === 'cold_outreach') {
  1035→        return false;
  1036→      }
  1037→      return leadStages.includes(o.stage);
  1038→    }
  1039→    // Deals and Accounts: filter by their respective stages
  1040→    return currentStages.includes(o.stage);
  1041→  });

  1046→  const renderOpportunityCardContent = (opp: CRMOpportunity, isDeal: boolean = false, isDragging: boolean = false) => {

  1048→
  1049→    return (
  1050→      <Card
  1051→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''}`}
  1052→      >
  1053→        <CardContent className="p-4">
  1054→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
  1055→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1056→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
  1057→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1058→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
  1059→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1060→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
  1061→              </div>
  1062→
  1063→              {/* Deal Value */}

  1067→                </p>
  1068→              )}
  1069→
  1070→              {/* Badges: Source, Account Type, Affiliate */}
  1071→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
  1072→                {opp.source && (
  1073→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">
  1074→                    {formatSource(opp.source)}
  1075→                  </Badge>
  1076→                )}
  1077→                {opp.account_type && (
  1078→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white">

  1080→                  </Badge>
  1081→                )}
  1082→                {opp.affiliate && (
  1083→                  <Badge
  1084→                    className="text-xs"
  1085→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  1086→                  >
  1087→                    {opp.affiliate.name}
  1088→                  </Badge>
  1089→                )}
  1090→              </div>
  1091→
  1092→              {/* Details: Referrer, Group Chat, Notes */}
  1093→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
  1094→                {opp.referrer && (
  1095→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1096→                    <Users className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1097→                    <span>Referred by: {opp.referrer}</span>
  1098→                  </div>
  1099→                )}
  1100→                {opp.gc && (
  1101→                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
  1102→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
  1103→                      <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-blue-500" />
  1104→                      <span className="font-medium">TG Connected</span>
  1105→                    </div>
  1106→                    <div className="ml-4 text-xs space-y-0.5">
  1107→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1108→                        <span>Lead:</span>
  1109→                        <span className={opp.last_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1110→                          {opp.last_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_message_at) : '-'}
  1111→                        </span>
  1112→                      </div>
  1113→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">
  1114→                        <span>Team:</span>
  1115→                        <span className={opp.last_team_message_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>
  1116→                          {opp.last_team_message_at ? formatShortDate(opp.last_team_message_at) : '-'}
  1117→                        </span>
  1118→                      </div>
  1119→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-gray-500">

  1121→                        <span className={opp.last_reply_at ? 'text-gray-700' : 'text-gray-400'}>

  1123→                        </span>

  1178→  // RENDER: Draggable Opportunity Card
  1179→  // ============================================
  1180→  const DraggableCard = ({ opp, isDeal }: { opp: CRMOpportunity; isDeal: boolean }) => {
  1181→    const {
  1182→      attributes,
  1183→      listeners,
  1184→      setNodeRef,
  1185→      transform,
  1186→      transition,
  1187→      isDragging,
  1188→    } = useSortable({ id: opp.id });
  1189→
  1190→    const style = {
  1191→      transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
  1192→      transition,
  1193→      opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
  1194→    };
  1195→
  1196→    return (
  1197→      <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
  1198→        {renderOpportunityCardContent(opp, isDeal, isDragging)}
  1199→      </div>
  1200→    );
  1201→  };
  1202→
  1203→  // ============================================
  1204→  // RENDER: Action Menu (shared across views)
  1205→  // ============================================
  1206→  const renderActionMenu = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => (
  1207→    <DropdownMenu>
  1208→      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
  1209→        <Button
  1210→          variant="ghost"
  1211→          size="sm"
  1212→          className="h-8 w-8 p-0"
  1213→        >
  1214→          <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
  1215→        </Button>
  1216→      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  1217→      <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
  1218→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleEditOpportunity(opp)}>
  1219→          <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1220→          Edit
  1221→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1222→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenContactLink(opp)}>
  1223→          <Users className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1224→          Manage Contacts
  1225→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1226→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleOpenHistory(opp)}>
  1227→          <History className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1228→          View History
  1229→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1230→        <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMarkContacted(opp.id)}>
  1231→          <Phone className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1232→          Mark as Contacted
  1233→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1234→        {getNextStage(opp.stage) && (
  1235→          <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, getNextStage(opp.stage)!)}>
  1236→            <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1237→            Move to {stageLabels[getNextStage(opp.stage)!]}
  1238→          </DropdownMenuItem>
  1239→        )}
  1240→        {opp.stage === 'contract' && (
  1241→          <>
  1242→            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, 'closed_won')}>
  1243→              <Award className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-emerald-600" />
  1244→              Mark as Won
  1245→            </DropdownMenuItem>
  1246→            <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => handleMoveStage(opp, 'closed_lost')}>
  1247→              <X className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 text-red-600" />
  1248→              Mark as Lost
  1249→            </DropdownMenuItem>
  1250→          </>
  1251→        )}
  1252→        <DropdownMenuItem
  1253→          className="text-red-600"
  1254→          onClick={() => handleDeleteOpportunity(opp)}
  1255→        >
  1256→          <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
  1257→          Delete
  1258→        </DropdownMenuItem>
  1259→      </DropdownMenuContent>
  1260→    </DropdownMenu>
  1261→  );
  1262→
  1263→  // ============================================
  1264→  // RENDER: Droppable Kanban Column
  1265→  // ============================================
  1266→  const DroppableColumn = ({ stage, isDeal }: { stage: OpportunityStage; isDeal: boolean }) => {
  1267→    const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id: stage });
  1268→    const opps = getOpportunitiesByStage(stage);
  1269→    const colors = stageColors[stage];
  1270→    const stageValue = isDeal
  1271→      ? opps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0)
  1272→      : null;
  1273→    const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
  1274→
  1275→    return (
  1276→      <div
  1277→        key={stage}
  1278→        className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
  1279→      >
  1280→        {/* Column Header */}
  1281→        <div
  1282→          className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
  1283→          onClick={() => toggleStageCollapse(stage)}
  1284→        >
  1285→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1286→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1287→              {isCollapsed ? (
  1288→                <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1289→              ) : (
  1290→                <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
  1291→              )}
  1292→              {!isCollapsed && (
  1293→                <>
  1294→                  <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{stageLabels[stage]}</h4>
  1295→                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
  1296→                    {opps.length}
  1297→                  </Badge>
```
</details></tool-use>

  1279→                    <SelectItem value="USDT">USDT</SelectItem>
  1280→                    <SelectItem value="USDC">USDC</SelectItem>
  1281→                    <SelectItem value="ETH">ETH</SelectItem>
  1282→                    <SelectItem value="BTC">BTC</SelectItem>
  1283→                  </SelectContent>
  1284→                </Select>
  1285→              </div>
  1286→            </div>
  1287→
  1288→            <div>
  1289→              <Label className="text-sm">Notes</Label>
  1290→              <Textarea
  1291→                value={form.notes || ''}
  1292→                onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))}
  1293→                placeholder="Additional notes..."
  1294→                className="mt-1"
  1295→                rows={3}
  1296→              />
  1297→            </div>
```
</details></tool-use>

  1358→          <Input

  1427→      };
  1428→
  1429→      return (
  1430→        <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`group hover:bg-gray-50 ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`}>

  1433→              {...attributes}

  1359→        </DialogFooter>
  1360→      </DialogContent>

  1395→            <Target className="h-6 w-6 text-[#3e8692]" />
  1396→            Sales Pipeline
  1397→          </h1>
  1398→          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-0.5">Playbook-driven sales pipeline</p>
  1399→        </div>

  1402→        </Button>
  1403→      </div>
  1404→
  1405→      {/* Metrics Bar */}
  1406→      <div className="grid grid-cols-6 gap-3">
  1407→        <Card>
  1408→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1409→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{metrics.totalCount}</p>
  1410→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Total Pipeline</p>
  1411→          </CardContent>
  1412→        </Card>
  1413→        <Card>
  1414→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1415→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-700">{metrics.bucketA}</p>
  1416→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Bucket A</p>
  1417→          </CardContent>
  1418→        </Card>
  1419→        <Card>
  1420→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1421→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-amber-700">{metrics.bucketB}</p>
  1422→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Bucket B</p>
  1423→          </CardContent>
  1424→        </Card>
  1425→        <Card>
  1426→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1427→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-600">{metrics.bucketC}</p>
  1428→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Bucket C</p>
  1429→          </CardContent>
  1430→        </Card>
  1431→        <Card>
  1432→          <CardContent className="p-3 text-center">
  1433→            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${metrics.activeValue.toLocaleString()}</p>

  1435→          </CardContent>
  1436→        </Card>

  1441→            </p>

  1473→            </div>
  1474→
  1475→            {/* Path filter */}
  1476→            {activeTab === 'pipeline' && (
  1477→              <Select value={pathFilter} onValueChange={v => setPathFilter(v as 'all' | 'closer' | 'sdr')}>
  1478→                <SelectTrigger className="h-9 w-40 text-sm">
  1479→                  <SelectValue />
  1480→                </SelectTrigger>
  1481→                <SelectContent>
  1482→                  <SelectItem value="all">All Paths</SelectItem>
  1483→                  <SelectItem value="closer">Path A (Closer)</SelectItem>
  1484→                  <SelectItem value="sdr">Path B (SDR)</SelectItem>
  1485→                </SelectContent>
  1486→              </Select>
  1487→            )}
  1488→
  1489→            {/* View toggle */}
  1490→            {activeTab === 'pipeline' && (
  1491→              <div className="flex border rounded-md">
  1492→                <Button
  1493→                  variant={viewMode === 'kanban' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
  1494→                  size="sm"
  1495→                  className="h-9 px-3"
  1496→                  onClick={() => setViewMode('kanban')}
  1497→                  style={viewMode === 'kanban' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } : {}}
  1498→                >
  1499→                  <LayoutGrid className="h-4 w-4" />
  1500→                </Button>
  1501→                <Button
  1502→                  variant={viewMode === 'table' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
  1503→                  size="sm"
  1504→                  className="h-9 px-3"
  1505→                  onClick={() => setViewMode('table')}
  1506→                  style={viewMode === 'table' ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } : {}}
  1507→                >
  1508→                  <TableIcon className="h-4 w-4" />
  1509→                </Button>
  1510→              </div>
  1511→            )}
  1512→          </div>
  1513→        </div>
  1514→
  1515→        <TabsContent value="pipeline" className="mt-4">
  1516→          {viewMode === 'kanban' ? renderKanban() : renderTable()}
  1517→        </TabsContent>
  1518→
  1519→        <TabsContent value="orbit" className="mt-4">
  1520→          {renderOrbitTab()}
  1521→        </TabsContent>
  1522→      </Tabs>
  1523→
  1524→      {/* Dialogs */}
  1525→      {renderFormDialog()}
  1526→      {renderOrbitPrompt()}
  1527→      {renderClosedLostPrompt()}
  1528→
  1529→      {/* Activity Slide-Over */}
  1530→      {renderSlideOver()}
  1531→
  1532→      {/* Slide-over backdrop */}
  1533→      {slideOverOpp && (
  1534→        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 z-40" onClick={() => setSlideOverOpp(null)} />
  1535→      )}
  1536→    </div>
  1537→  );
  1538→}
  1539→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-23 13:58:16Z)**_

Build passes. Here's a summary of all the UI consistency changes I made to `/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`:

**Header:**
- Changed `h1` to `h2` to match existing pipeline page
- Moved search input to the header right side (alongside the button), using `auth-input` class, `pl-10 w-64` sizing, and `left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2` icon positioning
- Updated button to use `hover:opacity-90`, `mr-2` on icon, explicit white color

**Stats Cards:**
- Switched from plain centered cards to gradient cards (`bg-gradient-to-br from-[color]-50 to-white`) with icons on the right side (`p-2.5 bg-[color]-100 rounded-lg`)
- Added `pt-5 pb-4` padding pattern
- Label uses `text-sm font-medium text-[color]-600` pattern

**View Toggle:**
- Replaced Button-based toggle with custom div-based toggle matching the existing pipeline's TabsList-style (`inline-flex h-10 items-center bg-muted p-1 rounded-md`)
- Added text labels "Table" and "Kanban" with icons

**Tabs:**
- Added icons to tab triggers (Target, RotateCcw)
- Used `mb-4 flex-shrink-0` on tabs header row
- Changed `TabsContent` from `mt-4` to `mt-0`
- Added `auth-input` class to path filter select

**Kanban Columns:**
- Switched to collapsible columns (`flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]`) with vertical text when collapsed
- Separated header from droppable area (`bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg`)
- Made orbit/closed-lost drop zones collapsed by default (narrow columns)

**Kanban Cards:**
- Added `border-l-4` accent matching stage color
- Added `GripVertical` drag handle and `Building2` icon
- Changed to `p-4` padding, `hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200`
- Moved action menu (DropdownMenu) onto the card itself with `h-8 w-8 p-0` trigger and `w-48` menu
- Richer detail display: source badge, clock icon for last contacted, Zap icon for bumps

**Table View:**
- Added DnD with `SortableTableRow` component (grip handle per row)
- Matching stage header style (`px-4 py-3`, collapsible, `border-b-0` when expanded)
- `bg-gray-50/50` header row, `auth-input` class on editable inputs
- Building2 icon in name column, `h-8 w-8 p-0` action menu trigger, `w-48` menu width
- DragOverlay shows compact row with grip handle + name + stage badge

**Dialog:**
- Changed to `max-w-md`, added `form` wrapper with `onSubmit`
- Used `grid gap-4 py-4` layout, `grid gap-2` per field, `auth-input` class on all inputs

**Loading Skeleton:**
- Matches existing pipeline's detailed skeleton: header + stats cards + tabs + stage groups

**Layout:**
- Changed outer container from `space-y-4` to `space-y-6`

---

**27 opportunities** across all stages:
| Stage | Count | Total Value |
|---|---|---|
| Cold DM | 6 | $95,000 |
| Warm | 4 | $55,000 |
| TG Intro | 2 | $34,000 |
| Booked | 3 | $70,000 |
| Discovery Done | 2 | $58,000 |
| Proposal Sent | 2 | $85,000 |
| Proposal Call | 1 | $45,000 |
| Contract | 1 | $60,000 |
| Closed Won | 2 | $97,000 |
| Orbit | 3 | $30,000 |
| Closed Lost | 1 | $30,000 |

**20 activities** across 6 opportunities (Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Solana, Story Protocol, Scroll) — a mix of messages, calls, meetings, proposals, and notes with realistic outcomes and next steps.

The data includes:
- Mix of Bucket A/B/C and Closer/SDR paths
- Bump progress on cold DM opps (0-4 bumps)
- Warm sub-states (interested vs silent)
- Temperature scores ranging from 20-100
- BAMFAM violation on Lido Finance (discovery_done with no next meeting)
- Orbit reasons: no_budget, bad_timing, no_response
- Real-looking crypto project names with TG handles, referrers, and affiliates linked

Go to `/crm/sales-pipeline` to see it in action.

Now let me read the `recordBump` method in the service to understand how to add `reduceBump`:

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-23 14:17:26Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./lib/salesPipelineService.ts`

```text
   288→
   289→  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   290→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   291→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   292→      .select('bump_number')
   293→      .eq('id', id)
   294→      .single();
   295→
   296→    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;
   297→
   298→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   299→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   300→      .update({
   301→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   302→        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
   303→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   304→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   305→      })
   306→      .eq('id', id)
   307→      .select()
   308→      .single();
   309→
   310→    if (error) throw error;
   311→
   312→    // Also create a bump activity
   313→    await this.createActivity({
   314→      opportunity_id: id,
   315→      type: 'bump',
   316→      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
   317→    });
   318→
   319→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   320→  }
   321→
   322→  // ----------------------------------------
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - **Previous session (completed):** Implement Sales Pipeline v2 Phase 1a (database migrations, service, page, sidebar). Then make UI consistent with existing pipeline page.

   - **Three latest requests (in progress):** User asked: "Can you make the side section that pops up when you click the opportunity so that ui is consistent? Also make it so that you can reduce the bump in case of misclick. Also make the table the default view"

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Next.js App Router with `'use client'` pages
   - Supabase MCP for database operations and SQL execution
   - @dnd-kit library (DndContext, useSortable, useDroppable, SortableContext, DragOverlay)
   - SalesPipelineService static class pattern with Supabase queries
   - TypeScript union types for stage management (SalesPipelineStage, OpportunityStage)
   - Consistent UI patterns: `auth-input` class, `#3e8692` brand color, gradient metric cards, `max-w-md` dialogs, `grid gap-4 py-4` form layouts
   - Collapsible kanban columns with vertical text when collapsed
   - SortableTableRow component to avoid hook-in-map violations
   - Activity timeline with connecting lines between entries

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`** — Main sales pipeline page, heavily modified for UI consistency
     - Changed default view: `useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table')`
     - Added imports: `Minus, Hash, Building2, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Users`
     - Header: changed from `h1` to `h2`, moved search to header with `auth-input` class
     - Metrics: gradient cards with icons (`bg-gradient-to-br from-[color]-50 to-white`)
     - View toggle: custom div-based matching TabsList style
     - Kanban: collapsible columns (`flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]`), vertical text when collapsed
     - Cards: `border-l-4`, `GripVertical` handle, `Building2` icon, action DropdownMenu on card
     - Table: `SortableTableRow` component with grip handles, `auth-input` on inline edits
     - Dialog: `max-w-md`, `form` wrapper, `grid gap-4 py-4`, `auth-input` on all inputs
     - Added `handleReduceBump` handler:
       ```typescript
       const handleReduceBump = async (oppId: string) => {
         try {
           await SalesPipelineService.reduceBump(oppId);
           await fetchData();
         } catch (err) {
           console.error('Error reducing bump:', err);
         }
       };
       ```
     - Completely rewrote `renderSlideOver` — wider panel (480px), gradient header, details/notes in cards, bump counter with +/- buttons, activity timeline with vertical connecting lines, all inputs with `auth-input` class and `h-9` sizing, brand-colored Add button
     - Added `SortableTableRow` component at top level to avoid hooks-in-map issue:
       ```typescript
       function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
         const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
         // ... renders TableRow with GripVertical drag handle
       }
       ```

   - **`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`** — Service layer
     - Added `reduceBump` method:
       ```typescript
       static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
         const { data: current } = await supabase
           .from('crm_opportunities')
           .select('bump_number')
           .eq('id', id)
           .single();
         const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
         const { data, error } = await supabase
           .from('crm_opportunities')
           .update({
             bump_number: newBumpNumber,
             updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
           })
           .eq('id', id)
           .select()
           .single();
         if (error) throw error;
         return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
       }
       ```

   - **`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx`** — Existing pipeline page (read-only reference)
     - Read extensively for UI pattern reference: header (`h2`, search with `auth-input`), gradient metric cards, custom view toggle, collapsible kanban columns, `border-l-4` cards, `GripVertical` handles, `Building2` icons, `max-w-md` dialog, `grid gap-4 py-4` forms, `auth-input` on inputs, `w-48` dropdown menus, `h-8 w-8 p-0` action triggers

   - **Database (Supabase MCP)** — Dummy data inserted
     - 27 opportunities across all v2 stages (cold_dm:6, warm:4, tg_intro:2, booked:3, discovery_done:2, proposal_sent:2, proposal_call:1, v2_contract:1, v2_closed_won:2, orbit:3, v2_closed_lost:1)
     - 20 activities across 6 opportunities (Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Solana, Story, Scroll)
     - Owner: `806cef7e-7d18-4876-8938-3e9294520dd6`
     - Affiliates used: Cryptic, 100X Labs, Clique

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **VALUES lists length mismatch**: First INSERT for dummy data failed because `calendly_sent_date` and `calendly_booked_date` columns were missing from the column list but some rows had extra values. Fixed by adding those two columns to the INSERT column list and ensuring all rows had matching values (NULL where appropriate).
   - **next_step_date type mismatch**: Activity INSERT failed with `column "next_step_date" is of type timestamp with time zone but expression is of type text` because I used `(NOW() + interval '1 day')::text`. Fixed by removing the `::text` cast and passing the timestamptz directly.
   - **useState inside map**: The table view initially called `useSortable` directly inside a `.map()` callback, which violates React hooks rules. Fixed by extracting a `SortableTableRow` component that wraps the hook call.
   - **collapsedKanbanStages useState placement**: Initially placed `useState` for collapsedKanbanStages near the render function. Moved it to the state declarations section at the top of the component for proper hook ordering.

5. Problem Solving:
   - UI consistency was achieved by systematically comparing every UI element between the two pages and matching patterns
   - Bump reduction was added with `Math.max(..., 0)` to prevent negative values
   - SortableTableRow component extracted to solve hooks-in-map violation
   - Dummy data designed with realistic crypto project names, mix of buckets/paths/sources, BAMFAM violations, and varied bump counts

6. All User Messages:
   - "Can you make some dummy data so I can see how it works?"
   - "Can you make the side section that pops up when you click the opportunity so that ui is consistent? Also make it so that you can reduce the bump in case of misclick. Also make the table the default view"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Build verification after the slide-over rewrite and reduceBump changes (build has NOT been run yet after the latest changes)

8. Current Work:
   Working on the user's latest request: "Can you make the side section that pops up when you click the opportunity so that ui is consistent? Also make it so that you can reduce the bump in case of misclick. Also make the table the default view"
   
   All three changes have been made:
   1. Default view changed to `'table'` ✓
   2. `reduceBump` added to service + `handleReduceBump` handler + Minus icon imported ✓
   3. Slide-over completely rewritten with consistent UI (gradient header, card-based details, bump +/- buttons, activity timeline with connecting lines, auth-input styling) ✓
   
   **Build has NOT been run yet** to verify the changes compile.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Run `npm run build` to verify the latest changes (slide-over rewrite, reduceBump, default table view) compile successfully. The previous build passed before these changes, so this is needed to confirm.
</summary>
