     - Added imports: `Minus, Hash, Building2, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Users`
     - Header: changed from `h1` to `h2`, moved search to header with `auth-input` class
     - Metrics: gradient cards with icons (`bg-gradient-to-br from-[color]-50 to-white`)
     - View toggle: custom div-based matching TabsList style
     - Kanban: collapsible columns (`flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]`), vertical text when collapsed
     - Cards: `border-l-4`, `GripVertical` handle, `Building2` icon, action DropdownMenu on card
     - Table: `SortableTableRow` component with grip handles, `auth-input` on inline edits
     - Dialog: `max-w-md`, `form` wrapper, `grid gap-4 py-4`, `auth-input` on all inputs
     - Added `handleReduceBump` handler:
       ```typescript
       const handleReduceBump = async (oppId: string) => {
         try {
           await SalesPipelineService.reduceBump(oppId);
           await fetchData();
         } catch (err) {
           console.error('Error reducing bump:', err);
         }
       };
       ```
     - Completely rewrote `renderSlideOver` — wider panel (480px), gradient header, details/notes in cards, bump counter with +/- buttons, activity timeline with vertical connecting lines, all inputs with `auth-input` class and `h-9` sizing, brand-colored Add button
     - Added `SortableTableRow` component at top level to avoid hooks-in-map issue:
       ```typescript
       function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
         const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
         // ... renders TableRow with GripVertical drag handle
       }
       ```

   - **`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/salesPipelineService.ts`** — Service layer
     - Added `reduceBump` method:
       ```typescript
       static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
         const { data: current } = await supabase
           .from('crm_opportunities')
           .select('bump_number')
           .eq('id', id)
           .single();
         const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
         const { data, error } = await supabase
           .from('crm_opportunities')
           .update({
             bump_number: newBumpNumber,
             updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
           })
           .eq('id', id)
           .select()
           .single();
         if (error) throw error;
         return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
       }
       ```

   - **`/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx`** — Existing pipeline page (read-only reference)
     - Read extensively for UI pattern reference: header (`h2`, search with `auth-input`), gradient metric cards, custom view toggle, collapsible kanban columns, `border-l-4` cards, `GripVertical` handles, `Building2` icons, `max-w-md` dialog, `grid gap-4 py-4` forms, `auth-input` on inputs, `w-48` dropdown menus, `h-8 w-8 p-0` action triggers

   - **Database (Supabase MCP)** — Dummy data inserted
     - 27 opportunities across all v2 stages (cold_dm:6, warm:4, tg_intro:2, booked:3, discovery_done:2, proposal_sent:2, proposal_call:1, v2_contract:1, v2_closed_won:2, orbit:3, v2_closed_lost:1)
     - 20 activities across 6 opportunities (Polygon, Arbitrum, Avalanche, Solana, Story, Scroll)
     - Owner: `806cef7e-7d18-4876-8938-3e9294520dd6`
     - Affiliates used: Cryptic, 100X Labs, Clique

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **VALUES lists length mismatch**: First INSERT for dummy data failed because `calendly_sent_date` and `calendly_booked_date` columns were missing from the column list but some rows had extra values. Fixed by adding those two columns to the INSERT column list and ensuring all rows had matching values (NULL where appropriate).
   - **next_step_date type mismatch**: Activity INSERT failed with `column "next_step_date" is of type timestamp with time zone but expression is of type text` because I used `(NOW() + interval '1 day')::text`. Fixed by removing the `::text` cast and passing the timestamptz directly.
   - **useState inside map**: The table view initially called `useSortable` directly inside a `.map()` callback, which violates React hooks rules. Fixed by extracting a `SortableTableRow` component that wraps the hook call.
   - **collapsedKanbanStages useState placement**: Initially placed `useState` for collapsedKanbanStages near the render function. Moved it to the state declarations section at the top of the component for proper hook ordering.

5. Problem Solving:
   - UI consistency was achieved by systematically comparing every UI element between the two pages and matching patterns
   - Bump reduction was added with `Math.max(..., 0)` to prevent negative values
   - SortableTableRow component extracted to solve hooks-in-map violation
   - Dummy data designed with realistic crypto project names, mix of buckets/paths/sources, BAMFAM violations, and varied bump counts

    67→
    68→// ============================================
    69→// DnD Components
    70→// ============================================
    71→
    72→function DroppableColumn({ id, children, className }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string }) {
    73→  const { setNodeRef, isOver } = useDroppable({ id });
    74→  return (
    75→    <div ref={setNodeRef} className={`${className} ${isOver ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-400 ring-offset-2' : ''}`}>
    76→      {children}
    77→    </div>
    78→  );
    79→}
    80→
    81→function SortableCard({ id, children }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
    82→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    83→  const style = {
    84→    transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
    85→    transition,
    86→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
    87→  };
    88→  return (
    89→    <div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}>
    90→      {children}
    91→    </div>
    92→  );
    93→}
    94→
    95→function SortableTableRow({ id, children, className, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; className?: string; onClick?: () => void }) {
    96→  const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
    97→  const style: React.CSSProperties = {
    98→    transform: CSS.Translate.toString(transform),
    99→    transition,
   100→    opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   101→    position: 'relative' as const,
   102→    zIndex: isDragging ? 1 : 0,
   103→  };
   104→  return (
   105→    <TableRow ref={setNodeRef} style={style} className={`${className || ''} ${isDragging ? 'bg-blue-50 shadow-lg' : ''}`} onClick={onClick}>
   106→      <TableCell className="w-10">
   107→        <div
   108→          {...attributes}
   109→          {...listeners}
   110→          className="cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded"
   111→          onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   112→        >
   113→          <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   114→        </div>
   115→      </TableCell>
   116→      {children}
   117→    </TableRow>
   118→  );
   119→}
   120→
   121→// ============================================
   122→// Main Page
   123→// ============================================
   124→
   125→export default function SalesPipelinePage() {
   126→  const { user } = useAuth();
   127→
   128→  // Data state
   129→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
   130→  const [opportunities, setOpportunities] = useState<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]>([]);
   131→  const [affiliates, setAffiliates] = useState<CRMAffiliate[]>([]);
   132→  const [users, setUsers] = useState<{ id: string; name: string | null; email: string }[]>([]);
   133→  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState({ totalCount: 0, bucketA: 0, bucketB: 0, bucketC: 0, activeValue: 0, bamfamViolations: 0 });
   134→
   135→  // UI state
   136→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
   137→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'pipeline' | 'orbit'>('pipeline');
   138→  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
   139→  const [pathFilter, setPathFilter] = useState<'all' | 'closer' | 'sdr'>('all');
   140→
   141→  // DnD state
   142→  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   143→  const [activeOpportunity, setActiveOpportunity] = useState<SalesPipelineOpportunity | null>(null);
   144→
   145→  // Dialog state
   146→  const [isCreateOpen, setIsCreateOpen] = useState(false);
   147→  const [editingOpp, setEditingOpp] = useState<SalesPipelineOpportunity | null>(null);
   148→  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
   149→  const [form, setForm] = useState<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData>({ name: '' });
   150→
   151→  // Activity slide-over
   152→  const [slideOverOpp, setSlideOverOpp] = useState<SalesPipelineOpportunity | null>(null);
   153→  const [activities, setActivities] = useState<CRMActivity[]>([]);
   154→  const [activityForm, setActivityForm] = useState<CreateActivityData>({ opportunity_id: '', type: 'note', title: '' });
   155→  const [isActivitySubmitting, setIsActivitySubmitting] = useState(false);
   156→
   157→  // Orbit/Closed Lost reason prompts
   158→  const [orbitPrompt, setOrbitPrompt] = useState<{ oppId: string; fromStage: string } | null>(null);
   159→  const [orbitReasonValue, setOrbitReasonValue] = useState<OrbitReason>('no_response');
   160→  const [closedLostPrompt, setClosedLostPrompt] = useState<{ oppId: string; fromStage: string } | null>(null);
   161→  const [closedLostReasonValue, setClosedLostReasonValue] = useState('');
   162→
   163→  // Table state

   166→  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState<{ id: string; field: string } | null>(null);
   167→  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState('');

   174→
   175→  // ============================================
   176→  // Data Fetching
   177→  // ============================================
   178→
   179→  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
   180→    try {
   181→      const [opps, affs, usrs, met] = await Promise.all([
   182→        SalesPipelineService.getAll(),
   183→        CRMService.getAllAffiliates(),
   184→        UserService.getAllUsers(),
   185→        SalesPipelineService.getMetrics(),
   186→      ]);
   187→      setOpportunities(opps);
   188→      setAffiliates(affs);
   189→      setUsers(usrs);
   190→      setMetrics(met);
   191→    } catch (err) {
   192→      console.error('Error fetching data:', err);
   193→    } finally {
   194→      setLoading(false);
   195→    }
   196→  }, []);
   197→
   198→  useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);
   199→
   200→  const fetchActivities = async (oppId: string) => {
   201→    try {
   202→      const acts = await SalesPipelineService.getActivities(oppId);
   203→      setActivities(acts);
   204→    } catch (err) {
   205→      console.error('Error fetching activities:', err);
   206→    }
   207→  };
   208→
   209→  // ============================================
   210→  // Filtered Opportunities
   211→  // ============================================
   212→
   213→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities.filter(opp => {
   214→    if (searchTerm && !opp.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) return false;
   215→    if (pathFilter === 'closer' && opp.dm_account !== 'closer') return false;
   216→    if (pathFilter === 'sdr' && opp.dm_account !== 'sdr') return false;
   217→    return true;
   218→  });
   219→
   220→  const getStageOpps = (stage: SalesPipelineStage) =>
   221→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage).sort((a, b) => a.position - b.position);
   222→
   223→  const visiblePipelineStages = pathFilter === 'closer' ? PATH_A_STAGES : PIPELINE_STAGES;
   224→
   225→  const orbitOpps = filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'orbit');
   226→  const orbitByReason = ORBIT_REASONS.map(r => ({
   227→    ...r,
   228→    opps: orbitOpps.filter(o => o.orbit_reason === r.value),
   229→  }));
   230→
   231→  // ============================================
   232→  // CRUD Handlers
   233→  // ============================================
   234→
   235→  const handleCreate = async () => {
   236→    if (!form.name.trim()) return;
   237→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   238→    try {
   239→      await SalesPipelineService.create({ ...form, stage: form.stage || ('cold_dm' as OpportunityStage) });
   240→      setIsCreateOpen(false);
   241→      setForm({ name: '' });
   242→      await fetchData();
   243→    } catch (err: any) {
   244→      alert(err.message || 'Error creating opportunity');
   245→    } finally {
   246→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   247→    }
   248→  };
   249→
   250→  const handleUpdate = async () => {
   251→    if (!editingOpp || !form.name.trim()) return;
   252→    setIsSubmitting(true);
   253→    try {
   254→      await SalesPipelineService.update(editingOpp.id, form);
   255→      setEditingOpp(null);
   256→      setForm({ name: '' });
   257→      await fetchData();
   258→    } catch (err: any) {
   259→      alert(err.message || 'Error updating opportunity');
   260→    } finally {
   261→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   262→    }
   263→  };
   264→
   265→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   266→    if (!confirm('Delete this opportunity?')) return;
   267→    try {
   268→      await SalesPipelineService.delete(id);
   269→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === id) setSlideOverOpp(null);
   270→      await fetchData();
   271→    } catch (err) {
   272→      console.error('Error deleting:', err);
   273→    }
   274→  };
   275→
   276→  const handleStageChange = async (oppId: string, newStage: SalesPipelineStage, currentStage: string) => {
   277→    if (newStage === 'orbit') {
   278→      setOrbitPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   279→      return;
   280→    }
   281→    if (newStage === 'v2_closed_lost') {
   282→      setClosedLostPrompt({ oppId, fromStage: currentStage });
   283→      return;
   284→    }
   285→    try {
   286→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { stage: newStage as OpportunityStage });
   287→      await fetchData();
   288→    } catch (err) {
   289→      console.error('Error changing stage:', err);
   290→    }
   291→  };
   292→
   293→  const confirmOrbit = async () => {
   294→    if (!orbitPrompt) return;
   295→    try {
   296→      await SalesPipelineService.update(orbitPrompt.oppId, {
   297→        stage: 'orbit' as OpportunityStage,
   298→        orbit_reason: orbitReasonValue,
   299→      });
   300→      setOrbitPrompt(null);
   301→      setOrbitReasonValue('no_response');
   302→      await fetchData();
   303→    } catch (err) {
   304→      console.error('Error moving to orbit:', err);
   305→    }
   306→  };
   307→
   308→  const confirmClosedLost = async () => {
   309→    if (!closedLostPrompt) return;
   310→    try {
   311→      await SalesPipelineService.update(closedLostPrompt.oppId, {
   312→        stage: 'v2_closed_lost' as OpportunityStage,
   313→        closed_lost_reason: closedLostReasonValue || undefined,
   314→      });
   315→      setClosedLostPrompt(null);
   316→      setClosedLostReasonValue('');
   317→      await fetchData();
   318→    } catch (err) {
   319→      console.error('Error closing lost:', err);
   320→    }
   321→  };
   322→
   323→  const handleResurrect = async (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   324→    try {
   325→      await SalesPipelineService.update(opp.id, {
   326→        stage: 'cold_dm' as OpportunityStage,
   327→        orbit_reason: null,
   328→      });
   329→      await fetchData();
   330→    } catch (err) {
   331→      console.error('Error resurrecting:', err);
   332→    }
   333→  };
   334→
   335→  const handleRecordBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   336→    try {
   337→      await SalesPipelineService.recordBump(oppId);
   338→      await fetchData();
   339→      if (slideOverOpp?.id === oppId) {
   340→        await fetchActivities(oppId);
   341→      }
   342→    } catch (err) {
   343→      console.error('Error recording bump:', err);
   344→    }
   345→  };
   346→
   347→  const handleReduceBump = async (oppId: string) => {
   348→    try {
   349→      await SalesPipelineService.reduceBump(oppId);
   350→      await fetchData();
   351→    } catch (err) {
   352→      console.error('Error reducing bump:', err);
   353→    }
   354→  };
   355→
   356→  const handleAddActivity = async () => {
   357→    if (!activityForm.title.trim() || !slideOverOpp) return;
   358→    setIsActivitySubmitting(true);
   359→    try {
   360→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({
   361→        ...activityForm,
   362→        opportunity_id: slideOverOpp.id,
   363→      });
   364→      setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: '', type: 'note', title: '' });
   365→      await fetchActivities(slideOverOpp.id);
   366→    } catch (err) {
   367→      console.error('Error adding activity:', err);
   368→    } finally {
   369→      setIsActivitySubmitting(false);
   370→    }
   371→  };
   372→
   373→  const handleInlineEdit = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: string) => {
   374→    try {
   375→      const updates: any = {};
   376→      if (field === 'deal_value') {
   377→        updates.deal_value = value ? parseFloat(value) : null;
   378→      } else if (field === 'temperature_score') {
   379→        updates.temperature_score = parseInt(value) || 50;
   380→      } else {
   381→        updates[field] = value || null;
   382→      }
   383→      await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, updates);
   384→      await fetchData();
   385→    } catch (err) {
   386→      console.error('Error inline edit:', err);
   387→    }
   388→    setEditingCell(null);
   389→  };
   390→
   391→  // ============================================
   392→  // DnD Handlers
   393→  // ============================================
   394→
   395→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   396→    const id = event.active.id as string;
   397→    setActiveId(id);
   398→    setActiveOpportunity(opportunities.find(o => o.id === id) || null);
   399→  };
   400→
   401→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   402→    const { active, over } = event;
   403→    setActiveId(null);
   404→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   405→
   406→    if (!over) return;
   407→
   408→    const oppId = active.id as string;
   409→    const overId = over.id as string;
   410→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === oppId);
   411→    if (!opp) return;
   412→
   413→    // Check if dropped on a stage column
   414→    const isStageColumn = ALL_V2_STAGES.includes(overId as SalesPipelineStage);
   415→
   416→    if (isStageColumn) {
   417→      const newStage = overId as SalesPipelineStage;
   418→      if (opp.stage !== newStage) {
   419→        await handleStageChange(oppId, newStage, opp.stage);
   420→      }
   421→    } else {
   422→      // Dropped on another card — reorder within same stage
   423→      const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   424→      if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage === opp.stage) {
   425→        const stageOpps = getStageOpps(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage);
   426→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === oppId);
   427→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === overId);
   428→        if (oldIndex !== -1 && newIndex !== -1) {
   429→          const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   430→          const positions = reordered.map((o, i) => ({ id: o.id, position: i }));
   431→          await SalesPipelineService.updatePositions(positions);
   432→          await fetchData();
   433→        }
   434→      } else if (targetOpp && targetOpp.stage !== opp.stage) {
   435→        // Dropped on card in different stage
   436→        await handleStageChange(oppId, targetOpp.stage as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage);
   437→      }
   438→    }
   439→  };
   440→
   441→  // ============================================
   442→  // Open slide-over
   443→  // ============================================
   444→
   445→  const openSlideOver = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   446→    setSlideOverOpp(opp);
   447→    fetchActivities(opp.id);
   448→    setActivityForm({ opportunity_id: opp.id, type: 'note', title: '' });
   449→  };
   450→
   451→  const openEditDialog = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   452→    setEditingOpp(opp);
   453→    setForm({
   454→      name: opp.name,
   455→      dm_account: opp.dm_account,
   456→      bucket: opp.bucket || undefined,
   457→      temperature_score: opp.temperature_score,
   458→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   459→      tg_handle: opp.tg_handle || undefined,
   460→      owner_id: opp.owner_id || undefined,
   461→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   462→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   463→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   464→      currency: opp.currency,
   465→      notes: opp.notes || undefined,
   466→    });
   467→  };
   468→
   469→  const toggleKanbanCollapse = (stage: string) => {
   470→    setCollapsedKanbanStages(prev => {
   471→      const next = new Set(prev);
   472→      next.has(stage) ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   473→      return next;
   474→    });
   475→  };
   476→
   477→  // ============================================
   478→  // BAMFAM check
   479→  // ============================================
   480→
   481→  const isBAMFAM = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
   482→    const postDiscovery: SalesPipelineStage[] = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_sent', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   483→    if (!postDiscovery.includes(opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage)) return false;
   484→    if (!opp.next_meeting_at) return true;
   485→    return new Date(opp.next_meeting_at) < new Date();
   486→  };
   487→
   488→  // ============================================
   489→  // Helpers
   490→  // ============================================
   491→
   492→  const getUserName = (userId: string | null) => {
   493→    if (!userId) return '—';
   494→    const u = users.find(u => u.id === userId);
   495→    return u?.name || u?.email || '—';
   496→  };
   497→
   498→  const activityIcon = (type: ActivityType) => {
   499→    switch (type) {
   500→      case 'call': return <Phone className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   501→      case 'message': return <MessageSquare className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   502→      case 'meeting': return <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   503→      case 'proposal': return <FileText className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   504→      case 'note': return <StickyNote className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   505→      case 'bump': return <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />;
   506→    }
   507→  };
   508→
   509→  // ============================================
   510→  // RENDER: Opportunity Card (Kanban)
   511→  // ============================================
   512→
   513→  const renderCard = (opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity, isDragging: boolean = false) => {
   514→    const colors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
   515→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
   516→
   517→    return (
   518→      <Card
   519→        className={`group hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 border-l-4 ${colors.border} ${isDragging ? 'shadow-lg ring-2 ring-blue-400 opacity-90' : ''} ${bamfam ? 'bg-red-50/30' : ''}`}
   520→        onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   521→      >
   522→        <CardContent className="p-4">
   523→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
   524→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   525→              {/* Name with drag handle */}
   526→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   527→                <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing" />
   528→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
   529→                <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</p>
   530→              </div>
   531→
   532→              {/* Deal Value */}
   533→              {opp.deal_value && (
   534→                <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-600 mt-2">
   535→                  ${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}
   536→                </p>
   537→              )}
   538→
   539→              {/* Badges */}
   540→              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mt-2">
   541→                {opp.bucket && (
   542→                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   543→                    Bucket {opp.bucket}
   544→                  </Badge>
   545→                )}
   546→                {opp.dm_account === 'closer' && (
   547→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-blue-300 text-blue-600">Closer</Badge>
   548→                )}
   549→                {opp.dm_account === 'sdr' && (
   550→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white border-green-300 text-green-600">SDR</Badge>
   551→                )}
   552→                {opp.source && (
   553→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs bg-white capitalize">
   554→                    {opp.source.replace('_', ' ')}
   555→                  </Badge>
   556→                )}
   557→              </div>
   558→
   559→              {/* Details */}
   560→              <div className="mt-3 space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500">
   561→                {/* Bump progress (cold_dm only) */}
   562→                {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   563→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   564→                    <Zap className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0 text-sky-500" />
   565→                    <span>Bump {opp.bump_number}/4</span>
   566→                    <div className="flex gap-0.5">
   567→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
   568→                        <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
   569→                      ))}
   570→                    </div>
   571→                  </div>
   572→                )}
   573→
   574→                {/* Warm sub-state */}
   575→                {opp.stage === 'warm' && opp.warm_sub_state && (
   576→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   577→                    <MessageSquare className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
   578→                    <span className={opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'text-green-600 font-medium' : 'text-gray-500'}>
   579→                      {opp.warm_sub_state === 'interested' ? 'Interested' : 'Silent'}
   580→                    </span>
   581→                  </div>
   582→                )}
   583→
   584→                {/* Temperature bar */}
   585→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   586→                  <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   587→                    <div
   588→                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
   589→                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
   590→                    />
   591→                  </div>
   592→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
   593→                </div>
   594→
   595→                {/* BAMFAM warning */}
   596→                {bamfam && (
   597→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-red-600">
   598→                    <AlertTriangle className="h-3 w-3" />
   599→                    <span className="font-medium">BAMFAM</span>
   600→                  </div>
   601→                )}
   602→
   603→                {/* Last contacted */}
   604→                {opp.last_contacted_at && (
   605→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
   606→                    <Clock className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
   607→                    <span>{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true })}</span>
   608→                  </div>
   609→                )}
   610→              </div>
   611→            </div>
   612→
   613→            {!isDragging && (
   614→              <DropdownMenu>
   615→                <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   616→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
   617→                    <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
   618→                  </Button>
   619→                </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   620→                <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
   621→                  <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
   622→                    <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
   623→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
   624→                  {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   625→                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
   626→                      <Zap className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Record Bump
   627→                    </DropdownMenuItem>
   628→                  )}
   629→                  <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   630→                  <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage); }} className="text-orange-600">
   631→                    <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Move to Orbit
   632→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
   633→                  <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
   634→                    <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
   635→                  </DropdownMenuItem>
   636→                </DropdownMenuContent>
   637→              </DropdownMenu>
   638→            )}
   639→          </div>
   640→        </CardContent>
   641→      </Card>
   642→    );
   643→  };
   644→
   645→  // ============================================
   646→  // RENDER: Kanban View
   647→  // ============================================
   648→
   649→  const renderKanban = () => (
   650→    <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
   651→      <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 h-full">
   652→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
   653→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
   654→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
   655→          const isCollapsed = collapsedKanbanStages.has(stage);
   656→          const stageValue = stageOpps.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   657→
   658→          return (
   659→            <div
   660→              key={stage}
   661→              className={`${isCollapsed ? 'w-12' : 'flex-1 min-w-[280px] max-w-[320px]'} flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200`}
   662→            >
   663→              {/* Column Header */}
   664→              <div
   665→                className={`${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none`}
   666→                onClick={() => toggleKanbanCollapse(stage)}
   667→              >
   668→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   669→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   670→                    {isCollapsed ? (
   671→                      <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
   672→                    ) : (
   673→                      <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
   674→                    )}
   675→                    {!isCollapsed && (
   676→                      <>
   677→                        <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
   678→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
   679→                      </>
   680→                    )}
   681→                  </div>
   682→                </div>
   683→                {!isCollapsed && stageValue > 0 && (
   684→                  <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 mt-1">
   685→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
   686→                  </p>
   687→                )}
   688→                {isCollapsed && (
   689→                  <div className="mt-2 flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
   690→                    <span className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`} style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
   691→                      {STAGE_LABELS[stage]}
   692→                    </span>
   693→                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
   694→                  </div>
   695→                )}
   696→              </div>
   697→
   698→              {/* Column Content - Droppable Area */}
   699→              {!isCollapsed && (
   700→                <DroppableColumn id={stage} className={`flex-1 bg-gray-50/50 border border-gray-200 border-t-0 rounded-b-lg p-3 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto transition-colors`}>
   701→                  <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
   702→                    {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
   703→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-24 text-sm text-gray-400">
   704→                        No opportunities
   705→                      </div>
   706→                    ) : (
   707→                      stageOpps.map(opp => (
   708→                        <SortableCard key={opp.id} id={opp.id}>
   709→                          {renderCard(opp)}
   710→                        </SortableCard>
   711→                      ))
   712→                    )}
   713→                  </SortableContext>
   714→                </DroppableColumn>
   715→              )}
   716→            </div>
   717→          );
   718→        })}
   719→
   720→        {/* Orbit drop zone */}
   721→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
   722→          <DroppableColumn id="orbit" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
   723→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
   724→              <RotateCcw className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-700" />
   725→              <span className="font-semibold text-orange-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
   726→                Orbit
   727→              </span>
   728→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">{orbitOpps.length}</Badge>
   729→            </div>
   730→          </DroppableColumn>
   731→        </div>
   732→
   733→        {/* Closed Lost drop zone */}
   734→        <div className="w-12 flex flex-col h-full transition-all duration-200">
   735→          <DroppableColumn id="v2_closed_lost" className="rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 flex-shrink-0 cursor-pointer select-none">
   736→            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
   737→              <X className="w-4 h-4 text-red-700" />
   738→              <span className="font-semibold text-red-700 mt-2" style={{ writingMode: 'vertical-rl', textOrientation: 'mixed' }}>
   739→                Lost
   740→              </span>
   741→              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium mt-1">
   742→                {filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === 'v2_closed_lost').length}
   743→              </Badge>
   744→            </div>
   745→          </DroppableColumn>
   746→        </div>
   747→      </div>
   748→
   749→      <DragOverlay>
   750→        {activeOpportunity ? (
   751→          <div className="w-[280px]">
   752→            {renderCard(activeOpportunity, true)}
   753→          </div>
   754→        ) : null}
   755→      </DragOverlay>
   756→    </DndContext>
   757→  );
   758→
   759→  // ============================================
   760→  // RENDER: Table View
   761→  // ============================================
   762→
   763→  const renderTable = () => (
   764→    <div className="pb-8">
   765→      <DndContext sensors={sensors} collisionDetection={closestCenter} onDragStart={handleDragStart} onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}>
   766→        {visiblePipelineStages.map(stage => {
   767→          const stageOpps = getStageOpps(stage);
   768→          const colors = STAGE_COLORS[stage];
   769→          const isCollapsed = collapsedStages.has(stage);
   770→          const stageValue = stageOpps.reduce((s, o) => s + (o.deal_value || 0), 0);
   771→
   772→          return (
   773→            <div key={stage} className="mb-6">
   774→              {/* Stage Header */}
   775→              <div
   776→                onClick={() => {
   777→                  const next = new Set(collapsedStages);
   778→                  isCollapsed ? next.delete(stage) : next.add(stage);
   779→                  setCollapsedStages(next);
   780→                }}
   781→                className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
   782→              >
   783→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   784→                  {isCollapsed ? <ChevronRight className={`h-4 w-4 ${colors.text}`} /> : <ChevronDown className={`h-4 w-4 ${colors.text}`} />}
   785→                  <h4 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{STAGE_LABELS[stage]}</h4>
   786→                  <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">{stageOpps.length}</Badge>
   787→                </div>
   788→                {stageValue > 0 && (
   789→                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-600">
   790→                    ${stageValue.toLocaleString()}
   791→                  </span>
   792→                )}
   793→              </div>
   794→
   795→              {!isCollapsed && (
   796→                <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0">
   797→                  <Table>
   798→                    <TableHeader>
   799→                      <TableRow className="bg-gray-50/50">
   800→                        <TableHead className="w-10"></TableHead>
   801→                        <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
   802→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">Bucket</TableHead>
   803→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">DM</TableHead>
   804→                        <TableHead className="w-[90px]">Temp</TableHead>
   805→                        <TableHead className="w-[110px]">Value</TableHead>
   806→                        <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Owner</TableHead>
   807→                        <TableHead className="w-[100px]">TG Handle</TableHead>
   808→                        {stage === 'cold_dm' && <TableHead className="w-[80px]">Bumps</TableHead>}
   809→                        <TableHead className="w-[70px]">BAMFAM</TableHead>
   810→                        <TableHead className="w-[50px]"></TableHead>
   811→                      </TableRow>
   812→                    </TableHeader>
   813→                    <TableBody>
   814→                      <SortableContext items={stageOpps.map(o => o.id)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>
   815→                        {stageOpps.length === 0 ? (
   816→                          <TableRow>
   817→                            <TableCell colSpan={11} className="text-center text-sm text-gray-400 py-8">
   818→                              No opportunities in this stage
   819→                            </TableCell>
   820→                          </TableRow>
   821→                        ) : stageOpps.map(opp => (
   822→                          <SortableTableRow
   823→                            key={opp.id}
   824→                            id={opp.id}
   825→                            className="group hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
   826→                            onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}
   827→                          >
   828→                              <TableCell>
   829→                                {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'name' ? (
   830→                                  <Input
   831→                                    value={editingValue}
   832→                                    onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   833→                                    onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue)}
   834→                                    onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'name', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
   835→                                    className="h-8 text-sm font-medium auth-input"
   836→                                    autoFocus
   837→                                    onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   838→                                  />
   839→                                ) : (
   840→                                  <div
   841→                                    onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'name' }); setEditingValue(opp.name); }}
   842→                                    className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1"
   843→                                  >
   844→                                    <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   845→                                    <span className="font-medium">{opp.name}</span>
   846→                                  </div>
   847→                                )}
   848→                              </TableCell>
   849→                              <TableCell>
   850→                                {opp.bucket && (
   851→                                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
   852→                                    {opp.bucket}
   853→                                  </Badge>
   854→                                )}
   855→                              </TableCell>
   856→                              <TableCell>
   857→                                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
   858→                                  {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'C' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'S' : 'O'}
   859→                                </Badge>
   860→                              </TableCell>
   861→                              <TableCell>
   862→                                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   863→                                  <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   864→                                    <div
   865→                                      className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
   866→                                      style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
   867→                                    />
   868→                                  </div>
   869→                                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{opp.temperature_score}</span>
   870→                                </div>
   871→                              </TableCell>
   872→                              <TableCell>
   873→                                {editingCell?.id === opp.id && editingCell.field === 'deal_value' ? (
   874→                                  <Input
   875→                                    type="number"
   876→                                    value={editingValue}
   877→                                    onChange={e => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   878→                                    onBlur={() => handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'deal_value', editingValue)}
   879→                                    onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleInlineEdit(opp.id, 'deal_value', editingValue); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingCell(null); }}
   880→                                    className="h-8 text-sm text-right auth-input"
   881→                                    autoFocus
   882→                                    onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
   883→                                  />
   884→                                ) : (
   885→                                  <div
   886→                                    onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingCell({ id: opp.id, field: 'deal_value' }); setEditingValue(String(opp.deal_value || '')); }}
   887→                                    className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-100 rounded px-2 py-1 -mx-2 -my-1 min-h-[28px] flex items-center"
   888→                                  >
   889→                                    {opp.deal_value ? (
   890→                                      <span className="font-semibold text-emerald-600">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()}</span>
   891→                                    ) : (
   892→                                      <span className="text-gray-400">-</span>
   893→                                    )}
   894→                                  </div>
   895→                                )}
   896→                              </TableCell>
   897→                              <TableCell>{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</TableCell>
   898→                              <TableCell className="text-gray-500">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</TableCell>
   899→                              {stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   900→                                <TableCell>
   901→                                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   902→                                    <span className="text-sm">{opp.bump_number}/4</span>
   903→                                    <div className="flex gap-0.5">
   904→                                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
   905→                                        <div key={i} className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500' : 'bg-gray-200'}`} />
   906→                                      ))}
   907→                                    </div>
   908→                                  </div>
   909→                                </TableCell>
   910→                              )}
   911→                              <TableCell>
   912→                                {isBAMFAM(opp) ? (
   913→                                  <span className="text-red-600 flex items-center gap-1">
   914→                                    <AlertTriangle className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   915→                                  </span>
   916→                                ) : (
   917→                                  <span className="text-green-600 text-xs">OK</span>
   918→                                )}
   919→                              </TableCell>
   920→                              <TableCell>
   921→                                <DropdownMenu>
   922→                                  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
   923→                                    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
   924→                                      <MoreHorizontal className="h-4 w-4" />
   925→                                    </Button>
   926→                                  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   927→                                  <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="w-48">
   928→                                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); openEditDialog(opp); }}>
   929→                                      <Edit className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Edit
   930→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
   931→                                    {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
   932→                                      <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleRecordBump(opp.id); }}>
   933→                                        <Zap className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Record Bump
   934→                                      </DropdownMenuItem>
   935→                                    )}
   936→                                    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   937→                                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage); }} className="text-orange-600">
   938→                                      <RotateCcw className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Move to Orbit
   939→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
   940→                                    <DropdownMenuItem onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleDelete(opp.id); }} className="text-red-600">
   941→                                      <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Delete
   942→                                    </DropdownMenuItem>
   943→                                  </DropdownMenuContent>
   944→                                </DropdownMenu>
   945→                              </TableCell>
   946→                          </SortableTableRow>
   947→                        ))}
   948→                      </SortableContext>
   949→                    </TableBody>
   950→                  </Table>
   951→                </div>
   952→              )}
   953→            </div>
   954→          );
   955→        })}
   956→        <DragOverlay>
   957→          {activeOpportunity ? (
   958→            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-300 shadow-lg rounded px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-3">
   959→              <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   960→              <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   961→              <span className="font-medium">{activeOpportunity.name}</span>
   962→              <Badge className={`text-xs ${STAGE_COLORS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.bg || ''} ${STAGE_COLORS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage]?.text || ''}`}>
   963→                {STAGE_LABELS[activeOpportunity.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || activeOpportunity.stage}
   964→              </Badge>
   965→            </div>
   966→          ) : null}
   967→        </DragOverlay>
   968→      </DndContext>
   969→    </div>
   970→  );
   971→
   972→  // ============================================
   973→  // RENDER: Orbit Tab
   974→  // ============================================
   975→
   976→  const renderOrbitTab = () => (
   977→    <div className="space-y-6">
   978→      {orbitByReason.map(group => (
   979→        <div key={group.value} className="border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
   980→          <div className="px-4 py-2 bg-orange-50 border-b border-orange-200 flex items-center justify-between">
   981→            <span className="font-semibold text-sm text-orange-700">{group.label}</span>
   982→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{group.opps.length}</Badge>
   983→          </div>
   984→          {group.opps.length === 0 ? (
   985→            <div className="p-4 text-center text-xs text-gray-400">No opportunities</div>
   986→          ) : (
   987→            <Table>
   988→              <TableHeader>
   989→                <TableRow className="text-xs">
   990→                  <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
   991→                  <TableHead>Bucket</TableHead>
   992→                  <TableHead>Time in Orbit</TableHead>
   993→                  <TableHead>Last Contacted</TableHead>
   994→                  <TableHead className="w-[100px]">Action</TableHead>
   995→                </TableRow>
   996→              </TableHeader>
   997→              <TableBody>
   998→                {group.opps.map(opp => (
   999→                  <TableRow key={opp.id} className="text-xs cursor-pointer hover:bg-gray-50" onClick={() => openSlideOver(opp)}>
  1000→                    <TableCell className="font-medium">{opp.name}</TableCell>
  1001→                    <TableCell>
  1002→                      {opp.bucket && (
  1003→                        <Badge className={`text-[10px] px-1.5 py-0 ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  1004→                          {opp.bucket}
  1005→                        </Badge>
  1006→                      )}
  1007→                    </TableCell>
  1008→                    <TableCell>{opp.updated_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.updated_at)) : '—'}</TableCell>
  1009→                    <TableCell>{opp.last_contacted_at ? formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true }) : '—'}</TableCell>
  1010→                    <TableCell>
  1011→                      <Button
  1012→                        variant="outline"
  1013→                        size="sm"
  1014→                        className="h-7 text-xs"
  1015→                        onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleResurrect(opp); }}
  1016→                      >
  1017→                        <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Resurrect
  1018→                      </Button>
  1019→                    </TableCell>
  1020→                  </TableRow>
  1021→                ))}
  1022→              </TableBody>
  1023→            </Table>
  1024→          )}
  1025→        </div>
  1026→      ))}
  1027→    </div>
  1028→  );
  1029→
  1030→  // ============================================
  1031→  // RENDER: Activity Slide-Over
  1032→  // ============================================
  1033→
  1034→  const renderSlideOver = () => {
  1035→    if (!slideOverOpp) return null;
  1036→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === slideOverOpp.id) || slideOverOpp;
  1037→    const bamfam = isBAMFAM(opp);
  1038→    const stageColors = STAGE_COLORS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || STAGE_COLORS.cold_dm;
  1039→
  1040→    return (
  1041→      <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[480px] bg-white border-l shadow-xl z-50 flex flex-col">
  1042→        {/* Header */}
  1043→        <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-50 to-white">
  1044→          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
  1045→            <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
  1046→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1047→                <Building2 className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
  1048→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 truncate">{opp.name}</h3>
  1049→              </div>
  1050→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-2">
  1051→                <Badge className={`text-xs ${stageColors.bg} ${stageColors.text} border ${stageColors.border}`}>
  1052→                  {STAGE_LABELS[opp.stage as SalesPipelineStage] || opp.stage}
  1053→                </Badge>
  1054→                {opp.bucket && (
  1055→                  <Badge className={`text-xs ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].bg} ${BUCKET_COLORS[opp.bucket].text} border-0`}>
  1056→                    Bucket {opp.bucket}
  1057→                  </Badge>
  1058→                )}
  1059→                {opp.dm_account && (
  1060→                  <Badge variant="outline" className={`text-xs ${opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'border-blue-300 text-blue-600' : 'border-green-300 text-green-600'}`}>
  1061→                    {opp.dm_account === 'closer' ? 'Closer' : opp.dm_account === 'sdr' ? 'SDR' : 'Other'}
  1062→                  </Badge>
  1063→                )}
  1064→              </div>
  1065→              {opp.deal_value && (
  1066→                <p className="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-600 mt-2">${opp.deal_value.toLocaleString()} <span className="text-sm font-normal text-gray-400">{opp.currency}</span></p>
  1067→              )}
  1068→            </div>
  1069→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 flex-shrink-0">
  1070→              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => openEditDialog(opp)}>
  1071→                <Edit className="h-4 w-4" />
  1072→              </Button>
  1073→              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0" onClick={() => setSlideOverOpp(null)}>
  1074→                <X className="h-4 w-4" />
  1075→              </Button>
  1076→            </div>
  1077→          </div>
  1078→        </div>
  1079→
  1080→        {/* BAMFAM indicator */}
  1081→        {bamfam && (
  1082→          <div className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-red-50 border-b border-red-200 flex items-center gap-2 text-red-700 text-sm">
  1083→            <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 flex-shrink-0" />
  1084→            <span className="font-medium">BAMFAM: No upcoming meeting scheduled</span>
  1085→          </div>
  1086→        )}
  1087→
  1088→        <ScrollArea className="flex-1">
  1089→          <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
  1090→            {/* Details Card */}
  1091→            <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
  1092→              <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Details</h4>
  1093→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-3 text-sm">
  1094→                <div>
  1095→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Temperature</span>
  1096→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
  1097→                    <div className="w-20 h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
  1098→                      <div
  1099→                        className={`h-full rounded-full ${opp.temperature_score >= 70 ? 'bg-green-500' : opp.temperature_score >= 40 ? 'bg-amber-500' : 'bg-red-400'}`}
  1100→                        style={{ width: `${opp.temperature_score}%` }}
  1101→                      />
  1102→                    </div>
  1103→                    <span className="text-xs font-medium">{opp.temperature_score}%</span>
  1104→                  </div>
  1105→                </div>
  1106→                <div>
  1107→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Owner</span>
  1108→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{getUserName(opp.owner_id)}</p>
  1109→                </div>
  1110→                <div>
  1111→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">TG Handle</span>
  1112→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{opp.tg_handle || '—'}</p>
  1113→                </div>
  1114→                <div>
  1115→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Source</span>
  1116→                  <p className="font-medium mt-0.5 capitalize">{opp.source?.replace('_', ' ') || '—'}</p>
  1117→                </div>
  1118→                {opp.next_meeting_at && (
  1119→                  <div>
  1120→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Next Meeting</span>
  1121→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{format(new Date(opp.next_meeting_at), 'MMM d, yyyy h:mm a')}</p>
  1122→                  </div>
  1123→                )}
  1124→                {opp.referrer && (
  1125→                  <div>
  1126→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Referrer</span>
  1127→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{opp.referrer}</p>
  1128→                  </div>
  1129→                )}
  1130→                {opp.last_contacted_at && (
  1131→                  <div>
  1132→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Last Contacted</span>
  1133→                    <p className="font-medium mt-0.5">{formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_contacted_at), { addSuffix: true })}</p>
  1134→                  </div>
  1135→                )}
  1136→                {opp.affiliate && (
  1137→                  <div>
  1138→                    <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">Affiliate</span>
  1139→                    <Badge className="text-xs mt-0.5" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>{opp.affiliate.name}</Badge>
  1140→                  </div>
  1141→                )}
  1142→              </div>
  1143→            </div>
  1144→
  1145→            {/* Notes */}
  1146→            {opp.notes && (
  1147→              <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 p-4">
  1148→                <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2">Notes</h4>
  1149→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 whitespace-pre-wrap">{opp.notes}</p>
  1150→              </div>
  1151→            )}
  1152→
  1153→            {/* Bump Counter (cold_dm only) */}
  1154→            {opp.stage === 'cold_dm' && (
  1155→              <div className="bg-sky-50 rounded-lg border border-sky-200 p-4">
  1156→                <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-sky-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Bump Progress</h4>
  1157→                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
  1158→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  1159→                    <div className="flex gap-1.5">
  1160→                      {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (
  1161→                        <div key={i} className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full border-2 ${i <= opp.bump_number ? 'bg-sky-500 border-sky-500' : 'bg-white border-sky-300'}`} />
  1162→                      ))}
  1163→                    </div>
  1164→                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-sky-800">{opp.bump_number} / 4 bumps</span>
  1165→                  </div>
  1166→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
  1167→                    <Button
  1168→                      variant="outline"
  1169→                      size="sm"
  1170→                      className="h-8 w-8 p-0 border-sky-300 text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-100"
  1171→                      onClick={() => handleReduceBump(opp.id)}
  1172→                      disabled={opp.bump_number <= 0}
  1173→                    >
  1174→                      <Minus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
  1175→                    </Button>
  1176→                    <Button
  1177→                      variant="outline"
  1178→                      size="sm"
  1179→                      className="h-8 px-3 border-sky-300 text-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-100 text-xs font-medium"
  1180→                      onClick={() => handleRecordBump(opp.id)}
  1181→                    >
  1182→                      <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Bump
  1183→                    </Button>
  1184→                  </div>
  1185→                </div>
  1186→                {opp.last_bump_date && (
  1187→                  <p className="text-xs text-sky-600 mt-2">Last bump: {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(opp.last_bump_date), { addSuffix: true })}</p>
  1188→                )}
  1189→              </div>
  1190→            )}
  1191→
  1192→            {/* Quick Actions */}
  1193→            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
  1194→              <Button
  1195→                variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs text-orange-600 border-orange-300 hover:bg-orange-50"
  1196→                onClick={() => handleStageChange(opp.id, 'orbit', opp.stage)}
  1197→              >
  1198→                <RotateCcw className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Move to Orbit
  1199→              </Button>
  1200→              <Button
  1201→                variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs text-red-600 border-red-300 hover:bg-red-50"
  1202→                onClick={() => handleDelete(opp.id)}
  1203→              >
  1204→                <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1" /> Delete
  1205→              </Button>
  1206→            </div>
  1207→
  1208→            {/* Stage Move */}
  1209→            <div className="grid gap-2">
  1210→              <Label className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Move to Stage</Label>
  1211→              <Select
  1212→                value={opp.stage}
  1213→                onValueChange={(v) => handleStageChange(opp.id, v as SalesPipelineStage, opp.stage)}
  1214→              >
  1215→                <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
  1216→                  <SelectValue />
  1217→                </SelectTrigger>
  1218→                <SelectContent>
  1219→                  {ALL_V2_STAGES.map(s => (
  1220→                    <SelectItem key={s} value={s}>{STAGE_LABELS[s]}</SelectItem>
  1221→                  ))}
  1222→                </SelectContent>
  1223→              </Select>
  1224→            </div>
  1225→
  1226→            {/* Activity Timeline */}
  1227→            <div className="border-t pt-6">
  1228→              <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-4">Activity Timeline</h4>
  1229→
  1230→              {/* Add activity form */}
  1231→              <div className="space-y-3 mb-6 p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg border border-gray-200">
  1232→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  1233→                  <Select
  1234→                    value={activityForm.type}
  1235→                    onValueChange={v => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, type: v as ActivityType }))}
  1236→                  >
  1237→                    <SelectTrigger className="h-9 text-sm w-28 auth-input">
  1238→                      <SelectValue />
  1239→                    </SelectTrigger>
  1240→                    <SelectContent>
  1241→                      <SelectItem value="note">Note</SelectItem>
  1242→                      <SelectItem value="call">Call</SelectItem>
  1243→                      <SelectItem value="message">Message</SelectItem>
  1244→                      <SelectItem value="meeting">Meeting</SelectItem>
  1245→                      <SelectItem value="proposal">Proposal</SelectItem>
  1246→                    </SelectContent>
  1247→                  </Select>
  1248→                  <Input
  1249→                    placeholder="Title..."
  1250→                    value={activityForm.title}
  1251→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, title: e.target.value }))}
  1252→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  1253→                  />
  1254→                </div>
  1255→                <Textarea
  1256→                  placeholder="Description (optional)"
  1257→                  value={activityForm.description || ''}
  1258→                  onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, description: e.target.value }))}
  1259→                  className="text-sm min-h-[60px] auth-input"
  1260→                  rows={2}
  1261→                />
  1262→                <div className="flex gap-2">
  1263→                  <Input
  1264→                    placeholder="Outcome"
  1265→                    value={activityForm.outcome || ''}
  1266→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, outcome: e.target.value }))}
  1267→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  1268→                  />
  1269→                  <Input
  1270→                    placeholder="Next step"
  1271→                    value={activityForm.next_step || ''}
  1272→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step: e.target.value }))}
  1273→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  1274→                  />
  1275→                </div>
  1276→                <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
  1277→                  <Input
  1278→                    type="datetime-local"
  1279→                    value={activityForm.next_step_date || ''}
  1280→                    onChange={e => setActivityForm(f => ({ ...f, next_step_date: e.target.value }))}
  1281→                    className="h-9 text-sm flex-1 auth-input"
  1282→                  />
  1283→                  <Button
  1284→                    size="sm"
  1285→                    className="h-9 text-sm hover:opacity-90"
  1286→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
  1287→                    onClick={handleAddActivity}
  1288→                    disabled={isActivitySubmitting || !activityForm.title.trim()}
  1289→                  >
  1290→                    {isActivitySubmitting ? '...' : 'Add'}
  1291→                  </Button>
  1292→                </div>
  1293→              </div>
  1294→
  1295→              {/* Activity list */}
  1296→              <div className="space-y-4">
  1297→                {activities.length === 0 ? (
  1298→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center py-6">No activities yet</p>
  1299→                ) : activities.map(act => (
  1300→                  <div key={act.id} className="flex gap-3">
  1301→                    <div className="mt-0.5 flex flex-col items-center">
  1302→                      <div className="p-2 rounded-full bg-gray-100 text-gray-500">
  1303→                        {activityIcon(act.type)}
  1304→                      </div>
  1305→                      <div className="w-px flex-1 bg-gray-200 mt-2" />
  1306→                    </div>
  1307→                    <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 pb-4">
  1308→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
  1309→                        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{act.title}</span>
  1310→                        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] px-1.5 capitalize">{act.type}</Badge>
  1311→                      </div>
  1312→                      {act.description && <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">{act.description}</p>}
  1313→                      {act.outcome && (
  1314→                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">
  1315→                          <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">Outcome:</span> {act.outcome}
  1316→                        </p>
  1317→                      )}
  1318→                      {act.next_step && (
  1319→                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-sm text-blue-600">
  1320→                          <ArrowRight className="h-3 w-3 flex-shrink-0" />
  1321→                          <span>{act.next_step}</span>
  1322→                          {act.next_step_date && (
  1323→                            <span className="text-gray-400 ml-1">
  1324→                              ({format(new Date(act.next_step_date), 'MMM d')})
  1325→                            </span>
  1326→                          )}
  1327→                        </div>
  1328→                      )}
  1329→                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1.5 block">
  1330→                        {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(act.created_at), { addSuffix: true })}
  1331→                      </span>
  1332→                    </div>
  1333→                  </div>
  1334→                ))}
  1335→              </div>
  1336→            </div>
  1337→          </div>
  1338→        </ScrollArea>
  1339→      </div>
  1340→    );
  1341→  };
  1342→
  1343→  // ============================================
  1344→  // RENDER: Create / Edit Dialog
  1345→  // ============================================
  1346→
  1347→  const renderFormDialog = () => {
  1348→    const isEdit = !!editingOpp;
  1349→    const isOpen = isCreateOpen || !!editingOpp;
  1350→
  1351→    return (
  1352→      <Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={open => {
  1353→        if (!open) { setIsCreateOpen(false); setEditingOpp(null); setForm({ name: '' }); }
  1354→      }}>
  1355→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
  1356→          <DialogHeader>
  1357→            <DialogTitle>{isEdit ? 'Edit Opportunity' : 'New Opportunity'}</DialogTitle>
  1358→            <DialogDescription>
  1359→              {isEdit ? 'Update opportunity details.' : 'Add a new opportunity to the sales pipeline.'}
  1360→            </DialogDescription>
  1361→          </DialogHeader>
  1362→          <form onSubmit={e => { e.preventDefault(); isEdit ? handleUpdate() : handleCreate(); }}>
  1363→            <div className="grid gap-4 py-4">
  1364→              <div className="grid gap-2">
  1365→                <Label>Name *</Label>
  1366→                <Input
  1367→                  value={form.name}
  1368→                  onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))}
  1369→                  placeholder="Company or contact name"
  1370→                  className="auth-input"
  1371→                />
  1372→              </div>
  1373→
  1374→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  1375→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1376→                  <Label>DM Account</Label>
  1377→                  <Select
  1378→                    value={form.dm_account || 'sdr'}
  1379→                    onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, dm_account: v as DmAccount }))}
  1380→                  >
  1381→                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
  1382→                    <SelectContent>
  1383→                      <SelectItem value="closer">Closer (Path A)</SelectItem>
  1384→                      <SelectItem value="sdr">SDR (Path B)</SelectItem>
  1385→                      <SelectItem value="other">Other</SelectItem>
  1386→                    </SelectContent>
  1387→                  </Select>
  1388→                </div>
  1389→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1390→                  <Label>Bucket</Label>
  1391→                  <Select
  1392→                    value={form.bucket || ''}
  1393→                    onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, bucket: v as Bucket }))}
  1394→                  >
  1395→                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1396→                    <SelectContent>
  1397→                      <SelectItem value="A">A - High Priority</SelectItem>
  1398→                      <SelectItem value="B">B - Medium</SelectItem>
  1399→                      <SelectItem value="C">C - Low Priority</SelectItem>
  1400→                    </SelectContent>
  1401→                  </Select>
  1402→                </div>
  1403→              </div>
  1404→
  1405→              <div className="grid gap-2">
  1406→                <Label>Temperature Score: {form.temperature_score || 50}</Label>
  1407→                <input
  1408→                  type="range"
  1409→                  min="0"
  1410→                  max="100"
  1411→                  value={form.temperature_score || 50}
  1412→                  onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, temperature_score: parseInt(e.target.value) }))}
  1413→                  className="w-full accent-[#3e8692]"
  1414→                />
  1415→              </div>
  1416→
  1417→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  1418→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1419→                  <Label>Source</Label>
  1420→                  <Select
  1421→                    value={form.source || ''}
  1422→                    onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, source: v }))}
  1423→                  >
  1424→                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1425→                    <SelectContent>
  1426→                      <SelectItem value="referral">Referral</SelectItem>
  1427→                      <SelectItem value="inbound">Inbound</SelectItem>
  1428→                      <SelectItem value="event">Event</SelectItem>
  1429→                      <SelectItem value="cold_outreach">Cold Outreach</SelectItem>
  1430→                    </SelectContent>
  1431→                  </Select>
  1432→                </div>
  1433→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1434→                  <Label>TG Handle</Label>
  1435→                  <Input
  1436→                    value={form.tg_handle || ''}
  1437→                    onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, tg_handle: e.target.value }))}
  1438→                    placeholder="@handle"
  1439→                    className="auth-input"
  1440→                  />
  1441→                </div>
  1442→              </div>
  1443→
  1444→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  1445→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1446→                  <Label>Owner</Label>
  1447→                  <Select
  1448→                    value={form.owner_id || ''}
  1449→                    onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, owner_id: v }))}
  1450→                  >
  1451→                    <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1452→                    <SelectContent>
  1453→                      {users.map(u => (
  1454→                        <SelectItem key={u.id} value={u.id}>{u.name || u.email}</SelectItem>
  1455→                      ))}
  1456→                    </SelectContent>
  1457→                  </Select>
  1458→                </div>
  1459→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1460→                  <Label>Referrer</Label>
  1461→                  <Input
  1462→                    value={form.referrer || ''}
  1463→                    onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, referrer: e.target.value }))}
  1464→                    placeholder="Who referred?"
  1465→                    className="auth-input"
  1466→                  />
  1467→                </div>
  1468→              </div>
  1469→
  1470→              <div className="grid gap-2">
  1471→                <Label>Affiliate</Label>
  1472→                <Select
  1473→                  value={form.affiliate_id || ''}
  1474→                  onValueChange={v => setForm(f => ({ ...f, affiliate_id: v }))}
  1475→                >
  1476→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select affiliate..." /></SelectTrigger>
  1477→                  <SelectContent>
  1478→                    {affiliates.map(a => (
  1479→                      <SelectItem key={a.id} value={a.id}>{a.name}</SelectItem>
  1480→                    ))}
  1481→                  </SelectContent>
  1482→                </Select>
  1483→              </div>
  1484→
  1485→              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
  1486→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1487→                  <Label>Deal Value</Label>
  1488→                  <Input
  1489→                    type="number"
  1490→                    value={form.deal_value || ''}
  1491→                    onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, deal_value: e.target.value ? parseFloat(e.target.value) : undefined }))}
  1492→                    placeholder="0"
  1493→                    className="auth-input"
  1494→                  />
  1495→                </div>
  1496→                <div className="grid gap-2">
  1497→                  <Label>Currency</Label>
